text: Unfortunately Amazon in their wisdom (cough, cough) decided to ship the snowsuit in a vinyl bag with holes in it!  There was no other bag to protect the snowsuit inside vinyl bag with all the holes.  This is what happened:  Arrived in hub locker. It was the very top locker. Opened it & pulled the pkg out getting a very wet & nasty surprise at the same time. My senses were assaulted. Smells like tea tree oil. Feels like conditioner or lotion.  I can’t understand how the delivery person a) didn’t smell that mess when they shoved the pkg in b) didn’t see the mess when they shoved it in - tho if they were short I guess that would explain it bc I’m 5’10” & I didn’t see it until the pkg was in my hands. The locker was up high & dark, but I could smell it the minute I walked into the hub locker room. I happen to be extremely allergic to tea tree oil.  It’s made from mellaleuca trees which grow all over southwest Florida where I was raised.  Tho native to Australia they were used to help drain the swamps of Florida generations ago bc they soak up so much water.  It has a very distinct smell & unfortunately is frequently used as a “carrier oil” for other oils & body lotions,  shampoos, conditioners, etc., so I have to be hyper-vigilant to avoid exposure.  Instead- Last night I got to suck down Benadryl & pray my throat didn’t close while keeping my epi-pens handy.  The liquid went through the holes & onto the snowsuit as you can clearly see in the pictures.  So I guess the suit is waterproof.  Looks true to size.  Elastic appears stretchy.  I’m super annoyed that this arrived in this condition & could have easily been avoided by amazon properly wrapping it to avoid the elements whatever they may be.

Useless under 40 degrees unless you’re just running to the mailbox & back & don’t mind freezing during that jog.  Zero interior pockets so nowhere to put glasses, iPhone, etc other than the 2 exterior pockets which should be larger imo as they are the only pockets.  Seems to me like they used a too large needle with the thread in mine bc it’s like the air comes through every single hole the thread is in that they used for decoration/insulation to give it a quilted effect.  With cotton fabrics you wash it & the material will shrink around the thread & you don’t have the air coming through the too large holes made by the needle.  I usually stick with the non-quilted versions of non-cotton coats fit this reason.  It looks nice, but it does not keep me warm in northern Colorado where we dip into negative temps & have crazy high winds.  I was not impressed with it. Got it in tye try before you buy program without realizing I would have to pay for bags to return the items I tried or that I would have to drop them off at ups. I’m disabled.  I don’t drive.  So fun to pay for taxis to return stuff when Amazon has a flipping hub at my apt complex.  Why can’t they make returns simpler?  Delivered to the hub & I should be able to return it to the hub imo.  Really ticks me off I don’t get anything delivered to my door anymore since moving to an apt. As a disabled person it’s a massive pain in my tush.  Every step is agony & the stuff weighs more than I am supposed to lift.  It’s a long walk when you’re in chronic pain.  Should have sent it back with the rest bc now I’ll have to pay for another $3 bag & taxis, but I wanted to try it in colder weather since it matched the color of my boots.  My bad.  Useless in cold weather.  The other issue I noticed was I tried 3 Columbia jackets in the same size (xl) bc I like to wear fleece & layers under my coats due to the temps here & the difference in sizing was ridiculous.  This was a true xl while the other two were not.  Easily managed camisole, T-shirt, & long sleeved, very thick, fleece shirt under it.  Just does not keep you warm on its own.  It’s a spring jacket imo not winter.  It has a fuzzy fur inside & I have coke to prefer fleece lined jackets bc I have service dogs & their fur is easier to get off flat fleece than fluffy fur.

I purchased these bc they are supposed to be waterproof. Mine are not.  Wore them in Colorado in 36 degree weather & I can feel air coming into the toe bed so my toes were cold.  Maybe they didn’t waterproof mine all the way idk or not at all bc mine are not.  I wire regular athletic socks today, but will try them again with wool socks later.  Either way they are one of the most comfy boots I have ever worn. The cushioning is magnificent. I’m disabled & have bad knees, hips, & spine & these were the most comfy shoes I’ve probably had in my life. I say that as an LL Bean, Land’s End, Merrel, Keen, & Columbia long time wearer.  I got the baby blue color for around $40 with tax which is a great deal imo.  The only big issue is I purchased them for winter walks with my dogs so they won’t work for their intended purposes. My dilemma is whether to keep them for spring boots.  The light color means they will get dirty fast so idk.  I just know they are crazy comfy & feel wonderful on my feet. I might try them with some fleece socks too & probably just spray them with boot waterproofing.  They are like a canvas tennis shoe. The material they are made out of.  So super light which I love due to my disabilities, but I don’t think I’ll be wearing these in the back country walks bc of the color I picked. Which I picked solely based on the price. I’m cost effective not cheap lol.  I admit when I got them from the amazon locker they were so incredibly light that I expected garbage.  While these are very light they are also an excellent walking boot imo tho if you need them to be waterproofed good luck bc mine are not.  If you are sticking to plowed roads & sidewalks & avoid big drifts of snow & wear a thick wool sock these will probably work very well if you’re looking for a comfy hiking boot.  Unfortunately I need something that can go off roads into the wilderness & snow drifts bc that’s where my service dogs prefer to walk. Lol.

I’ll start by saying I love this robe!  I truly do. Luckily I’d read other reviews and although normally I would immediately wash every item of clothing I purchase I decided to check the sewing and seams first. That said the quality assurance person should be fired. As you can see in the photos 2 seams are already coming undone as they were not seen properly.  There is also what I call “bobbin vomit” in several places where gobs of thread are in and around the seams and in other places there are just loose threads.  Some of the seams do not match up either. If it wasn’t for the seams that are already coming undone it is something I would normally overlook as it was close enough.  The other issue is the size. I’m 5’ 10” tall and I ordered the large/extra large as I’d read some complaints about size and especially short sleeve length. Let me tell you these sleeves will hold monkey arms!  I rolled them up twice!  They never happens to me with a large or extra large robe which I always buy big just to get the longer sleeve length. The length of time is excellent too as it is down between my calves and my ankles. I love the color. I love the robe, but due to the sewing errors as is bound to happen in mass manufacturing I am sending it back. I wish they had the sizes separated by small, medium, large, and extra large not lumping them s/m and l/xl.  I haven’t decided if I’m going to try the robe in a size smaller or just try a different robe.  If this robe was free of sewing mistakes I would have just kept it for a taller friend of mine.  It is the perfect weight. It’s not too heavy and it’s not too light. It is soft. It is fluffy. The pockets are nice and the sayin trummis a nice touch I love the hood. It was the deciding factor in my choosing this robe in the first place.  I’ll be sad to see it go as it really is an excellent robe if it didn’t have the bad seams in 2 places and the Bobbin vomit thread issues.  It’s the kind of robe you will want to snuggle and cuddle into and with someone. Two people will easily fit in this one!  I’m just afraid that if I buy the s/m that the arms will not be long enough and the robe length will be shorter too. I also hate that most s/m robe belts hit me under my breasts instead of at my natural waist and the pockets are located under each breast instead of along my hips. This robe belt fits perfectly at my waist and the pockets sit perfectly at my hips with no awkward belting or pocket maneuvering involved.  I’m really going to miss this robe!  I suspect I will end up with another one shortly, but hopefully one without flaws.

Don't be fooled by the description. I was freezing my butt off at 40 degrees! These are very thin, so to call them "fleece-lined" feels deceptive. Not a fan! I'd rather pay for a pair of Kerrits, which are truly warm! I ordered a medium but could have sized down to small.
Love this watch! It's perfectly petite! It's reliable, comfortable, and easy to clean - that last detail is especially important for nurses! Really happy with my purchase.

Absolutely gorgeous! I'm 5'1" and the dress does need to be hemmed by about 3-4 inches. In the pics, there was hem glue on the white lining, so it was easier not to step on it. It got so, so filthy at the fair but easily washed out and no ironing needed! For reference I got the size S/M, and I'm 135 lbs. I was able to cinch the waist in front and in the back.

I absolutely LOVE this hat. I have had a very difficult time finding a hat to fit my small head, even resorting to purchasing kid-sized fedoras. While this isn't a "petite" sized hat, I trusted the other reviewers and ordered it anyway. So glad I did! It fits great and doesn't look too big for my head. The adjustable string inside is perfect and the fabric-lined interior is comfortable - not at all itchy. I saw some people asked if the hat could be crushed. I don't think that is the best idea. Wallaroo makes another kind of hat that is meant to be crushed, but the brim is different that this one.

Though these look cute on the outside, in reality these were a bad buy and not at all what I expected based on the description. For one thing, I wear a size 6-7. Knowing they run a bit small, per other reviewers, I purchased the medium (size 7-8), and my toes pressed up against the front of the slipper! Also, if you look at the photo, there is a seam at the ankle where the footie joins with the rest of the slipper. This seam was really uncomfortable, digging into my skin when I walked. The buttons, which look as though they have a function, are actually just decorative. And the worst part? That lovely soft tuft of fur you can see poking out the top of the slipper doesn't go all the way down - just to the base of your ankle. The rest of the inside is made of a plain fabric. Overall, a poorly made item that I ultimately returned.

Got these for my husband, he really likes the different colors and patterns, but the inside of the sock is where the quality starts to fall apart. The threads from all the patterns keep getting caught on his toes when he tries to put his feet inside them, which he reports is "super annoying". It isn't all the pairs, but several of them have this problem.

You guys need to get this hat! I'm a petite adult female (lol that makes me sound like some breed of dog) and I have kind of a small head. All the adult sized hats sized small are still too large in circumference. So here is a pic of me in the hat so you can see what it looks like. I was in an Athleta fashion show, lol. I am really not made for the runway. I tried to do a little pirouette thingy and my shoes with their rubber bottoms kinda got stuck as I spun around and it looked super awkward. Anyway, I digress. The hat. The quality is good for a "made in China" item, the inner brim is not at all itchy. It's not the most ventilatory thing to wear in 190 million percent humidity, but as my mother always said, pain is the price for beauty. I also purchased the hat in another color. You really can't go wrong with this accessory! So buy it now!! :-)

These are the slippers of boots - totally comfortable the minute you slide your feet inside.

Sizing: I normally wear a straight-up size 6.5 in boots, really no matter the brand. I like to wear a normal-thickness pair of tight athletic socks. I almost bought a size 6 after reading some of the reviews about the boots being way too large, but I ended up going with my gut and sticking with a 6.5. I'm so glad I did - they are the perfect fit. Just enough room in the toe box with socks on. I think that if you have narrow feet, the boots might feel too loose for you around the side of the foot. I have a normal width, so they felt comfortable to me. Keep in mind that you can somewhat adjust the tightness of the boot with those side button things. They are a little difficult to work with, but it's doable. If this helps, I wear a 7 in Merrell's hiking shoes, so I somewhat sized down into my usual boot size to purchase these.

Arch support: kind of meh, but not terrible either. I'd rate it somewhere in-between. You can always swap out the insoles for your custom orthotics.

Style: intended to be somewhat comfy-slouchy, so if you're looking for a more stiffly-conforming boot, I would recommend you try a different style. These have a kind of an urban mod feel to them, which I love!

As a long-time wearer of Wacoal bras, I was really excited to receive this in the mail. However, I found myself so disappointed in this bra that I sent it back to Amazon. I think I am going to spend the extra $20 to get the other model bra mentioned in other reviews! Here are the problems I had with the bra:

Material: It feels much more cheap than my other Wacoal bras. Also, there is a little ring on each bra strap that attaches it to the band, and I don't have much confidence that it will hold together.

Band: There are only 2 hook-and-eye closures on the back of the bra (I wear a 32DD). This feels insufficient compared to my other Wacoals.

Sizing: The bra, for me, runs larger than expected. Every single one of my Wacoal bras is a 32DD, and the cup size on this model is too big. I have not lost weight as I immediately put on a different Wacoal bra in the same size, and it still fits perfectly.

I am a huge proponent of Wacoal bras - just not this particular model.

My sister got this for me as a "just because" gift. I absolutely love it! The gems on the necklace are really ornate and it's an unusual piece of jewelry. The copper color makes it stand out from the typical silver or gold in other jewelry. Perfect long length & weight - the magnifying glass even works (a little bit). :-)
Came super fast and was a hit - went with his theme and he loves the shirt !
Very nice bowtie.  Great price.  Very adjustable (wide range), my son should be able to wear for quite a while. Thanks!

So comfy! I made the mistake of trying these on before trying the Lindsey style on - which ruined it for me because the waistband makes these SO Comfortable! Especially since I'm a curvy girl. I bought both styles and while I do love the extra style, details and pockets on the Lindsey I'm returning those and buying another of these Morgan because for me comfort rules the world. That said these are also very flattering! Well made as well. I'd recommend especially if you have a curvy figure!
Great keen quality and durability. Fits true to size. Goes with just about everything and seems like it will stand up to a beating by my toddler...
Cute dress and a great deal. Very soft and comfortable! Fun with the bits of glitter and sparkle! Very happy with this for my gal!

Love this brand and this set. Nice one to mix and match and layer up or down depending on the weather. Jelly and the pug always has great quality and this set delivers as expected on quality. It does fit true to size but will be bigger when it arrives as it is 100% cotton and will shrink when washed and dried. It is also a swing dress so the cut is bigger and roomy if you expect a more fitted look this is not the dress style for you! But its adorable and we love it!

I love these slides. Very nice leather and great buckle accent. Overall very nicely made. Right now they are still kind of stiff to slide on but they havent bothered my feet at all- leather is nice quality and i know it will soften and give a bit once worn.

At first I really liked these but then the inside mesh area seam/where the stitching meets messed up my daughters foot pretty badly. Won't be putting them on her again. Wouldn't recommend at all but maybe its just her pair...Sad because they are useful and pretty cute but not worth the tore up feet

Hoops are a wardrobe staple for me- I go through a lot of them and I was happy to find these! Love these hoops-got them in "yellow gold" and plain steel "silver" definitely plan on getting more tones and styles. They are the perfect size and weight. Super comfortable.

The only reason I didn't give these 5 stars is because they are a little narrow in the toes. I can honestly tell you that I had planned on returning these right off the bat after trying them on out of the box but then I got busy and the return window lapsed so I was stuck with what I thought were "unusable" shoes because of that narrow toe :(- HOWEVER! because I was stuck with them I thought well I mind as well walk around in them and they actually began to give some in the toe and are totally wearable and fairly comfortable once broken in a bit. PLUS after I started trying to break them in- my fiancée noticed them immediately ( and lets just say he doesn't give me a ton of shoe compliments without being asked!) and he LOVES the look of them - he always talks about them being my cute "pink shoes"... ahem... meaning I should wear them. So give them a chance! But may not the best if you have very wide feet my width are usually average...

This are very cute flip flops but in my experience ran small, which is the primary reason for star reduction. My son wears an 11 now but was unable to wear these- footbed was too short and they were a bit narrow as well. Not sure if it was just this pair or this style in general. I have not had this issue with other stride rite footwear.
Great pants I get lots of compliment on these....
Does its job nicely for work - Nursing!
This fleece is so nice and cozy for my boy! I wish I could find one for my toddler!! I'd definitely recommend!

I bought these for nursing clinicals. I've only had them a week but they seem very comfortable and fit the bill! I will say they are more for being in your feet constantly - which is great, but the restriction at the top of the foot ( which is not there when standing) can make your feet fall asleep if sitting too long ( I found this out while sitting in a lecture) but there very roomy and comfortable. Happy with my purchase.

DEFINITELY size up one or two sizes. Large was way too tight on me, but I kept it as incentive to get back to a size medium later on. I'll probably order this again in an XL because it really is a cute top and very comfortable material.

Finally. Socks that fit my dad's extremely swollen feet from a medical issue. He can now have comfortable socks to lounge in. Well worth the price since we literally can't find this size anywhere else. Thank you!!!
The style is cute but the material seems very cheap. The chest bodice area looked weird on. I returned it.
Extremely thick and warm. I really find it to be very bulky (thick material) hence why I negated a star. If you're looking to keep warm and be cozy look no further, this is HOT.
It fits nicely. A bit tighter on arms but I like that because its more form fitting. The print is very bold and easy to see from across the room. Very happy!
These are SO warm and have fleece lining on the inside! Buy them.....I promise you'll be happy.

Do not expect to get this tape off within 24hrs of putting it on. Someone had a frayed hem for a wedding I went to and I was able to use this to HEM her top to her shoulder so it stayed in place. It WILL damage very delicate lace or clothing so be careful where you put it. Other than that, it did its' job of keeping the top of my dress in place very nicely. And I only used a few pieces out of the HUNDRED in the pack.

I like these compression socks a lot. Comfortable and really absorb excess moisture. I use them at work where I'm in retail and on my feet all day. I also use in the gym and they absorb well. The best part is how well they wash. No balling, yet.

The cut is beautiful....I am a 38DD and currently 155lbs. The large was perfect out of the bag, with about a half inch of room for arms, chest and tummy in case it shrinks a bit, which I expect it to. Nice stretchy material. I WISH this came in more colors as I would definitely order in a rose pink or very light aqua. The white lettering contrasts with the 'angry' message and I think gives more comedic effect that way.

Terrible, Low Quality material. Would have returned it but I already washed it. Material is much thinner than it appears in photo and would probably only keep you warm if you sat in a sauna. The photo material looks like a thick polyester material you would HOPE is inner lined with fleece. Keep dreaming.

The outer material is actually a cheap cotton tee shirt-like material with an abrasive texture on inside that mimics sweats but not quite.

After two washings, the hood ties are already fraying apart at the knotted ends and have almost completely faded, even while using Cheer color guard. They definitely overpriced this product for the quality you receive. Don't bother.

If you only care about the photos looking good then you could try this jacket. It’s definitely more of a burgundy pink color. In the photos it doesn’t show super pink… but it is burgundy not red! The hat in the photo is red but the photo doesn’t do it justice of the true color.
I give it 3 stars because the fit is good but the color is wrong. The material is fine and the quality of the fabric seams good and like it will last.

I did return this due to the burgundy/pink color.
Ordered a large. I’m 6’2” and 190lb
keep me cozy but not too cozy in mild cold climates like seattle.  these socks shred

Stretchy belt!!!! Why have I not known about this my whole life??? I hate hard belts and didn’t know there was an alternative until now. I won’t go back to old belts. I am curvy and yes I have a butt ... so the flexibility of this belt makes wearing jeans way more comfortable!! This belt bends and moves with your body! It also doesn’t have any specific holes so you can adjust this to ANY size and change it anytime you want! Feel great? Pull it tighter! Ate too much let it looser. It’s a very forgiving belt! :)

Love these dresses! I bought 3 sizes and they all are perfect! I got them big so they could wear them for a while. My 6.5year old is wearing 9-10 (she is normally size 7-8), my 3.5year old is wearing size 6 (she is normally size 4) & my 1.5year old is wearing size 3 (she is normally size 2). I like them a bit big. That said I think my 6year old can fit in the size 6 dress, I just like a looser fit for them. :)

i think this has helped me with sun exposure issues.  i have super fair skin and used to get weird sun rashes but these have helped me.  they also look reasonable instead of super akward.  something for fellow fair skinned people- i started taking iodoral and it has helped my skin respond to sun better.  you can find iodoral/ iodine supplement on Amazon
nice
okay
Great value....the polarized add on is great! Super cute style on! Bought for myself & my bestie! Would recommend!
I ordered 2 of these for my boys for Christmas gifts. They were great quality & super soft! LOVE the corduroy accents on the cuffs & collars.  They are going to love them! The look really warm too!
I ordered 2 of these for my boys for Christmas gifts. They were great quality & super soft! LOVE the corduroy accents on the cuffs & collars.  They are going to love them! The look really warm too!
Bought this as a gift for my nephew for Xmas. He loved it!
This mask is VERY LARGE! I bought this for my son, and it was too big. It was almost to big for my boyfriend. Not a good fit for a child.
Item as described. Fast shipping
They work in terms of texting with them on. Downside...really didn't provide much warmth. Very light duty.
Classy blouse at a low price!
Fits as expected
This costume had a decent quality to it and good stitching. It ran a little large and long for me but I was able to wear it anyways.
The only reason I gave this 4 stars is that it fits a bit narrow through the trunk. Otherwise, it's soft and comfy.

I wear crocs for all my outdoor yard duties and HATE paying full price for ugly, foam shoes. That being said, getting them for a deal on Prime Day made it tolerable.  They are great because they give a little cush to your step and they are waterproof.
took this on Vacation as a beach cover-up! Worked great!

I ordered 3 pairs at the same time and none of them are the same size. I gave one to my niece who is a size 4 and the other two are wearable but not perfect. Also, holes wear through in the crotch very quickly. They are soft but you can't rely on sizing.

I love how vibrant and crazy soft these are. The sizing is the problem. Seriously, how could one size fit xS to xL? I would say if you are about a size 10-12 at most these will fit nicely. Nothing larger. I wish they really made small/xS, medium, large, xLarge.

Smaller and more narrow. I would order one size up since they don't have 1/2 sizes.
Not nearly as soft in the footbed as some other Crocs.
Very short in toe room and narrow. I would order 1 size up since they don't have half sizes. Tried the heat idea and it didn't help.
Fit could be better with a half size smaller. Feeling great on my feet. Easy to walk in, cooler than tennis shoes.
Seams on top of shoe irritation to big toe.

I use Buffs in the summer to wick swear away from my head, keep ticks off of my hair, and provide UV protection for my head, neck, face, etc while hiking and running. They can also go under a hat to keep it clean. I love these things, I have several brands but BUFF is UPF50 which is hard to beat!

This is a lovely very lightweight hat, the cap portion is thin and stretchy and the brim is stiff, a bit heavy compared to the rest of the hat but feels comfortable. Less like a traditional baseball hat, more like a brim with a stretchy fabric that goes around your head. Good design.

I got the slightly obnoxious high viz yellow to wear while road running and would consider getting another in a more attractive color for wearing all the time! It is definately visible though!
Very comfortable, light weight, quick drying, slightly stretchy. I like to wear these around town, to do yoga, and to hike in the sun & heat. I feel even cooler than I would wearing shorts.
These are very pretty and comfortable. The leg opening felt tight at first but stretched a bit with wear.

I wore this on a 7 mile hike up and down a mountain in the spring in the south - it was very comfortable, I felt cool and stayed dry. I did cut the stitches between the thumb hole and the hem - they just hold the seam closed, the seam itself is sewn separately so this enlarges the opening without damaging the seam. I would purchase another.

Warm and mosture wicking but the lack of a gusset is a strange choice - they ride up my but as a result.

I like the wide elastic band and infinity drawstring. They fit low on my hips but stay up well. The matte fabric is nice. These are good in the mid 20s to mid 30s.
Beautiful hat, bright white color, great reflective details. My hair fits well through the back, the size adjuster is easy to use. Very comfortable.
These pants are ok but they are not made from fleece, they are a soft slippery knit material. Not warm . Outside fabric already looks damaged. I would not buy again.

These are comfortable sneaker type shoes for walking outdoors in cool weather. Although they are not waterproof, they do keep out moisture if you step into a shallow puddle or walk through wet grass, etc. The upper is very soft and flexible, not stiff at all. They are a bit wide and roomy, and I have narrow feet, but I can wear them very comfortably if I tighten the laces. No issue there. I chose to add a cushioned insert, there is definitely enough space for most insoles. The shoes themselves have a pretty minimal insole, not a ton of arch support or cushion. They have nice treds on the outside but it looks like they would wear down since they aren't that deep.

I am 5'1" 105 lbs and ordered an xs short. Thank you under armour for selling petite sizes!! They fit great, next to skin but not restrictive. These are lightweight leggings for warm weather, we still have some 50s + 60s days and these are perfect. No issues with chaffing or discomfort, at least not at a 5k distance. Not see through.

Title says it all, really. It's thin, it's a very loose knit, there are loose threads everywhere... it's on the wider side so it won't stay up over your nose or keep your neck warm, although wearing it as a hood, around your head,  or as balakava is ok. It's more expensive than and less nice than similar products from other brands. Washing it did make it a bit softer, but I have no idea how a reputable brand that is so popular can also be so cheap and poorly made.
These socks are slick to prevent blisters when running. They fit great (woman's size 7 shoe) and have some cushion but are overall very thin. Very comfortable.

I just got these, but they seem very well made and sturdy. Outdoor Research is an excellent company and I have three other items from them, all of which are well made.

I measured my hands and compared to the company's size chart before ordering. They fit great. They work well with my phone.

These are very thick gloves - heavyweight, as it says. The packaging clarifies that they are designed for 20-40F weather and can be used as a liner.

I got the cacao color which in person is a warm brownish purple/plum. It's a nice color but I bought them for warmth and fit.

I am 5'1" and 105lbs, 24" waist 33" hips, ordered an XS.

This fit more tightly than my other pair of leggings with a pocket at the waist rather than on the leg, kind of like a compression legging, but both styles are very comfortable. They smelled a little weird out of the bag so I threw them in the wash/dry and tried them on - good fit. They are more what I would call a mid rise, coming 2.5" below my true waist. Still a comfortable rise for me. I also own a pair of TSLA XS black fleece leggings. All four leggings are squat proof and pass a flash photo test (that is, you can't see my underwear if I take a photo with the flash). I keep coming back to this brand because it's so hard to find nice, affordable leggings especially in small sizes. I wore these leggings on two 1.5 mile long walks in the heat and stayed comfortable, so I would say they are moisture wicking and good to work out in. Whether or not they are good for runs probably depends on how they fit you as you really do not want to run in leggings if there is any chaffing at all or any other fit issue. They do have flat seams that are good for running.

I am 5'1" 105lbs, the xs skort is comfortable, flattering, and just the right length. The shorts under are pretty short (kind of like hot pants) so not super modest but fine for normal activities where the skirt covers you most of the time. Quick dry type fabric. Basically it's well made and what I expected.
Definitely comfortable and light weight but it feels a little flimsy. Worried about durability.
Got this to replace my boyfriend's old minimalist wallet that was failing apart. Looks and feels nice and it holds all his stuff!
Got this for my boyfriend for Christmas, he loves it. In person you can really see the quality and attention to detail. The face has an inner and outer circle that look great when the light hits them
These earrings have a weird finish that is smooth/shiny in some areas and rough/matte in others. They don't irritate my ears and are light weight but the finish seems low quality.

I have a 24" waist, ordered an xxs. They are big but i can make them work with the included belt. They are warm and seem well constructed. Due to being so big be they make a weird noise when I walk and the legs rub together. I bought these for field work on cold, damp days. I wish they sold smaller sizes. Calling pants with a 28" waist extra extra small is a little ridiculous.

I wore these into a pool of water while doing fieldwork in 40F weather. Bought these as sock liners to wear under my hiking socks for a week long backpacking trip.

For me, these are a complete game changer. After a week in the mountains, absolutely no blisters, and very happy feet. I've worn them since as regular socks, and they are by far the most comfortable pairs I own.

As for durability. These are toe socks. If you try to yank them on, you will eventually RIP them. You have to take the extra 2-3 seconds to make sure your toes go into the right holes. Just think of them like putting gloves on your feet, well, because that's exactly what they are.

I was looking for a purse that looked more like real leather. This is dull and plastic looking. It is also a lot smaller than pictured. The company should Really update the images.  Iam returning it.
No complaints. ABSOLUTELY LOVED my first 2 piece. I got the color triangle. Im 5'4. A size 16, DDD boobies. I ordered the 3x. Its perfect! :-) :-) :-)

These are super comfortable.  The memory foam on the bottom is nice and fluffy. I have plantar fasciitis and these provide excellent support for walking around the house

I got this to replace a gold band  wedding ring that was getting to tight on my finger. I have been married 20 years and I couldn't see spend big money on a new ring. I have been wearing it for months and it still looks brand new. No scratches, and its still very shiny. Everyone thinks its white gold until I tell them its not.

This is the best bra I have ever owned! It fits so well, and is very comfortable. Warner's also has great fabric styles and patterns in this bra. I bought my first one in a store but amazon by far has the best prices on this bra.
Great toddler slippers!
Quality of fabric is good. Super cute; bonnet matched the dress. Armpit area fits strange though.  Can only wear it if I don’t want to use my arms. Ha.
Better than typical costume, not quite dress material. I’m 5’1 and it was about an inch longer than hoped but really no big deal. Worked out perfect for my costume.  Will be wearing it again.
My grandson loves this cap!  Soft and well made. He’s 16 months old with a good sized head and it fits perfect.

Will update after I wash the jumpsuit but first impressions are: the jumpsuit is large and baggy. You definitely need a shirt or tube top underneath or your boobs will show. :/. Right now it looks a little like a clown outfit but hoping I can shrink it a tad. I really want to love it. It’s lightweight, which I like and has pockets…yay!
UPDATE: washed on gentle cycle/cold water and dried on delicate cycle. The jumpsuit shrank slightly and it’s a perfect fit now. Will probably order 1 or 2 more with different patterns.
Love them so much that I bought 3 more!  Comfy!  Has pockets that I love.  I wouldn’t say it’s a lot of tummy control but I think if they were super tight, I wouldn’t enjoy wearing them.
Warm, soft and thick.  Comfy!
Lightweight, soft and comfy.  Love them and they fit under my gloves too.  These are lightweight, so if you are looking for thick gloves, this would not be a good purchase for you.
Comfy and cute.
Love the dress!
Lightweight and comfortable.
Comfy and lightweight...bought a second one afterwards in Blue.
Very good quality and kept everything organized in my backpack.
My daughter loves it. It fits perfectly! Thank you and would recommend it!

I like this travel case. I don't use it for travel. I use it for my very fine jewelry and the print I got is really feminine and pretty. The top doesn't stay open very well but overall, it was worth the price.
This is a lovely red. Was a little expensive but I'm keeping it.
This is cute. However, it the description should say for children. Its too small for adults.
I like these ok. They haven't tarnished yet. Had them a month
