The best frames and lenses. This is my second pair.

I am about 20-25 lbs overweight and don't like wearing clothing that clings to me or shirts that are too short. This polo shirt is great. I can wear my XL either with my jeans or with my leggings and it looks and feels great. It's long enough to cover my belly (almost tunic like) and is loose. I highly recommend to anyone looking for a super comfy shirt.

This is a really cute tunic top. I wear it with my leggings and I got a lot of compliments with it (I got the shirt in black). It is just long enough to cover my tummy and is very flattering of my slightly overweight body (I'm 5'7 and weigh about 155-160). Material is very soft and shirt is well made. First time I wore it (to dinner) my boyfriend gave me an immediate compliment (something he hardly ever does). Highly recommend this to all. I am now ordering this in white as well since I really am impressed.

I needed a nice pair of aviator sunglasses for a Caribbean cruise last Christmas. I ordered these, not sure what to expect. I was pleasantly surprised. They come in a cute case to start with and protected by plastic. These are super lightweight, quality made and fit my oblong shaped face perfectly. Outside, they definitely protect my eyes from harsh rays and make it much easier to do all outdoor activities (especially driving). I am wearing these daily now and I get a load of compliments every time I wear them. Highly recommend.

I needed these for a cruise I was taking in December with my brother and nephew. This convenient pack of five were just perfect for our NCL cruise to the Western Caribbean. They were easy to attach and lasted the luggage handling just fine. I was able to easily remove them and will be using them again in March. Highly recommend for all users in the market for cruise luggage tags.

Cute sweatshirt, true to size. It is a very soft cotton material. I am deleting a star because of the puffy sleeve. I don't like it on me, makes the shirt look kind of weird. Might be fine for others. Shirt is a nice quality and fits well, just that the puffy sleeves make my arms look full and I don't find it very flattering on myself.

Super cute tunic top. Great length (goes over my leggings perfect). I am deducting a star because I found around the waist the shirt fit me a little too small (muffin top was showing a bit). I wish I had bought a size larger. But, all in all, well made top pretty red color.

I have always loved TravelPro luggage, so I was excited to try this. To be honest, I have been using hardsided luggage for the past few years, so I was a little apprehensive switching back to softsided. I was so impressed when I saw this set. First of all, the luggage is of a perfect size, great for when we travel for a few weeks to have bags that all match and of varying sizes that are perfect. Second, these are well made, zippers are easy to zip (and don't snag). Spinner wheels are also fantastic and the luggage turns on a dime. Lightweight and well made, I highly reccommend!

These are a great value. Three bras that are really well made and are very attractive on. They are considered full coverage but still show cleavage. I love the way these fit and look on me (I wear a 38C and they fit me perfectly). I highly recommend these reasonably priced bras in a value pack.

This is a super cute tunic top. I got a size large (my usual size) and it fits great. Nice length, not too big. The 3/4 length sleeve makes it great to wear on cooler evenings in the summer. Looks great with a pair of white leggings. I've received a lot of compliments while wearing. Highly recommend!.

I went on a trip to Iceland with my son and his family this past July. I wanted him to try this to see how easy it would be for him with his family of four to travel. He loved it. He had an easy way to keep organized with the passports and vaccination cards. Everything was kept in a simple single location and it was easy to go through the TSA checkpoints. I highly recommend this for all families!

I wasn't sure what to expect with these earrings given the pictures on the page. However, once I opened the box, I loved them. These are a nice size (on the larger size, but not overly so) and not heavy at all on the earlobes.  They are a really nice quality and very unique design. The silver is shiny and the pearl is perfect. Highly recommend to anyone looking for a nice size pair of silver earrings.

I am 5'7", about 160 lbs and the large fits me great. Long enough for me, higher waist and it really does pull the tummy in. Material is soft and super stretchy, these are great for yoga or working out, or more so just to wear with a tunic blouse. I really like these and have already ordered a second pair. Highly recommend!

My son is an avid snowboarder, goes to the slopes almost every weekend from where he lives in NY. This is a quality made snowboard pant and bib. Fits him perfectly (got him a small as he is only 5'7" so it was not too long on him). He told me the pants were pliable, making it easy for him to maneuver the slops. He said he also kept dry and warm in the sub freezing temperatures. Highly recommend!

This is a really nice, plush man's robe. First, the blue color is rich and regal looking. Second, the material is quality and super soft. Last, it is super warm and great for these cold mornings in northern Florida. My husband is 5'11" and weighs about 195 lbs and this one size fits him perfectly. This would make a terrific gift for the man you love!

I have been using TravelPro luggage almost exclusively for over 10 years now. However, the largest size I have has been well used and so I was hoping to find a replacement for it. When I saw this Fanskey Luggage, I had never heard of the brand, but I figured I would try it. This is a 3 piece set with spinner wheels. The quality is as good as TravelPro and I actually might say I think it is better. The cases maneuver well and are very lightweight. I love the rich dark red color as well (I don't see much luggage this color so it makes it easier when I was at the airport over the holidays to spot). The three sizes fit within each other for easy storage. Highly recommend!

Super cute glasses for kids. I had gotten these for my 6 year old grandson who typically will not wear sunglasses. Knowing how important it is for him to protect his eyes, I wanted something that I felt could he would wear.  These have great UV protection and are also very stylish. Surprisingly, he wore these the whole time he was down here. I think he liked the color and the fact that they were very light on his face. Highly recommend!

The old saying 'you get what you pay for' really comes into play with this set of earrings. You do get a large variety so since I was going on vacation, I thought these would be great to take with me. What a mistake. The first pair I tried to put on were a large style and I had trouble at first opening them for insertion. Then when I tried to clip them closed once in my ears I couldn't do it. The second pair I had picked to wear didn't hang correctly (one was slanted). These are cheaply made. I won't try any more of them, if I could have returned them I would have.

These are super nice warm and quality socks. I got them because I needed them to wear inside riding boots and they were wonderful. Comfortable and soft, they do not roll down or bunch. I have washed them three times already and there is no fading or pilling. Highly recommend!

Pretty nice socks, but not crazy about the fit. They don't hug my foot at the top (kind of loose). They have had a tendency to roll down when I wear them all day. They did work well under boots I was wearing when I went riding. Probably because the boots were fitted and did not allow the socks to roll. They are warm and are soft feeling. Not sure I will be buying more.

Not overly thrilled with this t-shirt. It is a fairly nice quality, but kind of thin. Fit me well (I got a large). I washed it once and it shrunk slightly and was pretty wrinkled (despite my taking it out of the dryer on time). Don't think I will buy any more, but but nice to have around as a spare t-shirt.

These pants fit really well (I am 5'8" and 155 and I ordered a large). They stretch really well and conform nicely to my body. I deducted a star as, to me, they are an awkward length (not at the ankle, yet not a capri). Not sure if I will be buying any more, but they are nicely made and a good soft stretchy material. If you are a little shorter than me, you may like the fit better.

I had bought a summer shirt which was off my shoulders so I was looking for a good bra to use. I really like this JPGO bandeau bra a lot. First, it gave me full coverage and the material is super soft and this is very comfortable to wear. The padding is relatively light and just gives me support in the right places without being overly padded. I have received a lot of compliments wearing this. I deducted a star because I normally wear a 36 bra and I got the large, wish I had sized up to an extra large (should have read some of these reviews first).

Not sure what I thought I was getting, but I wouldn't use these for outdoor (or even in the gym) use. They are super comfortable, baggy/loose and are great for sleeping or just lounging around the house. I don't like the waist band, found it keeps rolling down when I wear them (have to keep pulling them up). I think they are soft and comfy, but not for me for yoga or any other type of sport (unless I am going to use them in my home).

I thought these were a cheap looking pair of glasses. I didn't like the frame at all, it truly is oversized. I even had my husband try them on. He is 6'4" with a full size face and they even looked way to big on him. I guess for $15 they are ok, but it's worth spending a few dollars more and going for some quality when it comes to glasses.

This is a really nice biking shirt. It is super colorful and very form fitting, looks great on. Washes well (I have washed it at least 5 times already and there is no fading, colors are bright like they were new). Great material, allows me to breathe while biking (not too hot for me here in Florida). I love the California design (where my family is from). Highly recommend this design and also this manufacturer if you are in the market for a biking shirt.

These are a nice size earring, noticeable on my ears, with a muted purple tint. Super light weight, I wore them all day and evening and didn't even know I had them on. Super cute pattern on the drops as well. Highly recommend these to add to your wardrobe to match all your different shades.

These are a nice size earring, noticeable on my ears, with a really colorful red tint. Super light weight, I wore them all evening and didn't even know I had them one. Super cute pattern on the drops as well. Highly recommend these to add to your wardrobe.

Really cute infinity ankle rope bracelet. Well made and fits well on my ankle. Looks great whether I am wearing a pair of jeans or shorts and is perfect for all types of casual wear. Highly recommend as an addition to your wardrobe.

For the money, you can't beat this three pack of earrings. Sure, they are not as big as I would have liked them (I prefer a larger size earring), but they are super cute and surprisingly made well. I'm Irish and having a variety of Celtic knot earrings is great to have whether I am dressing up or just throwing on some jeans. These would make a great stocking stuffer for the holidays or even something to give someone on St. Patrick's Day. Highly recommend.

Love, love, love these pajamas. They fit me perfectly and are loose enough that they don't creep up on my during the night or twist and turn when I do. They are made very well and are really soft. I have washed them at least three times now and they still look at fit great. They are actually kind of cute to wear as loungewear, wore them over the holidays in the morning when I was preparing breakfast for the grandkids. Highly recommend these!

These are nice basic gloves, nothing special. They are warm and well made and do work well in cold weather. They are not good, however, in snow or rain as they aren't waterproof. Also, I was unable to use my cell phone while wearing these, so I can't recommend the touchscreen capability. In addition, they come in just a plastic wrap so if you are thinking of gift giving, you will need to find a box.  Good basic gloves for the money

I was looking for a great pair of gloves for a trip I went on to ski in Utah last week. These were perfect. First, they are fairly thin and are not bulky on my hands. They fit perfectly (medium) and are really stylish (I got the pair in ivory). The best part is I was able to wear them all day out in the snowy/cold weather and my hands stayed nice, dry and warm. In addition, they also are very pliable so I can use them the grip a cup of hot chocolate easily. Highly recommend these if you are looking for a really nice looking pair of waterproof warm gloves.

These socks were a big hit this past Christmas. I had these plus two others that I bought to give to the men in my house. They all wore them on Christmas and told me how comfortable they were. One of my sons is a school teacher and he told me he was going to save and wear them in class next year in December (thought his 7th grade class would get a kick out of them). I love the colors and the design, too, and they also washed really well.. I am planning a new tradition going forward and will do this every year (of course with different designs). Highly recommend!

I really like this shoulder bag. It is compact, yet fits everything I need for a day out. Quality made, zippers flawlessly inside and out. I have received several compliments while using it too. Highly recommend!

Great 5 pack set of extra warm wool socks. One of my sons lives in the northwest and is always complaining of how cold it gets there in the winter. When I saw these I knew they would be perfect for him. They are super warm and soft and fit him great. He can use them whether he is just off and walking around town or if he goes skiing or even just hiking in snow. They are really well made, too, and wash well. These would make a great holiday gift or stocking stuffer for the man in your life.

Cute variety pack of two beanies. These are well made and my son really likes them. Not overly big or plush, they hug the head nicely and keep your head and ears warm. These are great for the cooler weather in Virginia during November and December. I am deducting a star because I like my beanies  little more plush and thick. I don't think these are as warm as some other beanies I have purchased, but they are nice for cooler (not freezing cold) wear and they are economical in a two pack that makes them a great gift for the holidays.

Super cute, well made and warm beanie cap. Works well for me in the fall and winter months to keep my head warm. Large enough to cover my ears and it easily covers my entire head to maintain warmth. The hat itself is super soft and plush and I love the gray color which blends with most of my jackets and wardrobe. Would make a great holiday gift for a warm winter.

I just wore these last weekend with a pair of jeans and I received countless compliments on them. These are nicely made and super, super light. Wore them for about 8 hours and actually forgot I had them on. Colorful and a perfect size to make them stand out when you wear them. Highly recommend!

These socks are perfect for what I have been looking for. I live in north Florida where winters still get a bit cold (it actually was in the low 40's this morning. I was looking for a good pair of warm socks that I could use when walking the dog. These are perfect. They are super warm and are super comfortable for when I take my long walks. They do not slip down in my sneakers and stay up on my feet. I love the pink and black color, too. These would make a great holiday gift as well. Highly recommend.

These are a really nice pair of evenings. They are not too large, but sizeable enough to be noticed in my ears. They are not heavy and I can wear them all evening with no discomfort. I have received several compliments when wearing these as well. Quality made, reasonably priced,  highly recommend!

Nice, basic, 4 pack of boxer briefs. My son has been wearing them now for going on two weeks. He has told me they are soft and comfortable to wear and do not creep up. I have washed them at least 2-3 times each and they still look as new and have retained their size. Would make a nice stocking stuffer for the man in your life this holiday.

Super cute blouse. I love that I can either roll the sleeves up (for a more casual look or when it might be a little warmer) or wear them down. Fits great, not tight, material is nice and soft. I like wearing this with my jeans and a white camisole underneath the blouse. Washes well as long as you hang it right out of the dryer a little damp (to avoid wrinkling). Highly recommend this blouse for casual or dressier occasions.

These are super cute holiday socks. I will be wearing them several times this year during the holiday season as they are so festive! Colorful, quality made. warm and will look great whether I am going to a holiday party or just to jazz up my walk with the dog. They don't roll down and fit great. Highly recommend!

These are super cute holiday socks. My son is in the Air Force and has a fairly high title. He likes to jazz up the holidays when he wears socks like this under his flight suit for fun (he's been doing this for years now, so I am always looking for new ones to send him each year). These fit well, are well made. truly colorful and look great on. Highly recommend.

Colorful men's socks. I have a son who is a middle school teacher and I knew these would be perfect for him. They fit great and the colors are a hoot for him to wear while in class (he is always looking for new and different socks and ties). Highly recommend these, they fit great, stay up (don't roll) and they are soft and comfortable. These would make a great holiday gift for the man in your life!

I really love this shirt. I recently wore it open with a tank top underneath and I got a ton of compliments. Fits perfectly, quality made, and looks great on (very flattering). I also ordered this in white to have as an alternate. Highly recommend! Would make a great gift for the holidays as well (I love the roll up or roll down sleeves, too).

This shirt runs a little small. I ordered a large, like I would normally wear, but it is too tight around the chest and upper arms. Sad because I really liked the look and feel (it's very soft) and would probably be really comfortable to wear. Order up a size.

These are nice no-show low socks. First, they are colorful and come in a great variety of colors. They are soft and made with good quality. I wear them in the morning when I job and then throughout the day when running errands. They hold true to their non-slip claim and have not bunched up in my shoes when wearing. I highly recommend these socks and they would make a great holiday gift for the athlete in your life.

My favorite color is green and I have a lot of jewelry in this exact color. I love the look of this and the silver and green cubic zirconia stone quality is amazing for less than $20. I deducted a star because I couldn't figure out how to put this one by myself (I actually had to have my husband try to do it and it took him a while to figure it out). Actually, taking it off was just as complicated. Outside of that, it's really pretty and would make a nice gift for someone.

Great variety of some cheaper made earrings. I did have trouble with two of the pairs actually getting them to 'click' once they were in my ears (they are two difficult to be able to snap shut once in your ears, even difficult outside your ears). The others (no click to close ones) were fine. Different styles, I was able to use them on several different occasions and did receive several compliments. For the money, this is a great set to expand your wardrobe, just be aware that they are not the highest quality.

I really like these capris and I wear them several times a week. They are flattering and hug your body and I also like the higher waist on the pants. I am in the process of trying to lose some weight and these are great to wear when I walk in the morning and all day as I run my errands. I have received compliments on these and have already ordered another pair in a different color to be able to alternate. Highly recommend these for everyone and every body shape.

These are a super attractive pair of earrings. Light on my ears, easy to clip on, I can wear these all day and evening and don't even remember they are there. I love the filigree geometric pattern and they look great on (I have received several compliments while wearing them as well). These would make a great gift for someone or buy them for yourself. I can wear these casual or even for dressier occasions. Highly recommend.

These are nice, lightweight running socks. They are no show and as such, usually roll down into my sneaker at some point during a run. However, these are super soft (merino wool) and they do resist rolling down until I am out for a long time. They feel great on my feet and I wear them during the day with errands and even to work and they are so comfortable. Highly recommend!

I really would have liked to have given this workout outfit 5 stars, but I couldn't. On the positive side, it is super soft and really comfortable. I am deducting the star because of the sizing. I found this to be way small. I am 5'7 about 145 lbs and got the large. I was able to wear the pants (although they were snug) but I couldn't wear the sports bra comfortably (it was pinching me). I never usually wear an XL, but I really wish I had sized up (a lot of these reviews were not out here when I selected this. Word to the wise, size up.

Super soft and roomy, this will be a great sweatshirt to have this fall/winter. It fits me great (a little loose so not hugging my tummy) and it looks great with a pair of jeans. Also super warm, so it will definitely be a great sweatshirt for me to use during the cooler nights. I will be buying a couple of more to alternate colors. Highly recommend this fleece sweatshirt for everyone.

I was in the market for a new purse to use at night when I go out that is easy to carry and easy to store. This wristlet is much, much nicer than I was expecting. I love the credit card slots so I don't to carry my entire wallet and it has a zippered area for my phone and cash. I have already ordered this in red as I think it would look great with one of my outfits. For $15, this is absolutely money well spent. Just keep in mind that the hardware is gold colored (not silver as it seems to appear in the pictures). I would have really liked silver as most of my jewelry is usually silver, but outside of that, I am very happy with this!

Absolutely love these earrings. I have been wearing them several days a week since I received them and have got loads of compliments. These are a perfect size, hang well in my ears. They are substantial, but not heavy and well made. They are really attractive, too, and look like they should cost a lot more than they do. These would make a great gift for someone you love or just to by for yourself. I highly recommend them!

Super cute multi-colored necklace. Lays well on my neck and is easy to clasp. I have received several compliments while wearing this. For the money, this is a great necklace and I highly recommend it. It looks great with my summer attire and ties in all my colors together.

Lightweight, super cute sweatshirt. Perfect for cooler night wear. I wore this last week when I was visiting friends in NY and I got a lot of compliments on it. I got the green tie-dyed color and I absolutely love it. It was paired with a pair of leggings and the fit and length were just perfect. I just ordered one in blue, too. Highly recommend for a fashionable look, great with leggings.

This is a fantastic cross-body bag. I was going n a weekend trip to visit my son in Los Angeles and knew this would be a great bag to use the minute I saw it. Beautiful, soft, well-made and functional, this bag has enough room for a wallet, makeup and small brush. I love that I can wear it across my body which helps protect me from someone looking to steal it. I also really like this light gray color, it goes with everything. I will definitely will be taking with me to Europe next year (hopefully this virus will be over by then). Highly recommend.

These are super cute dangle earrings and I can see how they could become my every day earrings. As of this writing there is no price associated with them so I can't comment on the value. I will say, they are well made and they are a perfect length (not too short and not too long). I love silver as an every day jewelry statement so these will certainly get a lot of wear. Would make an excellent gift as well. Highly recommend.

Nice light weight suitcase. Wheels are wonderful and the suitcase spins on a dime. This will be a breeze to maneuver through the airport with on my next trip. Inside the suitcase, there is lots of room and pockets and the suitcase unzips and expands to allow for more contents. I read some other reviews here where folks were saying that the bag will not go through the airport for carry on. This bag looks small enough for me and looks as though it should pass. I will know more when I travel next and I will update this review then.

These are well made, oversized sunglasses that come in a great case and look great on my oval shaped face. Not sure how great they are for super bright sun, because I still am squinting in some of this direct Florida sunlight. I prefer darker lenses than these, so these will be used more for driving and early morning, late day use.

Nice full size bra with great support. Super pretty and feminine, too, and fits me perfectly (38C). I love the way this looks on with it's lacy accents, yet it leaves me smooth under my t-shirt. I will be buying another in black. I highly recommend!

Really nice shirt. A little thicker material than I thought (polyester), but the colors are really pretty and virant and it lays off my shoulders nicely. If I had any complaint at all I wish it were longer. I tend to like a t-shirt which comes down almost to cover my butt, this stops at about half way down my stomach. So keep that in mind if you are looking to hide a couple of extra pounds (this isn't the shirt for that).

These are really well made luggage tags. Large, colorful, makes it easy to identify your bag on the baggage carousel. They were easy to fill in my address and attach to my suitcases. If you are in the market for new luggage tags, I highly recommend these.

Really nicely made quality shoes.  Stitches are tight and color (blue) is a beautiful hue. Shoes fit perfectly. My son, who's a school teacher, does a lot of walking throughout the day and told me that after wearing these for a week non-stop, his feet had no pain (he has high arches) and actually felt supported and relaxed. I highly recommend these for everyday or more dressy wear.

Really well made gym bag. Quality construction and loads of room. I have been using it almost daily to carry all my gym clothes, I even carry my pickleball paddles and balls for when I go to play. Haven't used it for travel or weekender use but I know it would hold a load of clothes and shoes and toiletries. I love the zippered area on the front which allows me easy access to the things I need the most. Highly recommend this bag.

This is super cute for my 4 month old grandbaby. I love the way it fits him perfectly and it certainly keeps him warm on these chillier than normal Florida nights in February. The shark pattern is super cute and colorful , too, and he looks so adorable in this. I highly recommend this to anyone and would certainly make a great baby shower gift.

This is a great wetsuit for kids. I have an 8 year old grandson who has been wearing this since I gave it to him about a month ago. It fits him great and is not overly tight. Assists in protecting his delicate young skin with 50 SPF protection and also helps with rash guarding. He is an avid beginning surfer and skimmer and using this suit helps him in many different ways in protecting him. He loved this blue color, too. Highly recommend!

Nice, reasonably priced, fleece sweatshirt. I found it ran a little small on me. Not that it was tight, but that I tend to like my sweatshirts a little loose on me around the muffin top area and this shirt was very huggy. I had ordered the size large but probably would have been better in an extra large. Shirt is soft and well made, though.

These are super cute slippers. They resemble the Uggs I had last winter and can easily be mistaken for same. Quality made, these slippers certainly can keep your feet warm during the cold winter months. I got the pink color in a size 9 and they fit my feet perfectly.  For the money, these copy cat slippers look and feel just like the much more expensive brand. I highly recommend these. They also come in a cute bag (not a box) and it is perfect for storing them as well.

Nice warm hooded jacket/sweatshirt for your child. It is not really a soft, flexible fleece, but a little stiffer as a jacket. This did fit my 7 year old grandson well and was a welcomed addition to his wardrobe, especially when we were out in the 40 degree desert weather in California this past week. Quality make. Really no complaints except that it is not soft like a 'regular' sweatshirt and, like I said, it's more like a jacket fit.

These are super cute earrings! Nice, quality made, they hang on my ears lightly but they are substantial enough to see from a distance. I love silver jewelry in general and the fact that these are handcrafted makes them even more special. They come in a cute little box, so they would make for nice gift giving. I have received several compliments since wearing them.  Highly recommend.

This is a really nice wristlet wallet. Made from a good quality leather, this wallet has a sturdy zipper and lots of room inside to place your money and credit cards and even some room for a lipstick or mascara. I really liked using this on a recent international trip I was able to place my most critical items in it and safely hide it in an inside coat pocket (perfrect for security). Highly recommend for when you want a smaller way to carry your money and identity items.

For the money, these are really nice boat shoes. I love the color and the canvas material and they fit my husband's size 10 feet perfectly. He has several other boat shoes in his wardrobe, but almost all cost twice at what these shoes are currently priced.  Really nice shoes, quality made, reasonably priced. Highly recommend!

I love this passport holder, but it's also so much more. I can pack money, credit cards and even a small lip balm. On top of it all it has a pen and pen holder which really comes in handy. I used this recently when I was on a cruise instead of using my purse all the time. I was able to pack most of what I needed when off ship (including my boarding card for the boat) and I could shop without carting everything around. This is thin and is perfect for both men and women!

This are nicely made elephant earrings in a gold plating. I am deducting a star because they are smaller than I thought they would be. Although the elephant itself is an ok size, there really is a minimal dangle (they basically just dangle off the bottom of the ear, no additional hang). I typically like to wear dangle earrings where they are at least a 1/2 to full inch (or more) below the bottom of my ear. If you like shorter dangle elephant earrings than these may be for you.

This is a really nice casual shirt. Similar to Tommy Bahama or Margaritaville brands, but at much less of a cost. My husband looks perfect in this and a size large fits him perfectly (5'11", 195 lbs). Colorful and well made, this would make a great holiday gift for the man you love. It's also not too flashy looking, low profile print looks terrific on. Highly recommend!

Really nice quality blouse. I am 5'7" 158 lbs and I chose the size large. Fits perfectly, no gaps and feels soft and great on. I have received a bunch of compliments after wearing it this past weekend. The blouse is perfect with jeans (as I wore it) or as something a little dressier (say for work). I highly recommend.

I have several Wild Hazel products already. They make a true quality bag and this brown crossbody is no exception. Wonderful soft leather, strong stitching, and a true fashionable look, this is a great bag to take with you (especially when traveling) everywhere. I recently wore this on a trip to DC and it was great to pack all my essentials and keep them safe in a crossbody bag. I highly recommend!

Really nice tunic top with hoodie, perfect for the colder weather. I live in northern Florida and I am always looking for warm tops that I can use during fall/winter/spring evening wear. This tunic is a perfect fit (I am 5'7" 160 lbs and I got a size large), it's soft and attractive, long enough to look great with leggings and is light enough to wear in 60 degree temperatures and also warm enough to wear in days and evenings colder than that. I really love this tunic and highly recommend!

Super cute, reminds me of shirts I used to wear in the 1970's (lol, yes I am that old). It has that hippy look to it. Well made, fits my larger frame perfectly (I am a 38C, 5'7" body), nice length (covers most of the booty). I wish the sleeves were a little longer, but other than that, just perfect. I like the lacy look, too. Highly recommend.

Super soft, super warm, these are amazing merino wool socks and the colors are warm and vibrant. My son lives in Northern Virginia near the mountains where the winters can be brutally cold. These socks help keep his legs and feet warm and comfortable even in the coldest of days when he is doing outdoor activities (like snowboarding, hiking, or just going to and from his car). I have already purchased two more pairs to give him as one of his Christmas gifts this year. Highly recommend!

These are a great alternative to using just a paper tag with staples/tape. I cruise at least once or twice a year and find that without a luggage tag holder, paper tags can get ripped/lost. This pack of 12 is a reasonably priced pack which could easily support a family trip. These are probably not the best tags I have ever used (they aren't that wide and I needed to fold the tag more than I would have liked to get them to fit my NCL paper tags), but for the price they are great. I have a small group (6 folks) going on a trip in October and we will all be using these.

I really like this set of Rosyline tank tops. Multiple colors you get a set of 3 for under $20. These fit nice and snug (I got a size medium and probably could have used a large, so keep that in mind when ordering). Material is nice and soft. They look great under an off the shoulder shirt or with a tunic sweater where wearing a shirt underneath is required. Pretty nice set of the three colors you will probably use most to accent and add to your wardrobe.

I have no idea why people are saying this is a small travel bag. I guess if you travel with loads and loads and loads of toiletries, it might not be for you, but this is perfect for my needs. A lot of compartments, lightweight and made to last. I deducted a star just because of the odor (must be the vinyl it's made with and the fact that it was sealed in a plastic bag when it arrived). It's a very strong smell. I will be using this next week on a trip to Europe so I will leave it out to air for the week and hopefully it will disappear before I leave. Outside of that, this is a really nice multi-compartment travel bag.

These are super cute earrings. I wasn't sure what to expect when I ordered them, but I really love them. They are a great size (larger than I thought they would be), lightweight for the size (no pulling on the ears), and look great on. I wore them last Saturday night and got a load of comments. They look almost like something from the Caribbean and are great for summer time wear. They looked beautiful with an off-white top I had on with a great pop of color. Highly recommend!

This is a super comfy fleece robe. I love the hood (I never had a hood on a robe before) and wearing it after a shower makes me feel warm and comfy. I also love just lounging around the house in this robe at night when there is a chill in the air. It's also super cute and looks great on. I wear a size large in most clothes (I am 5'7" weighing about 155 lbs) and this is a perfect fit for me. Would make a great gift for the holidays for the woman you love in your life (especially if they feel chilly in A/C or live in cooler areas of the country).

Nice lightweight duffle bag. Nothing fancy, but a good bag to use to carry shoes/clothing or any other items. Wish it had more storage and pockets. I like the luggage by-pass which makes it easy for me to use while going through the airport by attaching it to my roll on luggage. Not sure how long this bag will last, stitching is not that tight. If it was  my son using this to the gym I don't think it would last that long. However, it is good for an overnight bag (just not heavy duty usage).

I have a 9.5 W foot and these shoes fit me perfectly. They are easy to put on (no ties, straps) and plenty of room in front of my toes and for the width of my foot. They are super comfortable and cushioned and, like a sneaker, they make a great walking shoe. I love the platform as it gives me a bit of a height lift as well. I really am surprised by how much I like these stylish, comfortable shoes. I have no idea why people are saying they fit small at all.  A cross between a sneaker and a loafer, these are just perfect for me!

This is a really nice checkbook/wallet. First, it is quality made and a beautiful soft leather. Room for 5 credit cards and cash, this checkbook wallet also has a place for a pen to store. I don't know about you, but I am always digging for a pen when it is needed at the bottom of my purse. Having a place to permanently keep my pen allows me definitely a more organized purse. For less than $15 this is a no brainer. If you need a new checkbook wallet this is a great choice. It would also make a great gift for your mom or anyone else that needs to carry a checkbook with them.

These are a really nice basic pack of underwear. I love the colors and the lace trim and the fit of the panties with the higher cut. I honestly could stand to lose 10 lbs and these are attractive on me and tend to disguise some of my 'flaws'. These fit well and are well made. Would make a great pack to give as a stocking stuffer present this year for every woman in your life.

Really nice 'invisible' no-show socks for casual wear.. I use this when running or when going to the store and they feel and wear great. No slippage, they stay on my foot and do not slide down into my sneakers. These are also a nice quality made sock which should last for years. I got the darker color package and I couldn't be happier. Highly recommend!

I originally thought I would use this on a cruise I was recently taking as a means to compromise space and cross body to protect my cash and wallet. Well, I find myself using this almost all the time now whether I am going to the market or going to church or just to a friends house, this leather crossbody messenger bag is great. Quality made, reasonably priced, this bag is packed with storage room and zippered compartments. On top of that, it's really attractive and I have been asked where I got it after receiving compliments. I highly recommend this and think every woman should have a bag like this in their wardrobe.

These are super cute (I love the colors) water shoes. I took them on a cruise I just completed and got so many compliments! I used them while on the beaches in the Caribbean and even when navigating Dunn's Falls in Jamaica. They fit my feet well and protect them from shells and rocks. Oh, and did I mention how cute they are???? Highly recommend!

Handy little tool to make my traveling so much better. I have a 28" suitcase and a 21" suitcase and, in the past, had to try to roll both of them simultaneously through the airport. Now with is bungee cord I can lay the 21" on top of the other and connect them together so I only have one suitcase to have to maneuver. So much better and such a simple idea! Super easy to use, I don't know how I lived without this Tabitora device before. I highly recommend!

These are a very nice, quality made swimming trunks. My 36 year old son son (5'8" waist size 32) fits into these perfectly, they are the right length and he couldn't be happier with them. He actually told me he wears them not only for swimming but even if he is doing some kind of outdoor activity because they fit and look so good. Highly recommend these LTIFONE brand boardshorts/swimming trunks.

Nice tunic, but runs very, very small (definitely go up a size). I typically wear a large and most shirts usually fit perfect with room to spare, but not with this top. I am on a diet trying to lose 10 lbs so maybe in a month it will fit better but I wish I had received this in a bigger size. Too tight around the tummy and in the chest area (I am 38"). Anyway, outside of the sizing, it's a cute tunic. This tunic has a really nice length and is well made and fashionable. I really like the side ties, too. I just wish I could wear it.

I have to say, not sure why this bag says it's for men. I am a woman and absolutely love it. This is a great bag to transport my laptop in. But, in addition to carrying a laptop, it has lots of storage for a bunch of other stuff. When I travel, I will actually pack a spare set of clothes in here (leggings, t-shirt) to use as an airplane carry on. Plenty of storage, compartments. Well made, lightweight, water resistant, I can take this anywhere I go (for business or pleasure). This bag would make a great gift during the holidays for men or women. Highly recommend!

Nice true to size shorts. These fit my grandson perfectly and they are great for all weather times. Made of terry cloth, they absorb great, too.  First time he wore them we took them to the beach with us and upon leaving the beach, with his wet suit on, he put these shorts over and they were great for keeping my car seats relatively dry. I highly recommend them for all kids, quality made, reasonably priced, vibrant colors and they wash and dry well.

Perfect backpack for me to use with my 15" laptop. Great for me when I am traveling for business (couple of times a month) to hold everything I need to bring on board the plane. Attractive, well made, plenty of areas to back and zip in things you need. I can even bring a spare set of clothes to have for an emergency (if my luggage gets lost). Great price, too. Highly recommend for the student or business person in your life.

These are nice running socks. They are a little higher than I typically use, but outside of that they seem well made. Absorbs sweat well, helps to cushion the run. Have washed them at least twice already and so far so good when it comes to holding up to washing and I see no fading in the color. They are also reasonably priced. These would make a good stocking stuffer for the runner in your life during the Christmas season.

This in an inexpensive choice in slim wallets. If you are in the market for one, then this is for you. It is super thin, not a lot of room for any bulk and it does have the RFID blocking feature. My husband found this as a great alternative to one of his more substantial wallets when we were recently traveling. This probably won't make it as an everyday wallet in your wardrobe (because I am sure you would need more room for money and cards), but it's a great cheap alternative when you want to go slim.

These are super cute socks, stretchy and warm. Probably meant more for a teenager and definitely a woman (pink probably wouldn't go for a man). I like to wear them with my jeans and they are definitely a conversation starter. I will be buying more so I can give them to my two daughter-in-laws who have and love cats. Would make a cute stocking stuffer during the Christmas holidays for the woman in your life, too.

Nicely made tunic. I am 5'7" about 160 lbs and got the large size and it fits perfect (might even be a little loose). Color is a deep rich black and I have washed it twice and the color held up well (no fading). Seems like a good quality, stitching is tight and this should last for years with good care. Very flattering on me and I have received several compliments wearing it.

This is a great crossbody bag. I took it with me to use in Europe on a recent vacation and basically threw away my Rick Steves hidden money pouch. This is roomy, holds my phone, my credit cards, cash and even my passport along with makeup and a small brush. Bag stays secure across my body so I am not worried about pick pockets. The bag itself is made with beautiful leather and is extremely attractive. Highly recommend this for traveling but really for any time you want a smaller bag.

For the price, these earrings are a great deal. Perfect size, well made and very attractive, I have been wearing them almost every day since I have received them. These are perfect for dress wear or for casual times, large enough to be noticed but not heavy or cumbersome on the ears. I love the sparkle. Highly recommend these for every woman to keep a pair in her wardrobe!

Cute attractive fedora summer hat. Made well for the price and nice to keep in your wardrobe for those occasions where you might want to add a hat for style. A little small for my head (I have a 7 3/4 hat size so I had to stretch it a bit. I like that it is rated for SPF protection makes it great to wear at the beach or anywhere there is a lot of sun (like there is down here in Florida).

Cute panama hat, looks well enough made for the price. Stylish and perfect for beachware. I deducted a star as it runs small and find it is too tight for my head. Keep in mind that you should have a small to medium small head for this fit.

The men in my life (husband and sons) love Gold Toe socks and I love them women's styles, too. These Stanton socks are great, perfect length for them to wear especially under both dress and casual pants. We love the color of these, and they look great with jeans (great blue colors). Quality made and with the well-known Gold Toe pattern. We highly recommend these socks for all of the men in your life!

These are a nice, reasonably priced pair of sunglasses with 100% UV protection. They come in a nice box to make it perfect for gift giving. Like anything else, you probably get what you pay for. Not that these are that cheaply made but I keep wondering if excessive wear and tear might eventually loosen one of the arms off (they give a little too much). Outside of that, they look great on and, like I said, for the price it's a great way to protect your eyes.

Super cute, warm knitted hat for winter wear. I was planning on letting my granddaughter try it on a recent ski trip, but I liked it so much I decided to wear it myself. On the brutally cold and snowy afternoon I wore it, it was wonderful. First, it is super warm with a fleece lining. Secondly, it fit beautifully and stayed on my head despite taking a few tumbles on the slopes. Third, this is super cute and feminine. I absolutely love it and it will be a staple in my closet for years to come.

This is an absolutely adorable winter set. My grandson is almost three and it was a perfect fit. Quality made and very soft (because of the fleece), it keeps his head and hands warm during this most brutal winter. I love the ear flaps on this hat as it keeps him even warmer and there is no need for earmuffs. This is a must have set in the winter for anyone with small children.

I know this says men's, but I have been wearing it. This cap has a great soft warm lining on it and fits my head fine. I love that on these cold winter mornings (it's been in the 30-40's most days in the last few months in Northern Florida), this hat Is great. I keep the top and sides of my head cozy warm. If I need to, I can even move it down to cover my ears. I love how soft it is and it looks great on. Highly recommend for either a man or a woman as either way, it is a great winter hat.

This are great pants. I wear them all day (not just for working out). Comfortable, high waisted, perfect length for my 5'7" frame. I love the little zippered side pocket which is perfect for holding my cell phone. These have a nice stretch to them and give when I move. I love the slight sheen, too. No complaints, I will be ordering a pair in black as well.

Another great quality product from Under Armour. I am deducting one star simply because to me these are not 'no-show' socks (when my husband had them on I certainly can see them when he wears sneakers). That said, these are well made and I love the colors. My husband likes Under Armour better than any other athletic sock on the market today because they last after repeated wearings and washings.

These are great everyday socks. First, they are low-cut, but they still hug my ankle well (and do not roll/slip down as a walk/jog). They have a great mix of colors and I can use them for anything I am doing. Amazon Essentials always deliver a great quality product at a very reasonable price. I love these!

I love TravelPro luggage and I buy it exclusively. This carry on bag is perfect for my use. Suprisingly roomy, I can use this for weekend and short duration getaways as well as use it as a carryon for my laptop and a change of clothes when I check a larger bag for longer trips. Quality made, hard sided, it stands the test of rough handling. The spinners are great and allow me to maneuver easily and make turns without having to struggle with a bag. I love this small bag and it is my new go-to bag for frequent use.

I have been buying Fruit of the Loom products for all members of my family for years. I can always trust the quality of their underwear and I know that everyone loves them. Having an almost all male family (I had all brothers as siblings and now I have three sons and four grandsons), boxer briefs are a staple under my Christmas tree every year and are always appreciated by all ages (well, maybe not the 4 year old, lol). I always rely on Fruit of the Loom to round out my holiday gift giving. I am buying 4 more packages of these to complete my shopping today.

I love Gold Toe socks and buy them for every member of the family (particularly at Christmas). These crew socks are a great quality multi colored socks. I like to wear them with my jeans and they stay up on my legs (do not roll down) and they are super comfortable to wear. No complaints, only compliments!

The jury is still out on these. Although I like the fit on the legs and butt on these, not sure about what this is calling Tummy Control'. There is a band up near the waist which, I guess, is supposed to pull something in. But it's not that strong and it doesn't cover my stomach (just my waist). It also has a tendency to roll when seated. I don't think I would ever buy these again.

Ok, sweater.  Not crazy about the overall fit. Little baggy at the bottom, would have preferred it a little longer and better fitted. Material is soft and well made, just not my style in the fit as I prefer a sweater that goes down lower in the back (does not cover butt).

I am not sure what the other reviewers got as a product, but I am super happy with the glasses I received. These are nice sized, lightweight polarized glasses. My first impression of them is in the presentation. I love the way these came, looks like a more expensive brand based on the careful packaging and boxing. These fit well and look great on me. No complaints at all.

I got this in a size large (I am 5'7" and a 38C) and it fits perfectly for me. Well made and warm, perfect for cooler fall data without the bulk of a full coat or jacket. I like the length of it as well as it rides on my lower hips almost covering my butt. A quality lightweight vest at a good cost. Highly recommend.

Only rating this as a four star as one the of the problems of not using elastic in the top band is they tend to slip down. I had my son use them for work (he is a school teacher) and he complained that when he was sitting at his desk, his pant legs rose a bit and his calf and shin were exposed because the rolled down. He told me he liked the material, he liked the fat that they are light weight, and he typically does wear Gold Toe socks. He also told me that although he likes these, he doesn't think he would ever buy this variety again because he likes his socks to stay up. However, he knows some men don't like the elastic hugging their legs. So, great sock, great quality, just didn't work for my son's preferences.

These are comfortable and fit me well (I am a size 10 and I got a large as I am 5'8"). I really don't care for the V waistband and normally would not have worn these, but they surprisingly don't make any rolls of flesh poke through (as I was afraid of happening). They hug my body snugly, but not overly tight and they are very flattering. Soft and well made, these are a great athletic pant made for either working out or, as I usually do, for wearing under a long tunic top. I have never worn Halina fashions before, but I am now seeking out alternate colors to help supplement my fall/winter wardrobe.

Pros and cons with this one. First and foremost, this is a great jacket to pack during a spring/fall trip where rain fall and cooler temps can be unpredictable at times. I took this with me on a recent trip to Iceland for my husband and it folded small and compact and was easily stored in a backpack for our hiking adventures. The size (large) fit him well. For the cons: kind of a weird looking jacket. I certainly wouldn't see him wearing this on a daily basis as the zipper is on the side and it has a weird plastic feel to it. That said, it's ok for unpredictable weather and travel, but wouldn't wear it on a regular basis outside of that.

These are great with my sneakers. Super comfortable and do not roll down (and onto the bottom of my feet) after a full day of wear. I love the variety of colors as well. These are very lightweight, but strong, and are perfect for every day use.

Not 100% thrilled with this passport holder. I was so looking forward for something I could use for my September cruise. In reality, there is nothing really wrong with this. However, it does not meet my expectations. First, the leather is very hard (not like a soft plyable upscale leather would be). Second, there is no leather aroma/fragrance to it. I have to assume it's leather (as the ad says it is) but I would never be purchasing this if I knew what it was like. The inside is constructed well and there are places to put credit cards along with your passport. As of this writing there is no price listed for this passport holder (says currently unavailable). If it's cheap enough, it might be worthwhile getting. Otherwise, shop around a bit.

I am 5’7” and weigh about 145 lbs and a 36C.typically I wear a medium in most shirts, but since I like these types of shirt roomy I ordered these in a large. Boy, do these run small. I really could have used an extra large. I really like the design and material of these shirts. But definitely buyer beware when it comes to sizing.

Perfect socks for the man in your life. Quality made, still looks good after multiple washings, remain pull/snag free given hard wear and cleanings. My son is a school teacher, on his feet all day, and these socks remain up (do not roll down) and retain their color vividly. These are a great value and the sock patterns are a great variety from traditional to fun. Highly recommend.

These are a perfect fitting legging for me. I like the fact that they are higher wasted, but the waist band does not roll down on me. They stretch and are well made. I am almost 5'7" and their leg length is just perfect for me. I love wearing these with a long tunic. They are great looking, comfortable and I have received a load of compliments on them. These are my new go-to every day pants/leggings.

These are great every day tunics. I use these in the office, usually with a light flouncy open sweater and I get a lot of compliments. These are well made and a light material, terrific for layering. I favor the black one which I wear with a grey sweater and it looks great. Does not cling to my little  occasional 'muffin top' and gives me plenty of room to breath. Great idea for layering in clothing.

These are a great summer pair of pajamas. Cut loose for a fit (I typically wear an 8 or a 10 but I like my pjs to not be clingy), they are extremely comfortable and super cute. I like them because although I know they are pajamas, I am not afraid to sit outside on my back porch in the morning to drink a cup of tea (as they look like a little short lounge outfit). I have washed them once and they clean easily and did not shrink. Great lightweight comfortable pajamas. I really like the heather grey color as well.

These are the most comfortable walking shoes I have ever used. Soft, supportive and really great looking. I took these on a recent visit to Disney World where I logged about 7.5 miles a day on my Fitbit. My feet felt wonderful, not tired. I used peds socks which are not visible and I swear I feel I could have gone so much further. I would highly recommend these for anyone who loves their feet and wants to pamper them. You will feel totally refreshed wearing them.

This is a great duffel bag. Almost hate calling it a 'duffel' as it conjures up memories of military gear. This is attractive, quality made and perfect for airline carry on. Carried for me two pairs of jeans, 4 t-shirts, 1 sweater, 1 pair of heels and a spare set of sneakers (not to mention underwear and shampoo, toothpaste, etc, etc) and there was plenty of room to spare that I could easily have taken more. This is great for college students, too, for them to store their stuff in when traveling home for the weekend or spring break. Just a perfect luggage companion for use when regular suitcases are too big (or as a supplement to a suitcase). I highly recommend for women, men, old and young. Perfect for everyone.

These are great. I previously had a plastic attached version which were almost impossible to get on and take off my luggage. These wrap on my handle and connect by screwing the two ends together. Secure fit and easy to remove. Can't wait to use them on my cruise in April!

My husband loves these. Comfortable, no slip and no show. Absolutely amazing how they stick firm to his feet and do not slide down the back of his shoes when walking the way other no show socks on the market do. These are also super lightweight, almost like you aren't wearing socks at all. We live in Florida and socks like this are perfect for wearing out with Dockers or shorts as they are totally invisible when wearing loafers and they are light enough that the humidity has no impact on making your feet sweat. Perfect!

Nothing much more to add to other reviews here. It took me a while to even figure out how to open this suitcase (despite the fact that the lock was set to 0000. However, after about 15 minutes of working on it, I finally realized there was a button to slide. Inside there are two large pocket areas and the rest is open (with secure straps to keep your clothing in place). It is a 29" size, prides itself on being large. I found it to be adequate when compared to my Travelpro luggage (I think they have far more pockets, even small ones where I can put toiletries which this does not have). The biggest plus is the fact that it is lightweight (so I know I will be able to zip through the airport). Wheels are multi-directional and it is easy to maneuver. Biggest issue to me is the price, but I know there are people out there who love the designer products but over $500 for this suitcase is too high. I haven't tried to reset the lock yet. I see there are some videos out there on You Tube so I will play around with that later.

Great item to have when traveling. I typically have used a money belt, but I find it awkward when trying to get cash out (or passport) on the go. This easily slips into my shirt and allows me easy access to get to the contents. I am so glad I purchased this for my next trip!

Absolutely great, lightweight windbreaker jacket to wear. My husband got this for a recent trip to Panama (rainy season). It was warm in Central America and showers popped up occasionally. This jacket folds up easily and wrinkles come out quickly when you put it on. Keeps the rain/wet out without being too warm. Great jacket!

This is a very handsome, quality, men's watch. Excellent presentation in the box, the leather strap is quality and overall the watch makes a wonderful appearance. Rating this only as 4 stars as it comes with a weird strap closure mechanism that I have never seen before with a watch. I even tried to google/you tube it to see if someone may had posted some way to put it on (the instructions only spoke of how to set the watch, not how to strap it on your wrist). Not sure if this is a European way of watch making, but it was extremely confusing. Once we figured it out (and it took time), the watch overall is lovely.

I absolutely love these earrings. I knew the minute I opened the box, they would be my new go-to everyday pair. I love the size (they are mid size) and beautifully quality made. I love all things Celtic and this design fits my personality and style just perfectly. Presented in a nice gift box, too, so these would make a wonderful present for the special woman in your life.

Ok, so shoot me. I should have believed the other reviewers here. These earrings are much smaller than I thought they would be (almost hug the bottom of my ear lobe). I know the description says 'round' but the picture almost looked oblong. So, silly me, I bought them. At least there were at a gold box price when I got them (less than $15). but I will probably never wear them

Inexpensive shoes, just meant for using in the water (ocean/lake/river). Not meant for heavy wear and tear. My husband has an 8.5 inch foot, and sized down to an 8. Great for use while boating or snorkeling.

Inexpensive shoes, just meant for using in the water (ocean/lake/river). Not meant for heavy wear and tear, but to use while tubing or wading or snorkeling are great. Pretty comfortable, had them on for 1/2 a day with no issues. I know there are other better made brands out there, but for the money here, you can't go wrong.

I exclusively use Travelpro for all my travel/packing needs. Although I am now using the spinner series, this suitcase (20") is still in my use today. I use it as a small carryon bag where I keep my laptop and some miscellaneous clothing items (in case my larger cases don't make it to the terminal at the same time I do on the plane). I know the Travelpro brand is durable, attractive and stands up to lots of misuse by baggage handlers. You can't go wrong buying this brand!
Bought these for my older brother (age 67) for his birthday. He absolutely loves these and says they are the best golf shoes he has ever had. I am so happy with this purchase

Bought these for a Kentucky Derby party I was going to (needed to dress the part, lol). I must say they were stunning and I got a lot of compliments for them. I didn't particularly care for the clasp, I think with relatively light loose this will break eventually (would have preferred a lobster claw). But, for a relatively cheap accessory, that looks more expensive than it is, these are for you.

Cutest little set. The little girl I bought this for wore the outfit the first day during her visit here and then wore the tiara continuously thereafter (calling herself a princess, lol). Anyway, great inexpensive, quality outfit for the little one in your life.
Really cute pair of holiday earrings. Bought these on a gold box special, and I was not disappointed. Great pair to use as an everyday in December or for a holiday party. Really nice for the money!
Beautiful Celtic design, hangs daintily from my ears. I love Irish themed jewelry and these fit the bill to a tee. Nice size, too (I don't like my earrings too small).

I bought this on a gold box deal, almost an impulse buy. So glad I did! This is a phenomenally beautiful ring for the money. The green peridot center stone is gorgeous and the simplicity of the setting is fantastic. If you can get this ring around the price I did ($20) run to purchase. You won't be disappointed.

i love Travelpro and almost exclusively use their bags for my travel (business and pleasure). I bought this bag for use on a recent cruise and found I was able to fit everything I needed into it. Convenient pockets for storing cosmetics and lingerie, I fit all my clothes (shoes at the bottom, pants and shirts next, and even a few dresses I left on hangers neatly folded fit comfortably and the clothing came out of the bag on the ship without wrinkles. This bag is big enough and expands for lots of storage. I will be looking to buy the 20 inch smaller version to companion this on my trip to Europe this fall. No complaints, great bag (wheels on the base work perfect and are not defective as other reviewers have complained).

I got these when they had an extra 30% off sale, so I think I paid somewhere in the $7-8 range. What a deal! Really cute earrings, nice size for my ears (not too big, not too small). I actually purchased a few of this same design in different stone colors since I figured I could use them most every day. I am very happy with this purchase.

Got the two of these I ordered today (thanks Amazon Prime!). I love them. They will be perfect for my upcoming trip to Ireland. I had been in the market for a 'fanny pack' and came across these. Although the fanny pack might be good for miscellaneous things, I like the fact that these are waterproof and light and can be worn under clothes (so if anyone stole my pack or my pocketbook, I would have my money and passport hidden). I am very pleased indeed with this purchase.

I bought the entire set when Amazon was having their 20% off celtic jewelry sale (earrings, bracelet and pendant). What a great deal. Got a lot of compliments. Items are lovelier than they show in the picture and high quality for the price. Highly recommend!
Bright vibrant colors, only the top ran a little bit short in length. I would recommend.
I need a bag with many pockets.  This has 4 exterior zipped pockets and two interior.  Also, side pockets for phone and things needed quickly.  Love it.
My son liked the case for his I-pad and so the wallet was a present.  He was excited

I love it!

Love! Super comfy!

Perfect to pack up for travel. Bright blue is nice and visible. Would definitely recommend this jacket.

This was awesome to wear on the the cruise ship and was lighweight enough that I barely felt the heat.

Bought this for my cruise.  I was looking for something that wasn't huge but could still hold a decent amount of stuff.  I was able to fit (without it even flinching) my SeaPass and Cash in the back pocket, separate from everything else so I wouldn't loose it. Then, I was able to fit a full normal size bottle of sunscreen, lip balm, a smaller sunscreen, sunglasses, and lotion in the large pocket.  It never looked bulky and it was perfect.  The strap is too small in my opinion to go around your body but it could be done, I just didn't like it since I wanted the freedom of it being at my hip and off my shoulders. It held up great for 7 days and I'm expecting to be able to use it on all my vacations now.

Bought these as a replacement thanks to my dog destroying the first pair.  These were exactly like the pair I purchased 2 years ago.  Which to say, the quality on them is amazing. Wasn't paying attention that thought "New" meant that it was the new model year and not an entirely new design.  Glasses were fine, but it wasn't what I was looking for so they went back.  These are much smaller then the originals.

I attempted to wear them for one day and they immediately went back.  The heal felt higher then advertised and the material was stiff.  I only wore them for the time I was required and regretted every minute of it.

Literally, the only downfall was that the straps weren't adjustable.  It is super cute and comfortable.  I was looking for a bathing suit that wasn't going to cut into my neck.  I'm a 32D and this covered everything perfectly.  The straps were a little loose so laying out in the sun was the only issue I had with it.  I had to be a little mindful of how I was laying in case the straps had fallen but when walking around, it was comfortable and I didn't have any problems.

Purchased a 4 pack only needing three for our cruise.  I gave one to each of the people I was with and we have zero issues with them.  They are sturdy and very clear so we had zero issues with readability or having to worry if they were going to get torn off.

I'm 5'5 and 140lbs that normally wears 32D and this was a perfect fit.

I purchased to take on a cruise and I was looking for something that didn't wrinkle.  This is a PERFECT liquid nylon knit that is very easy to wash, dry and just throw into a suitcase. Just too hard to put on.  I tried several different methods to put them on, but my toes just don't want to cooperate.  I am not sure whose toes would, but I donated these immediately and purchased the same sock without toe holders.  Much happier with them.

These are a stretchy cotton mix. I do recommend going up a size.  After washing there was some shrinkage.  You could wear these out - but they look and feel like pajamas really.  The tie dye is a turquoise blue - I think fairly represented by the photos.

Nice fitting, easy wear shorts. Black nylon or like material. Washed and dried perfectly and quickly. The elastic waist does have a working drawstring should you need it. Seems true to size, no need to go up or down a size in my opinion. I have bigger thighs and I was glad the leg holes weren't tight. Nice depth to pockets. A zippered pocket on the back. I am happy with my purchase. Having said that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.
UPDATE... 8/30/22 - I ordered the 'turquoise' - it looks really nice and light in the photo - however - it is a VERY DARK teal. Just FYI. I would have preferred the lighter. But these shorts are really good.

High wasted nylon like material shorts - fits well - elastic waist with a draw string for extra snug fit if you need.  Washed and dried beautifully.  Great pockets with good depth.  I found the sizing to be accurate - meaning it is my opinion/experience you won't need to size up or down.  I have bigger thighs and I was glad that the legs were loose.  Overall I am pleased with my purchase - although I never hesitate to update my reviews if new info would seem useful.

I recently injured my knee and needed sometime easy to put to on and take off.  These are perfect.  They machined washed and dried (on low) beautifully.  No wrinkles and pockets!  They are a stretchy nylon like material - I wasn't sure I would like the material but it is sturdy and lightweight at the same time. I purchased the blue (close to navy), gray (charcoal) and black (dark) -  I used the sizing chart and they fit perfectly.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Recently had an injury and needed some non-skid socks - however, the "toe" portion of these socks are impossible to put on unless you are an acrobat.  I would not recommend these.  While the have non -skid material on the bottom - and they are technically socks - they are strictly for yoga or other folks who are able to bend their bodies into pretzels to get their toes in the individual toe sections. I donated these to local yoga instructor

I purchased these because after an injury I have to use a walker and I need to be careful not to slip.  These work perfectly.  Easy to slide on and off.  Sometimes I don't even use the straps and just pull them on like socks. Having said that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Now, if only I could get these WITHOUT polarization.  Eh.  Bad for my balance.  But the yellow lens are great for night driving.  Plastic lens and frames.  Having said that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

I have to buy 2 different sizes (polio when I was two) - and these were a good prime day deal.  I was happy the colors of the two different sizes were very good matches.  I would recommend purchasing 1/2 up.  They seem to fit a bit snuggly and even tho the leather will stretch some, you don't want your toes to be crunched.  Easy on and off.  Good grip on the ground for me.  Having said that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

The bag appears to be black leather - disappointed the straps were not leather but nylon straps.  Eh.  Has great side pockets - zippered enclosures. I had an injury that requires I use a cane and this seemed like a good option.  It's not super heavy, but you could over fill it. Overall it should work. Having said that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

I do like how the amber/yellow lens help with night driving.  I do wish they would NOT be polarized -but these are.  I am not a fan of nose pieces, but these are a little adjustable.  Over all they are not my favorites but will work.  Plastic like lens material.  Did not come with a sleeve or cover - but in a cardboard box.  Eh.  They are lightweight.

UPDATE BELOW - PLEASE read update for sizing info........I recently injured my knee (torn meniscus) and I needed some easy to pull on and off pants... these are AWESOME. I am 5'7" usually wear a 14/16 or 0x/1x. I purchased the xxl for the gray and black - I am going back for more and the navy but I will purchase the xl. The xxl will work but are a bit loose on the top. The pants have winning pockets (deep but not too deep and easy to get into), material is super soft and they are easy to pull on/off. The are soft like pajama pants, but don't look like pajamas. Totally appropriate to wear in public. They are the perfect length for me, hitting the tops of my feet. Machine washed and tumbled dried beautifully (on low). If you need a comfy, easy to wear pant for reasons as mine or just because - I think these are worth the try in my opinion.
UPDATE 10/29/22 - I actually went back and ordered the LARGE! It stays up. Especially when you have your cell phone in one of the pockets! But they are not tight at the waist - very comfortable at the waist. I am not super tall (5'7"), and they reach just below the ankle on me, which is perfect for me - but some over 5'7" may find them short. They are super soft and I am very pleased at how easily they wash and dry (on low) - no pilling so far. Lots of great color options. Wider legs - so if you have wider legs, they are flattering - no clinging. I am still a fan. I think if you're an apple or pear shape, you might try one size down. If you are more hour glass (me) - I would recommend trying 2 sizes down- unless you like a very loose fit and don't carry your cell phone in your pocket. I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful. For some reason our shopper ranks are no longer visible - so, to give you a little more info about me, I am a top 50 reviewer (#30 the highest rank achieved) - tho most recently #69 - which would have been top 100. Those numbers used to fluctuate over time - up and down but I noticed that they stopped updating regularly - perhaps to phase them out.  I've been doing reviews for over 25 years with Amazon - nearly 6,000 reviews, viewed over 50,000 times, nearly 24,000 likes. All of my reviews reflect my honest, personal experience with the reviewed item - your experience may be different. I am not influenced by any outside source.
