So I am returning due to the sizing issue, if I lose anymore weight at all it will be completely useless, also it doesn't serve the purpose I bought it for anyway so I won't re-order in a smaller size.

Size stats: I am 5'10" and a size 16 (size XL typically in tops and 16 pants). I ordered this in a size large due to many of the reviews stating that the dress runs pretty big and those people are absolutely right. I normally get an XL, sometimes even a 2X in dresses if the sizing is a bit off and a large in this fits me well.

For any tall people out there, this actually works pretty well as a dress, comes down to just a couple of inches above the knee. I even tried belting it and it was still long enough for me to feel comfortable wearing it as a dress. I don't think it is super flattering on my body though but it does seem like it would work pretty good for a nightgown instead, so I will keep it.
Got these for my daughter in a size small, she is about a juniors 5-7. The quality seems good, a thick fabric. The red color that I got isn't sheer at all. Would buy again when she grows out of them

I'm 5'10" and size 16, the XL in these fits really well. I got them in black and they are opaque, don't seem to show anything through at all. My only gripe about them is the crotch on them seems to hang weird on me, like I have to yank it up every so often which I tend to not have to do in other pairs that I have from a couple of different brands. This could just be how they fit on my particular body type. They are still good quality though and I continue to wear them. If I saw them on sale, I wouldn't hesitate to pick up another pair.

5'10" and a size 16 (sometimes 18 if I'm honest) and the XL fits well. Comes down to right above my knees and the fabric feels nice. I would definitely throw this in a lingerie bag and hang to dry if you remember to, I've only recently started doing this and have another similar nightgown (different brand though) that I never did that with and the lace on it is pretty beat up and likes to stick to itself. That isn't anything wrong with the item though, just basic care instructions for your clothes that I'm really just now following.

I didn't get to keep these due to them being too small but am still rating them based off of my experience with them. The sizing isn't an issue with the shoes, I'm really more of an 11.5 or even a 12 in some styles but wanted to try my luck with an 11 and they were just a bit too short.

Super comfortable though and I got them for a great price, wish I could keep them.

I'm actually an 11-11.5 in shoes, sometimes even a 12 in some styles but this size 11 fits me well. The shoes are really comfortable and I got them for a good price, any higher though (I paid around $25) than I don't think they would have been as great of a deal since the heel is made out of some cheapish feeling foam. I have wide feet, I could see where the fit at the toe strap could be an issue for anyone that doesn't have wide feet as well. The sole is nice and squishy.

I love the Oalka brand leggings. I have several pairs now of both the leggings and capri length and I've been impressed enough with the quality to buy about 6 pairs now.

I'm 5'10" and about a 16, I got these in XL and they fit very well. The fabric is nice and sturdy, really smooths you out while staying opaque. I'm pear shaped, so have a big butt and thighs but don't have problems with these sheering out and showing underwear underneath. I have purchased the black and also the space dye camo purple, space dye camo black and space dye charcoal. The solid colors do seem to be a thicker fabric than the prints but the prints are still great. The capri length come down to the same point on my leg as its pictured, so they don't run too short.

This bag is great, holds a ton of stuff and is sturdy. When you aren’t using it, it zips down into this compact size so it’s super easy to store. I bought one a couple of years ago and have used it multiple times. Was needing a second bag for a trip and came back to buy the exact same one.

Really handy for travel, overnight trips, the gym etc...

Only thing I would suggest is to have more colors, maybe a dark purple, dark green, etc...

I've now had this ring for almost a year. It has held up well, still shiny and has zero scratches. I wear it every single day and can be rough on my hands. It fits very comfortably. Was coming back to see if it was still available so I could order a smaller size due to losing weight so that should be a testament to how much I like it.

I had purchased a few different rings last year and this is the one I kept due to the nice, pure silver/white color it had. It wasn't yellowy or a darker gunmetal type color at all. Just a bright silver.

I ordered this in the navy blue, mostly because I really liked the contrast of the white buttons that it has in the photos. Well it came with matching buttons.

For the pros: It does fit well and pretty accurately. I'm 5'10 and a 16/18 in clothing right now, ordered this in an XL. It buttoned up fine and technically it does fit. The fabric is ok. It could stand to be a little thicker, but its not so thin that it will cause issues with sheerness. If needed, you can always just put on a light slip for the bottom.

Cons: I'm not sure how I'm going to make the bust area of this dress work. But it's really cute so I'm going to keep it and try. I'm a 38C and not very large at all. I have a broad chest but not particularly full. The point that I'm getting at is that I don't necessarily have a ton to cover, but there just needs to be a bit more fabric in the cups. Anyway that I tie it, I either get boob coming out the bottom near where it ties or out the top. I just wasn't expecting it to be quite so revealing. I'm going to work with it though and see if I can find a sticky bra that works or something like that. Also, if you aren't naturally pretty perky, its going to be a challenge to find a bra option that will get you sitting high enough for the chest to look flattering. There is no real support in the fabric. I think a big improvement would be to add some type of sewn in cups to the top, that would really help.

I'm a 16/18 and usually am an XL in tops but tend to size up if its long sleeved due to having long arms. I did that with this top and its huge. Super wide and arms are almost too long. I could have gone down 1 or maybe even 2 sizes in this.

I came across these as a lightning deal and decided to take a chance while on an ongoing search for good, OPAQUE, black leggings that aren't super thin. These are great. I got them in and could immediately feel a difference in quality between them and previous pairs I've purchased from other companies. The sizing is accurate, they hold their shape really well throughout the day and do a great job of feeling sturdy and secure. I've tried others before that are marketed as being "buttery soft" and whatever, and they are useless if you are someone that needs a pair to actually feel like something you would be comfortable walking outside of your house in. They don't stretch and sheer out across the butt and they aren't so thin that they show whatever you are wearing underneath. After wearing and washing once, I came back and bought another pair right away.

I would buy them again at full price. I'm 5'10" and the length on these is fine, not too short at all. A size 16/18 in pants and an XL fit. They are a bit tight (which is my fault) but they still fit. If they had a size up, I would buy them again in that size, but the current size does work well enough for me.

*UPDATE* I've washed these twice and they have gone crappy. Pilled up like crazy, fabric isn't opaque at all. Like bad enough that you can't wear these in public. And this isn't a matter of being delusional about my size and trying to stuff my body into too small clothes. These are plus size leggings and the fabric is just bad and not thick enough. These are fine still to wear around the house or for layering under jeans since they fit close enough, but that's about it really. Knocking the rating down to 3 stars from 5.

--These are exactly what I was wanting. I'm 5'10" and a size 16/18 and they fit well. Have a big butt and thighs but they still fit well enough to be relatively high waisted on me, they are high enough to help smooth out a baby gut at least. They are long enough for me as well. The fabric is thick and feels comfortable to wear under a long top since it helps to smooth things out. If these wash well, I'm going to buy a few more pairs for sure. My one complaint is that I wish the fabric was just a bit thicker so it was a tiny bit more opaque. But they are fine right now. If they shrink or don't wash well, then I will update the review.

I'm 5'10" and a size 16/18, this review is from someone who doesn't have much experience wearing leggings as pants, so my standards of what I feel comfortable in are pretty high.

Pros: these did fit, they were long enough on me which I was surprised by. I'm not sure if there would be any shrinkage after washing because I am returning these. The fabric was pretty soft and relatively opaque. No hanging strings, holes, etc... good enough quality for the price.
Cons: the fabric is too thin for me to feel comfortable enough in to wear out in public personally. Now this is due to the fact that I've got a big butt and thighs, and these offer zero control or smoothing really. They don't advertise to be smoothing/slimming/control etc... so this isn't exactly a complaint against the product, it is just the reason that I am returning them. Even with a long top on that covers my backside, I still feel kind of exposed in these.
If I had a use for them, these would be great for layering on a cold day, they are smooth and thin enough to fit under jeans, or I would be fine with bumming around the house in them. But that isn't why I bought them.

I love the color and got a great price in my size, but something about New Balance shoes always has them run super narrow on me. I can wear a size 11-11.5 normally in other shoes, I ordered this in a 12B (was cheaper than smaller size) and they are really tight. I think I can stretch them out though and I like the style and color enough to want to make them work. If you have relatively wide feet though, I would consider that when choosing your size.

I will rank this 5 stars because the sizing was accurate and it looked just like the picture. I am returning it though, I just didn't like how it looked on my body. I ordered my clothing size in this and it was pretty spot on. I'm typically an XL top and 16 in pants. The bottoms especially fit great and came up high enough to contain that lower belly pooch and were comfortable. My one complaint would be that the bust runs a tiinnny bit small, in my opinion. It would have been fine if I kept it but just a bit tight. I'm a 38C/40D (depending on my current weight) and it fit and I was contained well, but I would be hesitant if your chest is larger than that.

I took a chance on ordering this suit because there were no reviews yet on the sizing and quality, but it ended up great. We all know how swimsuit sizing can go when ordering online, but this one was spot on. I'm 5'10" and right at a size 16 and the length was just fine. The color matched the picture as well. I am going to be returning it though, the style in the picture is pretty but it just isn't my style. Plus I ordered another one at the same time that makes me look smaller (if I'm being honest with myself) that I like just as well. If I swam more or wasn't working on trying to lose weight, then I would have kept this one too though.

Due to the great price I found in my size, I ended up buying three pairs of these shoes. I returned one, that was just due to me not liking the look of black patent on them though. I kept the pairs I ordered in blue and white though to go with spring and summer dresses and skirts that I have, trying to dress up my wardrobe a bit so I dont rely on flip flops all the time.

I rank these as running somewhat small, but not terribly so. I am about an 11.5 in shoes, kind of wide. I bought these in a 12 because they were available (which is not super common for this size) and I didn't want the issue of my toes possibly going over the front (not a cute look), and I'm glad I did because they fit perfectly for me. So I would say maybe go half a size up and order direct from Amazon or a seller that has free returns so you can easily send back if the sizing doesn't work out for you.

My one negative, and this is due to my weird toes more than anything, is that my second to last toe has a habit of poking out the side of one of the straps. But not a big deal .

I haven't worn these for an extended period of time, but then I typically don't wear dressy shoes for long. I just don't have many occasions that call for it. But for the short amounts of time that I have worn them, they've been pretty comfortable for me.

Not much to say about these, they are nude flats. The sizing is very accurate and I got them for a great price. If I wore flats more often, then I wouldn't hesitate to come back and get these in other colors. My one negative is that in the picture, the nude shade has a bit of a pinky tone to it. But in real life, it leans more warm, has more of a yellowish tone. Not a big deal, its just one of those issues that comes up with buying a nude shade like this and the differences in computer screens. They still work for what I need them for.

For reference, I am 5'10" and currently a size 16, a 38C cup. I bought this in a 2x and it just barely fits me. Well I should clarify, it does not fit me like it should, but I can make it work for what I need it for.

If you are above average height or have a long torso, I would be wary of this, its runs kind of short. I have to yank it up to get it to come high enough for me to cover my bust, and even then it still isn't quite high enough to look great at the top. I bought it for a wedding dress though that has a pretty structured top with cups built in, so it wasn't going to be an issue for me. But for others, it definitely would. I agree with others that say the cups run small also. I spill out the sides of it.

Now for the positive, this really sucks you in. Without it, I have a small amount of extra fabric along the waistline of the dress. With it, it almost works too well for me, I would say I have about 3-4 inches of loose fabric now. Like it borders on making me wish I had the extra time to see if I could get the dress taken in a bit, it works that well. With the way that this bodysuit is designed, it really helps to pull me in right at my natural waistline and does a nice job of smoothing in other places. I just wish I could get it in a size up to possibly rectify the length issue.

This ring is beautiful. Great amount of sparkle without seeming like its too much. The texture of it isn't super rough, doesn't snag on fabric. I ordered 4 different titanium and tungsten carbide bands and this is the one I chose to keep.

I'm 5'10" and wear a size 16, 38C cup. I ordered this in a size 2X just to make sure that it wouldn't be too small, thinking that I might have to return it for an XL since that is my usual size, but I'm glad I went with the bigger since it just barely fits. It will work for what I need it for and I am in the process of losing weight, so I will keep it.

The only downside for me (other than it being a bit too tight) is that it is short. I think that is pretty obvious in the picture though, but since I am tall, it is REALLY short on me, it comes to about mid thigh, and it has slits in the side that go up to right below the butt almost. I actually think the deep slits though will work out in my benefit. Since it is kind of tight, I can imagine that this will wiggle and migrate up on my legs and cause me to have to pull it back down and arrange it. But since the slits allow some freedom with leg movement, I think it will actually help with that.

Overall I am pleased with it. I don't have any prior experience with wearing slips under dresses but I figured it was time for me to mature up my wardrobe a bit and for the price that I paid, which was around $9, I will use it.

This dress was on sale as a lightning deal for about $18 and now I am regretting not buying it in green also. I ordered it in XL and it fits well. I am 5'10'', 38C cup and 36in waist and the fit of this was pretty accurate.

The length is nice on it, it comes down to about an inch above my knee and the fabric has a nice weight to it, that causes it to drape and swing well. It is a tiny bit shiny, but I'm not too concerned, I don't think it makes it look cheap or anything.

The only thing that I would change about this dress is the v neck on it, it is really quite deep. But that is apparent in the photos so it wasn't a surprise. I tend to wear camisoles under dresses anyway, so unless you want to have a lot on display, layering it or just pinning it works well.

I think the usual price of this is pretty good too, it seems to be between $20-26. If I had a shortage of dresses or was wanting to build my wardrobe, then I would be fine paying full price for it. That isn't the case for me though. If it were to drop again, I would definitely pick it up in the green and black color for sure.

I was fully expecting to have to return this due to it being too small, but I love the style of these button up shirt dresses, and with it being Prime, I figured I would take the chance on it.

I am 5'10" and a 38C, my waist is about 36 inches. I ordered this in an XL and thought that it would probably be too short on me and too small in the waist and across the chest, but the cut and elasticized waist in this dress is surprisingly forgiving. It fits just right on me. The chest and arms fit well, there is no pulling or gapping in the buttons and there isn't any exposure of bra straps or the side of a bra in the arm hole area. The length is nice on me as well, it came down to about an inch above my knees.

The only cons about this is the fabric, it is pretty thin and a tiny bit on the sheer side. But as long as you aren't wearing contrasting underclothes it shouldn't be an issue, or stick a slip under it and it will be just fine. The print is a bit iffy, but it was not misrepresented by the picture, it does look just like the close up photo that shows the details, so that was my overlook by not checking the other pictures available. The belt that comes with it is your usual run of the mill, cheapy belt. But if you don't have many belts and want to visually pull in your waist, then it is a nice addition.

Overall I think the price could come down a few bucks. It was $20 when I purchased it and I'm OK with paying that since I am really happy with the fit of it. I don't think I would buy more though unless I catch one of the other colors on sale. If it was around $10-$15, I would pick up another color or two.

UPDATE: 6/7/17 Part of me wants to knock a star off after I washed it, but I feel like that may be a mess up on my end. Especially for letting someone else do the laundry when there was a new item in it, not sure if it got washed on cold or warm. But it shrank. I technically can still wear it, it fits. But it really is too short for me to comfortably wear it out. It went from about an inch above my knee to like 3 inches, so it is a significant difference. Especially on me since I'm so tall. On someone more of an average height, this might not be a problem. Part of me wants to re-purchase in another color and make sure to handwash it or something since I do like the dress. But I don't want to drop more money on it if there is a chance of it shrinking again. Too bad I can't size up to account for shrinkage. So it's still a nice dress, but keep the shrinkage in mind and make absolutely sure to follow the care instructions.

Just got this in today and I'm impressed. I'm always hesitant to order stuff this like online because of sizing issues but this was spot on. I ordered an XL and am a size 16 right now and the fit was great. Not too clingy through the stomach and the top fit well. I'm 5'10" and it came about 2 inches or above my knees. Nice weight to the fabric, doesn't feel overly cheap. Now I'm wanting to buy a bunch of others in lighter colors, which I am typically very cautious about since I'm self concious of how clothes look across my mid section, but this isn't too tight at all.

I purchased these for my 9 yr old. She is about a size 3-4 in kids still, but can wear a size 5 in womens in flip flops. So I bought her a size 5, thinking she could wear these next summer also and they are really small. She can't wear them at all now.

If you are a between sizes, I would personally size up on these. Im a size 11-11.5, depending on the shoe and have a relatively wide foot. I don't require wide width shoes, but they are nice to have sometimes. I have another pair of crocs sandals in a size 11 and they fit great so I figured these would be the same. They just ended up way too small for me. I'd say a half size-whole size too short and the foot bed was too narrow. Having your feet overhang your sandals is never a cute look, so I gave them to someone who wears a size 10. The quality of them was nice and I got them for pretty cheap when Amazon had a sale on Crocs. They were cheap enough that I wasn't worried about returning them.

I was looking for nightgowns that had a defined cup area/something to keep a chest in check and I decided to give this a try since it looked decently supportive. I lucked out by finding a color variation in my size that was much less than the rest. I paid $11 and change for it and honestly? the gown is just fine, but I wouldn't pay more than that for it.

The Pros: the chest section is made out of this stretchy, relatively soft lace. Im actually a size 16-18 right now and usually get an XL in nightgowns, I took a chance on a Large in this though since it was pretty cheap and the sizing worked out great for me. Im a 38C cup, and the fabric does a good job of keeping things front and center. If you have boobs, you know what I mean by that. This was the main thing I was looking for in a nightgown, so for that alone, I will rate this 5 stars. If you are wanting something with coverage though, this isn't for you. It's very sheer.

The Cons: This just looks cheap. I got it in pink and the material is very shiny. I saw that the other colors are ranging from $35 to about $48 and I can't believe that anyone would pay that much for this nightgown. No way. The material in the body of the gown is also pretty sheer as well, but you can see that from the picture. It is kind of a weird combination, between the see through lace on the chest and sheer, shiny fabric and the length of it, its like it can't decide what style it wants to be. Its a demure length with sexy elements to it. I'm 5'10" and it comes to the bottom of my kneecaps, so it's pretty long. It just seems like it should be shortened a bit or something. There is just an odd feeling about the style. But overrall I am happy with it. If the other colors were as low as the first one I bought, I would pick up a couple more. But not unless the price dropped significantly.

Whoever is manufacturing and calling this a "swim suit" should be ashamed of themselves. It's bad. All of the reviews that mention that this is not made of your typical swimsuit material are dead on. This is made out of some thin, super cheap feeling polyester type fabric. It has none of the typical stretch or snap back that a swimsuit has. I have no doubt that if I were to get this wet, it would get real droopy. The reviews that say that it is made out of swimsuit material either must be getting product from a different seller or have no clue what swimwear is normally made out of. Mine came from the seller Prograce, I don't know if there are other suppliers or not.

I saw the negative remarks but still ordered, hoping that I would luck out, but this is going to have to be returned.

The top is cute. But not wearable. I think the only way that I could make the top work would be to insert some bra cups into it (it has zero support built in and it's not stiff or stretchy enough to do much either) and I would probably also have to use tape as well because it is open enough in the middle that if your boobs shift at all, you are going to have some serious exposure problems. Without any alterations to it, there is no way that I personally could wear this.

The bottoms are bad. The strap attached to it is much thinner than what is pictured. You have to arrange it to get it to lay flat and then don't move. Once you start moving, it will shift around and roll up. And it isn't too small for me either. The strap and material are just too thin to lay right.

Really the only positive I can say about this is that the color was good. It closely matched the picture.

For reference, I ordered the 2x in army green. I'm 5'10 and wear a size 16 and am a 38C. The top was a tiny bit big, I could have sized down on that but have a big butt and hips, so the bottoms were a good fit.

This dress fit as expected. I am 5'10" and it came right to my knees. I returned it just because I found something else I liked more and had no reason to keep this as well. If I had an occasion to keep a white lace dress to use in the future, I would have had no problem with doing that.

I'm 5'10" and wear a 16/18 right now and got this in an XL and it fits great. It comes a few inches above my knees but since it's a nightgown, I don't think its too short. I haven't washed it yet so hopefully it doesn't shrink too badly.
For as cheap as it was, this is surprisingly nice. I'm 5'10" and wear a 16/18 right now and got this in an XL and it fits great.
For as cheap as it was, this is surprisingly nice. I'm 5'10" and wear a 16/18 right now and got this in an XL and it fits great.

I would say that this fits as expected, maybe runs a bit small but not by much. It was wishful thinking that I could fit my body and D cups into this anyway. I physically could get it on but it didn't look good at all. I'm 5'10 and a 16/18 right now and it was just too tight, I got it in an XL. If you are not in that large of a size and have a smaller chest, i'd say it would work fine.
A great ring, its very thin and dainty and light on my hand, I love it

I wanted to love these sandals. I liked the design and the straps hold them to your feet so they don't make that constant slapping noise that flip flops usually make. And as far as flip flops go, they are comfortable. But the issue is that for some reason, they don't hold to my feet right so they are constantly getting pushed out the back and I'm having to stop every so often to scoot my foot back in it. It's frequent enough that I don't even really consider wearing them for anything that would take more than an hour, its that annoying to have to constantly readjust them.

I got these for my 8 year old and she loves them. Has been wearing them all the time since we got them and hasn't had any issues with blisters or the straps rubbing in spots. They are easy to clean too and so far have been holding up pretty well.

Ordered this on sale, took a chance because there were no other reviews and shouldn't have wasted my time. I'm 5'10" and this just barely covered what it needed to in the back. Unless you are relatively short, this is more of a tunic. I'm a size 16, 40D cup and ordered the 1x/2x and the chest was tight. The band that is supposed to hit right below your bust, like an empire waist, really came mid bust and just looked and felt  awkward. If it was long enough though, I would have kept the dress and made it work because it is really pretty. The only reason I am giving it two stars is because it was a beautiful green color, looks just like the picture and the embroidery is nice. It would be a great dress for someone really petite.

This arrived and it looked just like the picture. The quality was good for the price, however when I opened the plastic bag it was stored it, it had this horrible smell. It was almost like rotten fish or something. Thankfully I got it a day earlier than when I needed it, I stuck it in a grocery bag with a bunch of baking soda overnight to absorb the scent and shook it out the next day and it was fine.

Put these on a birthday wish list and was pleased to receive them. They are a great size, not too big or small and have nice sparkly to them. A VERY light green color, more of a green tint than anything, looks very close to the picture

I was really hesitant to purchase these due to the iffy reviews on the other styles that are carried by this company, seemed that the sizing was very "off" for them. So after about 2 months of sitting on my wishlist I decided to go for it. I'm normally a size 8 in underwear or L/XL, depending on the style and ordered an XL on these. Like I said, I was really hesitant since they said to order a size up and i'm pretty much on the cusp between L and XL, but these actually fit pretty well. The material is a lot better than I was expecting and they aren't too tight. It does not cover as much of the back as I was expecting, but that is due more so to my butt size than the undies, lol. Only real complaint is the color variety. I got 2 pairs of dark pink/purple. 1 pair of BRIGHT yellow, 1 pair of a lighter hot pink. 2 pairs of a turqiouse blue, 2 pair of heather gray, 2 pair of white and 2 pair of this peachy color. The color's are ok, just wish it had more variety and not so many repeated colors, maybe a pair of black, red and green mixed in or something. But really for the price, it's a pretty good deal

Just ordered these when it was a lightning deal for about 8 bucks, got them the next day. Nice size, not too big to be overly showy or too small to be unsubstantial and they look very similar, a nice match and color. Put them in immediately and I can't even feel them, really comfortable after wearing them for a few hours
Dress was gorgeous but the top was  huge. Daughter is not small chested and it was still crazy big
My son likes a loose fit.
Just lie the pictures and arrived quickly!
The sweatshirt is great soft and comfortable. Ordered a medium for my daughter because she wanted it to be oversized for a Halloween costume but it fit more like a small.

Nice blouse, sheer but not overly, fit true to size for me. Only minus was it was extremely wrinkled when it arrived, I hate ironing. But it is fine now that I've ironed it. I ordered a large and I'm 5'7" tall and about 135lbs. if that helps with the sizing, I'm not big in the chest 38" around and a C cup.
It's a nice T shirt, though I prefer a heavier material, this is really soft and slightly larger than expected. I love the design. I'd buy another
Bought to use at the beach as a swimsuit cover. Will work great...
I actually bought these to make a flower arrangement garden decor in. Love them so cute am adding to my garden decor.
I bought a boat last fall, this hat is gonna be my captains hat! I love it, it was a little pricey for a ball cap, but hey sometimes ya just gotta have it.
Love the colors, it's pretty much just like the picture and the size runs true. I'm 5'7" 140lbs and a c cup, I ordered the large, it fits just fine.

I love love these shoes, so comfy, slip on and go, cute with dresses, jeans, shorts and cropped pants. I ordered a pair and as soon as I got them and wore for a day I came home and ordered another pair in a different color.
Love these socks, so comfy. Not too thick, not too thin. wear them all the time. Good value, will buy again, arrived pretty quickly too.
It's a nice sleeveless top, not fancy, but comfy. I am 5'7" tall and about 140 lbs. bought the large, it is a little loose but I prefer loose clothing.
Love these hats for my cowboy inspired welcome wreaths. My customer's love them too! I've had people buy two or three of these at a time. I add a hat band to them...
Cute cowboy hat, use them in my country cowboy style wreaths.
Cute and comfy shorts, wear them around the house and sometimes even go out for errands in them.

This is a really attractive watch.  Has a gold dial and the center circle has a subtle polka dot appearance.  The dial face is approximately 1 3/8" wide, so it is slightly oversized, but not huge.  I love the eco-drive solar energy function; being free of batteries and the need to replace them is wonderful.  This watch features both date and 24-hour dials and they are easy to set.  The watch is a little heavier than a regular Citizens women's watch and weighed 2.7 ounces as compared to 2.3 ounces for my other watch (Citizens EW1854-57D.)  The watch face case is also slightly deeper at 3/8" versus 1/4" (again compared to the Women's Citizens EW1854-57D.)  The crystals that surround the dial add some bling without being too over the top.  All in all a lovely watch.  I would have given it five stars if it had been thinner and not quite as heavy.

I am full-figured and usually always wear an underwired bra - have for years.  I purchased this 6-hook front close support bra after tearing my right rotator cuff.  Trying to fasten my regular bra behind my back was near impossible and painful!  I have to say, this Glamorise MagicLift bra does the job!  It is super easy to put on and fasten and has two sets of hooks for some tightness control.  There is a built in support strap at the bottom of the cups which does a good job of supporting the ladies.  My one complaint with this bra is the elastic strap at the bottom.  It makes the bra longer, has a tendency to roll up and I think the bra would have been fine without it.  That being said, I would both recommend and purchase this bra agaion.

I find the Birkenstock Gizeh style overall runs a little small as compared to the Arizona and Florida styles.  I have medium width feet, (not wide) but on me, the Gizeh are definitely narrower and I had to size up one size for length also.  I take a 39 in Arizona and Florida but needed a 40 in the Gizeh and even then, I have them buckled on the last hole in the strap.  If my feet were any wider, they wouldn't fit at all!  This is my first pair of Gizeh and they are comfortable (although I haven't worn them out of the house yet) but I probably would not purchase this style again. If your foot is a little chunky, I'd try a different style.

I recently purchased these in the turquoise color and wore them for the first time yesterday.  I wore them all day, barefoot, and my feet were perfectly comfortable all day.  They are really cute, the heel height is good, they have a nice built-in arch support.  I would highly recommend these to anyone who is looking for a foot-loving, dressy summer sandal.  These can go casual or more formal and they are available in some really great color choices too.  I'll be ordering another pair soon!  [[ASIN:B00DZL234C Dansko Women's Dana Dress Sandal]]

Ordered these in an 8-1/2 for my mom who wears an 8-1/2 or 9.  They are very nice slippers and seem to be good quality and well made, but they were much too large for her ... at least 1/2 a size too large (could fit an entire finger behind the heel.)  I have returned them and the vendor promptly issued a refund (which I appreciate.)  However, it cost over $12 to return ship these slippers (about half of the entire cost) and, in addition, this vendor charges a 20% restocking fee, so I definitely lost money on this purchase (and she still has no slippers.)  I rated these four out of five stars because the slippers seem to be a good product.  Received them fairly quickly and the vendor promptly refunded my purchase (even before receiving the slippers back), but I am not a fan of restocking fees and actually would have just liked to exchange them for a smaller size.  I would rate the vendor slightly less than four stars.

They are mid calf length and have a side zipper which allows easy access, a plus.  I have a pretty high arch, and found these fairly easy to get on and off.  They are warm and snug and feel good to walk in.  I wear a size 10 (Euro 41) and purchased these in a size 42 and they fit just fine.

I purchased the Dansko Dani strappy sandals to wear at a semi-formal (daytime) event because they are comfortable but still dressy in appearance because of the straps (and they came in a pretty medium blue.)  The first time I put them on I was able to wear them for hours without any discomfort  - which you can't say about many shoes!  The heel is a fairly low 1-1/2", so they are great for walking and standing.  I have a medium width foot and found these to fit well.  I am now hoping to find these in crimson!  Highly recommend.

Be aware if you have no choice in sizes, the ones I got seem to be a true size 7.

This is reasonably priced for what you get, but there are better sets that you can get for about the same price that come in wooden storage boxes.  This is packed in cardboard, so makes it look cheap, so maybe not something you would want to use for a nice gift.  If you are getting it to use for yourself, it should be okay, but I would suggest getting a nicer set that will hold up better and last longer.  There are plenty of cheap silver sets available; this one is probably no better or no worse than any other.  The spoon sizes were a little weird; didn't seem to be standard sized, so that could be bothersome to you.  My wife took a quick look at it, but did not like the set very much.

This is indeed a very thin wallet, but I might not have ordered it had I realized that it only holds 8 credit cards.  I need a wallet that holds more than that, as I bank at 2 banks and that's 2 debit cards; then I have 2 primary credit cards and a backup card, my AAA membership, my national parks pass, my VA Card, driver's license, insurance card and a couple other cards that I need to carry.  That is well more than 8.  Also I like a wallet with a loose change "purse", which this does not have.  For most people, this might be adequate and it is nice that it is so thin, even with 8 cards and some cash in it.  The RFID blocking is a big plus too and almost a necessity these days.  If you have no more than 8 cards, including ID that you need to carry, don't need a change purse and you don't want to stuff your pocket with a big wallet, this is ideal.

This is an absolutely gorgeous watch that looks much more expensive than it is.  It has a nice large, readable dial and I especially like the fact that it has actual numbers for the hours; not just tick marks as many watches do.  The looks and features make it hard not to like this watch.  It has a day of the week dial, a chronograph and a 60 second dial in addition to the large second sweep hand, which you can shut off if you want just the smaller dial.  There is also day of the month.  The crowns screw down in place to make the watch waterproof.  Unfortunately the watch comes with a very thin manual that doesn't tell you much about how to set it.  I couldn't quite figure out the function of the two push button crowns above and below the main setting crown.  I had to go online and do some searching and finally found the instructions for setting the day of the month.  I have not yet been able to find out how to set the day of the week; instructions I found online did not seem to work.  Other than lack of documentation, the only other problem with this watch is the weight.  It weighs in at 9 ounces.  That may not seem like much, but it is over 1/2 a pound and it feels very heavy on your wrist.  It's just too heavy for me.  If you are a big husky person, it might not be a big deal, but if you are average size it is a big, bulky watch.  It is not a watch for wimps.  Comes in a nice case.  Probably well worth the price and an otherwise wonderful watch if you can find instructions on setting it and can deal with the weight.  Would make an elegant gift.

This is a very thin and quite attractive wallet that appears to be all leather.  The quality looks good.  This only holds about 6 credit cards and one ID; that's okay if that's all you have or less.  The RFID feature is a big plus, because apparently these days they have equipment that can read your credit card information just by walking by and aiming at your pocket. The RFID prevents this.  I have always liked wallets that included a change pouch, but this one doesn't have it.  I only gave it 3 stars because of the limited number of cards you can carry in it and the lack of a place for change.  This might be ideal for you if you want a credit card only wallet with the RFID protection.

This is a somewhat expensive suitcase at around $200, but if you travel a lot, it is probably well worth it.  Why?  The wheels are the number one thing.  I have used a lot of different wheeled suitcases, but the cheaper ones have wheels that don't work that well or sometimes can break.  The quality wheels are the first thing I noticed about this suitcase.  They spin around so they go the direction you want to go, which is far better than "fixed" wheel models.  The wheels are substantial and sturdy too.  The zippers on the suitcase are also very sturdy and large, unlikely to jam or break, as less expensive zippers might.  The retractable handle also appears to be well made.  I have had suitcases where the handle was very wobbly once it was fully extended.  That's not a problem with this suitcase.  Roomy inside with several zippered pockets.  Overall a very well made suitcase that should last a long time, unless you get baggage handlers that really beat up on it.  Even with rough handling, it does look like it would handle quite a bit of abuse.

This is an absolutely gorgeous luxury watch and would make a wonderful gift.  It appears that at the moment the price is just over $100, marked down for $695.  I would hate to pay $695 for this or any watch, but it is a luxury watch and well worth $100 or more.  It came running with the battery installed, so all I had to do is set the time and date, both which are easy to set.  Good instructions are included.  Comes in a nice case too.  I knocked off one star on my review for the weight of the watch.  On my scale it weighed 6.2 ounces.  That doesn't sound like much, but it is a very heavy watch.  Just 1.8 ounces more would be 1/2 pound. Imagine carrying 1/2 pound weight on your wrist all day.  Of course the weight makes it a very durable watch.  It looks very well constructed and could not be easily broken.  It is supposed to be water resistant too, which is a plus too.  These days with so many electronics devices available, a watch just isn't all that necessary, so this is really more of a piece of jewelry than a necessity for telling time.  Of course it does also have a stop watch on it with several functions.  The day of the month also appears on the watch, but no month or day of the week.  If you want a showy watch without spending a fortune, this will do the trick.  It is expensive looking, without being overly expensive to buy, as long as the price is stays at just over $100.  If you ever wanted a really nice luxury watch, I wouldn't hesitate to buy this, as it is not cheap looking in any way.  As long as you can deal with the weight, you'll like the look of this watch.

These pajamas have a very nice feel; very comfortable.  You can't beat real silk.  If you want luxurious pajamas, these are for you.  This is the large size, which I thought would fit me, but the pants are too long.  I am 5'7", which I guess is short by today's standards (people are getting taller).  These will fit well for someone who is 5'10" to about 6'2" or so.  Also the shirt seemed a bit too roomy as well, so if you are a large person, it should fit perfectly.  Even though the pants are long, they could probably be easily shortened without compromising the integrity.  The only real problem is the care instructions.  You have to wash this in cold water.  Instruction also say "dry only".  I don't what that means, unless it means "dry clean only", but then it wouldn't say wash in cold water.  Maybe it means to air dry it, rather than in the dryer.  Hardly anyone washes by hand these days, so it depends on whether you want to deal with caring for a delicate fabric.

I bought some of these previously from a nearby store and they quickly became my favorite undies. The fabric is SO soft on your skin, and the fitting was perfect. In the original sets I purchased there were no quitter elastic bands here, these things are wonderful and stay on well, and they don't become loose or misshapen from all the laundry cycles, nor do they shrink.

Well, I just bought four packs off Amazon, excited to bring more of these soft undies into my collection and rotate old undies out. Except, these are MUCH smaller than the other ones I already own, which is really strange. You can see the printed information on the inside of the underwear, same size and everything lines up. Then why do I feel like a blood sausage when wearing them? Side by side these new ones are considerably smaller.

I am being squeezed by them so badly that my hips feel pinched and uncomfortable as the fabric shifts lower during wear (constantly, despite my tugging back up). The front rides even lower on my abdomen and the thick waist band does not hold them up very well. I am not sure why they changed their template and the amount of fabric they use for my size, but they definitely changed something. I would return them had I not washed them all and worn some. If you buy them, consider going a size up and make sure to try them on before washing in case they don't fit.

Because of this, I think you would need to provide maintenance to your shoe to keep them from getting sweaty inside if you sweat a lot when running or walking in them.

When I first received mine, I went on a hike for an afternoon and it was an amazing experience to be able to be so much more in connection with the ground and steps and such. My feet never get hurt or tired in these, or worse, feel pinched or compressed. Perfect fit. I will definitely be buying another set just for comfort, because they are that cozy! This is such a beautiful top! I got the teal color with pink, yellow and white flower design. It is a nice vibrant color pattern. It is a soft, silky and nicely stretchable material of 95% rayon and 5% spandex. The fit is great and it doesnt cling tight on you. Has a nice flow movement. The short sleeves are not too short, which I like because I hate sleeves that constantly curl up the arm. The body length is great too. Must line dry, not put in the dryer.

Wow you could hurt someone if you hit them wearing this ring lol. The design on it is so very easy to see and made well. My only concern is with the horns on the viking hat because they do stick out away from the ring and might be easy to catch on things like clothing.. That could hurt your finger, or worse..but it looks so cool. By the size of this, I would definately say it is  not for a woman to wear. It looks nice on a shelf.. The detailing is done very well. Nice for any skull or viking collector.

This is a beautiful bracelet. It can be worn by a man or woman. It is not too thick or thin. There is a nice weight to it since it is metal. It is a shiney black and gun metal color combo. The beads look like little hexagon shaped nuts. The clasp closes nice and easy. Seems to be a good quality clasp as well. This comes in a nice matte black box with the designers name on it..then inside is a little draw string burlap bag that holds the bracelet. This would make a great gift as well for any occasion.
These fit so nicely. I have changed my son over to these after wearing other types. He likes the fact that they dont curl up on his legs. The material is soft and stretchy...fit is good.

My grson loves these. They look like a regular skinny jeans not a sweat pant. There are so many pockets in them. The larger ones on the outside have a smooth zipper closure. The material is nice and soft yet very good quality. Easy tie waisteline. They are the perfect length as well.

These are nice because of the longer length, they dont curl up on your legs. The material is soft, stretchy and feel silky. They breath easy and dont give you the sweats. Waist band fits well and not tight.
These are so nice. They are a soft stretchy material that fits well. Very comfy to wear and the legs do not roll up like some can. These are a good quality underwear.
These are so nice. They are a soft stretchy material that fits well. Very comfy to wear and the legs do not roll up like some can.

I love this shirt! It is a very comfortable, thin and very stretchy material. It doesnt cling to the body at all as its more of a free flowing silky material.  The length of the body and sleeves is nice and long. In the winter it might be better to wear a sweater or tee shirt with it because its that kind of material that when there is a cool draft, you will feel it on the shirt. But Im not saying thats a bad thing, just commenting my opinion. I really enjoy wearing this shirt.

These are so soft. I love the big pockets it has. It is comfortable to wear but I had to get used to the thicker waist band. The leg length comes right around the ankle. The size could be just a bit bigger. It is a nice lightweight stretchy material that would be wonderful for summer spring or fall wear. The black is like a dark charcoal.
This comes in a very nice box, with a velvet pouch that holds the bracelet. It is a good sturdy weight for a mans wrist. The metal color is very nice as well. Great for gift giving or for yourself.
For the xxxl mans size, this is very tight. It doesnt stretch much either. The pant length is very long. The colors and picture print is very pretty .

I love how this shirt fits. It seems to run bigger so it doesnt cling to your body. Very soft and stretchy silky material. Can be worn for dress up with the right jewelry as well as casual every day wear.

I love this shirt. It is so roomy and doesnt cling to the body. It does seem to run bigger and I love that! It is a thin ( but not in a bad way) silky stretchy material. The sleeves and the body length are nice and long as well. Can be dressed up with some nice jewelery for going out as well as casual wear.

This is a very comfortable thin shirt. It hangs nicely. The length is great. The sleeves are just a bit too long so I just cuffed them over twice lol. I love the color and that it has 2 pockets!  Would love to get more colors.

This is a great design in wallets. The extra card slots do not make it big and bulky, even when full. Cards come out easy and slid in easy. Has a lot of storage spaces. This is the perfect gift . The only issue I have is the zipper for the change area. When it gets to where the buckle to close wallet is, it hesitates almost like it sticks there. I have zipped it back and forth to try to loosen it up but it still happens. It hasnt caught on anything yet.
This is a very cute necklace for any cat lover. The colors are very bright. The chain looks nice.
Very warm socks. Material is not thick and heavy but its good. Soft and comfy to wear all day
This is a nice soft stretchy tee shirt. Fits as expected

This is a very nice rain jacket for the out doorsman. It is a very sturdy ,thick, stretchy material that wont tear easy..no matter how hard you pull on it. Very comfortable. Pockets are in just the right spots .

This is a nice small blue purse. Its great for a few credit cards, drivers liscence, small wallet and a cell phone. The material is nice, not cheap looking. Great for a night out or special occasion. Great first purse for a young lady!! Comes in a plastic bag to protect it in shipment. Shoulder strap has a chain on each end that makes it nice to look at.
This tee shirt is soft and stretchy like they should be. The big cat head/face on the front is so cute and printed dark and clearly.
Nice thin dressy socks. They are the normal height, just above the ankle. They come in a nice gift box. Soft and stretchy.

These are 3 identical pattern rings. They are a nice gold color that doesnt look cheap. They are true to size. They look nice no matter how many you wear at a time. They are very light weight. They come in a nice white ring box that makes them perfect for gift giving too.

This is such a cute box. It looks like a little suit case. It came in a plastic bag that was shipped in a thicker plastic envelope. That didnt protect it enough because when I unzipped the back part, the mirror was broken. I wasnt too happy about that. The rest of the box is nice. It has a zipper around one top,then you flip it over and unzip anther section. For being as small as it is, it can hold quite a lot of pieces.
These gloves are not thick and bulky so it is easy to do things while you are wearing them. They are warm. I love the red and white holiday pattern. They come just past the wrist joint..

Because of this robe, I feel asleep on my couch! Lol. It us very comfy and warm. It is the good flannel material not the kind that is fake. The fit is great. The material is nice and soft. It has 2 nice big pockets. It comes just at my knees. I would love to get another and maybe a longer one if they have it. I wore it the whole day. I love the red plaid.

This nightgown material has a wonderful slinky feel to it. If you "twirl" in a circle it moves elegantly around you. It is very soft. The sleeve length is a little longer than most but I like that. The body length is nice and long as well, coming down just at my ankle. I got the baby blue color and it is a bit see thru lol. Nice clothing line.

These are just the style of sunglasses I like. I only wear the larger lens for better eye coverage protection. On the side part there is a beautiful shiny design..I think its a gold cat with sparkles on it. This comes in a box with a zipper pouch that holds the glasses. The case is nice and thick storage in your car or purse when you are not wearing them. There is also a lens cleaning cloth in the pouch as well. These are movie star quality and style!
This picture doesnt show how thick these socks really are. They are very soft and stretchy. The material is a good quality and look like they will last a  long time.

Wow, what a thick and warm pair of slipper/socks. The sherpa lining is so soft its like wearing mittens on your feet. With the little gripper dots on the bottom, you can walk safe and not slip and slide on uncarpeted flooring. Pretty red color. Great for anyone and as a gift.

This is such a bright and vibrant combination of colors. It reminds me of the milky way on a clear night. The material is soft, not too stretchy and has an almost silk like slinky feel on the outside. The material will keep you warm and it doesnt weigh a ton..
This is a nice robe. The material is thick and soft. The only drawback is I wish the sleeves were just a bit longer.  The body length is ok. Great item for yourself or a gift for someone special.

These are some heavy boots. They have a wonderfully warm lining inside to help keep your feet warm and dry. They are not thin and cheap material. This is a good quality constructed boot.. True to size as well.

These are a very nice mens slipper. The material is soft inside and the outside is well sewn. They are warm and have the rubber sole for going outside. The fit is nice..true to size. Great gift for yourself or anyone else.

Beautiful, simple bracelet. Comes in a nice thick box. The black on this is a sturdy string that is held together by a gold type bead. You slide the bead close to the knots on the ends of the string to widen the loop and put on to your wrist.. When you get the size thats comfy for you, you slide the beads up towards your wrist to close the circle. Very easy. Very light material on the whole thing. The morse code dots are gold. This is a very nice bracelet that you can layer with others. Makes a great gift.
This is for my grdaughter for a Christmas gift. She loves the show.  The print is nice and clear and the colors are great.

This is such a cool box. The top fits so nice in the bottom . Skull looks good..the design on the box is nice too. There is a little weight to this giving me the idea it might have a bit of metal in it, or stone,  but its not overly heavy. It comes in a thick box that has styrofoam inside that you pull out and open. That is where the skull box is....thats how well it is packed to avoid any damage. Great gift for skull lovers!!! Male or female

When you first put these on, they are a bit snug because the inside is so thick. They are amazingly warm and so comfortable. First time I walked in them it was like walking on firm pillows. They have a deep rubber outer on the bottom in case you need to run outside for something and dont want to take them off and put back on again. These are sewn together very well. This is a good quality item.

This is exactly like described..the black chain in the center is very easy to spin. The fit is as expected. It comes in a very fancy, sturdy gift box that can be used for other things as well. The silver metal on this is very nice, not cheap looking, and doesnt peel off. Good quality ring that any man will love..even a biker dude because of the chain in it.

When I first put them on, they felt snug..but after you break them in a bit, they feel nice. The material is nice and soft. The foam on the bottom is nice and thick and feels like you are walking on a cloud. They are made well, not cheap. The top part is nice and soft on my foot. Nothing scratches at all.
These are so comfortable and warm. They hug your feet as you move . Material is soft, thick but not too thick. They stay up and dont slide down into your shoe. Colors are good. Good quality sock.
This is a wonderful keychain. It has a good weight to it. The printing and picture are very nice and clear. Comes very well packed in a nice thick box. Great for you or to give as a gift.
This is a wonderful keychain. It has a good weight to it. The printing and picture are very nice and clear. Comes very well packed in a nice thick box. Great for you or to give as a gift.

Omg this is a beautiful bracelet! The little heart says grand on top then daughter under that. It is a very clear printing. It comes in a thick manilla box...inside that is a black velvet bag with a draw string closure. Inside that is a little plastic zip lock bag that holds the bracelet. It is very well packed to avoid damage. The heart itself has a plastic film covering the words so it doesnt get scratched..then you can peel it off. Very well bagged. Good weight on the piece.. The silver color is shiny and not at all cheap looking.  It is a one size fits all because it has a lobster claw closer that can hook into any link on the bracelet. Will make a beautiful gift.

These are very pretty. I cant wear any silver or other fake metal jewelry but I wasnt sure about these because they are stainless steel. The green stone is clear and vibrant. Good size. I wore them and they didnt bother my ears..no itching or redness. Only drawback for me was the post is a bit too long so I couldnt sleep with them in at night. Other than that they are very nice for you or as a gift. They come in a beautiful black black box that opens like a clam shell design.
This is a beautiful keychain.. Printing is clear. The weight of this seems good and not flimsy at all. Comes in a sturdy box great for gift giving.

This company makes the best key chains. The words are easy and clear to read. There is a good weight to the dogtag, not flimsy. Good quality metal. Comes in a little plastic bag inside of a manilla colored box that protects it from getting scratched in shipping. This makes a great gift for anyone.
These are a very nice pair of pants. They fit well. The material is soft and not hard like some denim. It is a dressy/casual pant. The leg length is just right. Very comfortable to wear all day.

These are very nice looking necklaces. The gold tone looks very natural, like real gold. The chains are on the thinner dainty side but they do feel like they would last if you care for your jewelry. The design on them, looks nice and when all 3 are worn together, they look great but also look wonderful worn seperatly. Pretty set for you or as gifts.

I love this keychain. The weight is good on this...not too heavy and certainly not light. The saying is hilarious and is so clear making it easy to read. Comes in a ting ziplock bag to protect it from getting scratched. Then its put in a thick box. Makes a great gift for someone who is retiring or already retired. The saying is perfect!

True to size. This bathing suit has the mesh built inside and 2 huge pockets in front. The material is soft and moves as you do..not klingy. The leg length is very nice at just above the knee.. Great for wearing as shorts as well. Beautiful blue color.

This is a beautiful and very thick sweater. It stretches nicely. Very warm and not scratchy. The color is supposed to be a hunter green but looks more like a darker grey almost charcoal....but its fine unless you had your heart set on the greener color. Fits good and loosely to stay comfy all day. Sleeve lengths are just right and the body is a good length.

Beautiful sweater! A nice light thin material, very soft and stretchy. I especially like the neck part on this because its not one of those tight ones that have a tendency to "choke" you. The sleeve length is good as is the body part. Very nice sweater.
These are very silky. They fit nice.. Easy to move in them. Nice product

Fits as described. It is a beautiful black with tiny white flecks that look like stars.. The whole shirt pattern reminds me of outer space. The material is very soft and stretchy. A great warm sweat shirt. Nice ribbing on cuffs and bottom of shirt. Shirt length is great and doesnt crawl up when you move. I love it and would love more in different colors.

What a beautiful key ring. The words are very clearly printed on the shiny tag. There is a good weight to this key ring. It comes in a little plastic bag that is inside of a wooden gift box. Inside the lid it says " a gift for you". There are lots of uses for this wooden box as well. Makes for great gift giving to that special grson.
This is a nice necklace. The two circles are free flowing, not connected to stop movement. Nice color . Makes a great thoughtful and  surprise gift.

This is a very  nice little bag.  It looks small until you open it up. You can push the sides out at the bottom and it becomes more square. There is a lot more room inside than I thought. The color is a nice black. The material is sturdy with an easy smooth zipper. The shoulder strap has a gold chain that can be used as a dressy purse for those special times. Very cool.

This is a beautiful sweater. It is very thick, soft and stretchy. When you think of sweater weather..this is the sweater you want to wear. It has the zipper at the top and when it is zipped all the way up, its a turtle neck. When the zipper is down, it becomes a collar..so it is a very versatile piece of clothing. Anyone would love to get this as a gift..
Perfect fit. The material is linen so it moves with you nicely. The colors are bright and Hawaian like. Short sleeves are the right length...shirt body is a good length, not too long.

This is such a great sweatshirt!! It is a comfy fit, not a clingy one. I dont like close fitting clothes. The material is a soft fuzzy stretchy kind. The zipper moves up and down very easy. I love this shirt. It is nice and warm. The sleeves are perfect. Definatly a good buy!

This is such a beautiful key chain. It has a nice heavy weight to it. Its very shiney with clear printing o it. The crown is a nice touch.  This  will make your key chain sparkle. Any woman would love to add this to their keys! It comes in a beautiful wooden box that can be used to hold other treasures. Makes a wonderful gift!

I got the 3x because I love my sweaters big. This was not. The sleeves fit well but its not as loose as I would like. The material is very stretchy, very soft and thin. I would describe this as an old fashioned button up sweater. I used to love to wear these as a blouse sweater with no shirt under it. It is such a comfy sweater but I wish it was just a bit bigger.
This is such a pretty necklace. It isnt bulky or heavy. The metal colors on the chain and beads look good, not fake and cheap. Nice length for a teen. Comes in a very pretty box for gift giving.

I got a 1x hoping it was ok but it is more of a smaller medium..so its not true to size. It is a beautiful green with pink and white flowers. The skirted part has a nice flow to it..good for twirling lol. Nice length on the dress and sleeves. The material is good quality and stretchy. Too bad it is too small.

This is a beautiful wallet. You can smell the leather but not over powering. Box it came in was good and inside is a hard plastic case with the wallet inside that. Great for gift giving. There is a lot of credit card slots. On one flap there is a mesh pocket that would be a good spot for the drivers liscense and more reg spots on top of that one. Then you flip that over and there are more slots on each side of that. The bill holding section is a great size that is easy to put money in and take out without having to struggle. Good quality wallet.

This is a beautiful dainty bracelet. The gift box is covered in plastic and is a sparkly metal looking design. Perfect for gift giving. This is so eaxy to put on. Just open it by pulling the gold tone bead down the black string, put it on you wrist then pull the bead up to where you want it. So light on your wrist I sometimes forget Im wearing it. Looks great with other bracelets too. The gold "code " symbols look nice , not like a cheap off color type. It reminds me of the old tyme friendship bracelets that we used to make with strings and tie on our wrists. Reaaly love the symplicity of this look.

This is described as "heavy" but its not that thick. It is a good t-shirt material though. The fit is good. Sleeve and body length are nice. Stretchy but not that it would lose its shape. Comfortable to wear. Nice shirt.

I love this shirt. It says its a pajama/lounge shirt but I bet it could easily be an outdoor shirt as well. The material is a thick stretchy tshirt type. The collar sits just at the collar bone..not too low and not too high to choke you. The sleeves are nice and long and I can cover my hands in them as I love to do. The color and pattern are a nice Christmas holiday and are beautiful and bright. The print is nice and clear with no smudges or blurs.  Fits very well and so comfortable.

I love this bracelet! It reminds me of the old leather friendship bracelets. This is made of a nice thin black string. It has a gold bead that you pull to the size you need then after its on your wrist, you pull the bead up to keep the bracelet on. The "code symbols" are beautiful and dainty dots and bars. One thing I noticed is that the bar part actually stays on top of your wrist..unlike other bracelets where they turn around and end up on the wrist underneath. Im thinking because its so light it is balanced better?.?.  These would look good layered with many other bracelets. This is one that you can keep on all the time. Can even wear as an ankle bracelet. With the adjustable ball it is a one size fits all ! The box it comes in a a very sparkly blackish grey diamond looking. Great for gift giving.

I love this bracelet! It reminds me of the old leather friendship bracelets. This is made of a nice thin black string. It has a gold bead that you pull to the size you need then after its on your wrist, you pull the bead up to keep the bracelet on. The "code symbols" are beautiful and dainty dots and bars. One thing I noticed is that the bar part actually stays on top of your wrist..unlike other bracelets where they turn around and end up on the wrist underneath. Im thinking because its so light it is balanced better?.?.  These would look good layered with many other bracelets. This is one that you can keep on all the time. Can even wear as an ankle bracelet. With the adjustable ball it is a one size fits all !

I got an xlg not knowing how the sizing is. It looks more like a medium...so sizing is an issue. The material is soft, stetches but is very thin so I would think its more for spring and summer. Other than that this is a nice looking grey color pant.

Nice loose fitting t-shirt. Sleeve length is good.. Body length is good. The nice blue colors go well together. Fits perfect. The material is of good quality, with a bit of stretch as a good t- shirt should be.

This is such a beautiful sweater. The picture shows that its a regular length but it really is shorter almost just below the waistline. It is like the old fashioned knit sweaters that we used to wear but cant find in the past years. It is thick, stretchy, soft and an all around cozy top! This is what you want to wear in the cool fall weather and even in the winter with a shirt under if you like. The green color is absolutly beautiful. I got a small size but since its so stretchy, I bet a medium/large could wear it...just might be short at the waist. The sleeve length is great to cover your hands when they are cold.

What a nice and comfy underwear...even for picky teenagers. The material is soft and stretchy. They dont ride up anywhere and make the wearer feel confident in wearing them. They are not tight anywhere and the leg length is just right.

I like the material on the sleeves . The shirt material does not stretch and it was too small. I can wear 2x and 3x but I barely got this over my chest. The color combo is nice and neutral so I think Im going to give this as a gift. It is thin material so I think it look nice with a turtle neck shirt under it.

This is a nice tote bag. The color I received is more of a deep blue not like the picture but thats fine..looks like a man could use it then lol. There are 2 nice shorter handles and no shoulder strap. It is like a big purse. There is an outer pouch that also has a zipper on on it. Double zipper on to that slides very smooth and easy. No pouches inside but the bag looks bigger on the inside. This would expand and hold a lot of stuff. The material is strong and sturdy.

Omg this duffle bag is huge! It is a nice thick and sturdy material. The handles have a comfortable feel in your hand that should make it easy to carry when full. Big nice pockets. This would easily replace a larger suitcase. Zippers slide easy.

I absolutlely love this sweater. I am a big girl and had my doubts about the sizing. This has a wonderful fit..stretchy but comes back as it doesnt overstretch. It is a very light and thin soft material but not so thin that it will fall apart .the sleeves are a great length..neckline falls in a good place. Would love to get more in more colors. Good quality.

This is a wonderful scarf. It is so soft and stretchy but it doesnt over stretch and become odd shaped like some do. It is wide enough to go around your neck for warmth and fashion. It also works for going around your shoulders as well. I really like the subdued coloring.  Good thickness.

This is a long wallet, not like it shows in the picture. The spaces that hold each credit card is too tight. The cards are hard to put in and take out..especially on the top because in the corners, the zipper is too close so you end up scratching the card across the zipper. The only way to avoid that is to fold the zipper back as you remove/put in the card. The inner zipper that holds the coins was very hard to open so I kept opening and closing it to loosen it and it moved more smoothly after that. I guess it might be an ok wallet if you dont need to use the top card slots. It was nice to hold though.

I ordered this in a large but it looks more like a smaller medium. Order it 1- 2 sizes bigger than you need. That being said... I love the think material. It is so soft and fuzzy. It also has a good thickness and weight to it. The hood is not overly large and with no tie strings, I think it should still work nicely because it almost hugs your head. The zipper is nice, shiny and glides up and down easily. Other than the not true to sizing this is a beautiful and nice sweater/ jacket. There are 2 zippered pockets that are nice as well
This is a wonderful pullover. It is stretchy and very soft. It feels like a very thick long undershirt material. True to size. Nice grey color. Sleeve length is nice and not overly long.
Very comfortable sweater. The material is nice, soft and has a bit of a stretch to it. Love the color...its just like in the picture
This is a very silky smooth material. It has good movement for active times. Fits as expected and nice and long.
As it says for men or women. These sunglasses are very light and dont hurt on the ears or bridge of your nose. Very crisp view. Block sunlight and glare very well.
These have a bit of a stretch to them but they were still kind of snug. After wearing them, they get a bit looser. Very comfortable. Good sturdy material.
This was for someone who wears a large and this was a bit baggy. But it is very comfortable. Soft thick material that will be great for those cold winter days.
Nice white shirt. Good fit. Can be for dress or casual wear.
Wonderful material..soft a bit stretchy. Good fit and very comfortable.
This is a nice pant but the color received is darker almost grey blue , not like the picture. But thats ok. They fit well. Can be worn as dress or casual. The length is good.

My 18 yr old grson loves these. He is very active on dirt bikes , 4 wheelers and swimming when hes with his friends. He loves the leg length and says they are very comfortable with a slight stretchy feel. They are cool and dry fast when wet.

I love this sweater and even tho its a mans sweater, a woman could also wear it. The material is like a soft thick thermal shirt. It stretches ok. I like the collar because it goes just under my neck and doesnt "choke" me like some sweaters do. The color is nice and bright. The sleeves are just the right length that if your hands get cold you can tuck them in to the sleeve lol.
Very nice soft material but a large seemed to be smaller. I would go up 1 size when ordering it. The color is good and material is nice for a tee shirt.
My grson only wears the skinny jeans and has a hard time finding the ones he likes. ( hes 18). He liked the fit and even the slight stretch. They look good on him.
This is a true to size very nice shirt. It looks like it could even be a dress shirt as well as casual everyday. It is soft not harsh. Sleeve length is wonderful.

My 18 yr old grson loves these shorts. The only drawback was not having the liner but he just wears them as shorts until he will go swiming. He wore them with his friends and got soaked in a water fight. He said they dried pretty quickly. Very comfy, nice material with a  cool pattern.

I got this shirt for my 18 yr old grson. He is picky about his clothes but he loves it!! The material is soft, moves with him ( not stiff ). The shirt and sleeve length are perfect.  Fits nicely. Good quality material.

This is such a nice check holder. It can expand if you fill it with new checks, a pen and lots of credit cards. It also has a slot that you can add some bills. Very soft and smells great since its real leather.!

I like this dress more than I thought I would. It fits as expected.  I went up a size but that wasn't necessary because it has a lot of spandex. Stops at the knee so I wish it was shorter but overall it feels well made and the elastic has held up after two washings.  Recommended for the price alone.
Fits true to size. The waist and inseam are exact which is difficult to guage in a brand we've never tried.  Not too skinny and the rips are stylish.  My teenage son loves them.  Recommended.

LOVE LOVE LOVE these tights. They're perfect for winter. Opaque and so so soft. There is just enough spandex that it holds it's shape all day with all the sitting I do. Also, the control top is a gift that I expected but didn't know would be so freaking awesome. The color is more of a medium gray than the blue-gray in the picture but I expected that so I didn't feel deceived. I would highly recommend.

Love this bag. It's very sturdy and has held up nicely even though I cram it full of items that I need for when I commute. Shoes, my kindle, lotions, sprays, sanitizer, headphones etc. The reversible part of the bag is ridiculous because that material would easily show dirt and would be illogical for what I use the bag for but the colors are nice (black & gray). I would highly recommend an everyday tote bag.

Purchased for my 13 year old daughter who has an average sized head. The hat is somewhat small. She perches it on her head so it fits and will stay on but to me a hat needs to fit snugly on your head but what do I know about the whole 'starving artist' look. The quality is okay. The material is light enough for the summer which is good and overall it's an adorable find. Packaging was good but I removed one star for the sizing. I would recommend it for anyone with a smaller head (you know if your noggin is average or larger).

Worth every penny...The cabinet is the perfect size. Not too large and fits perfectly over the door. Even when I open and close the door often the unit doesn't move, bang or shift. The quality is excellent, it appears to be well made and should last a long time. Now to the interior...the space is excellent. I have fine jewelry as well as everyday pieces and they all fit perfectly. I would buy this again, in a heartbeat. I will update if anything starts to fall apart but as of today, i am happy with my purchase.

Nice scarf. the pictures don't accurately represent how HUGE this scarf is. I actually decided to use mine as a couch throw instead. It's the perfect weight and size spring or fall. The material is pretty as well so that's a plus. I would buy again but not for fashion.

Purchased for my daughter for school. Comfortable but entirely too short. Didn't pay attention to the measurements when ordering. On my 13 year old slim, 5' 4" daughter the small fit her mid to upper thigh. Not exactly appropriate for gym class but still a good buy.

Very nice bag. The strap is long and comfortable to wear for a long period of time and even when the bag is full, it doesn't strain my neck or shoulders. The pockets or sections are deceptive because although the bag appears to be very big, it's sewn in a weird place that decreases the amount of space in the middle section. Still I was able to get my Kindle, wallet and phone in the bag and still have space for my compact, lip gloss and keys. good material and color as well. I'd buy again.

Decent shorts. My son likes them but they run a little long. The waist is okay but it hits below his knee and  he is approximately 5'11" and 170 lbs and we purchased a size Lg. Aside from the sizing, they're breathable and so far have held up well in the wash.
