Recently I received this Baggallini tote bag to review. I have purchased three Baggalini purses over the last few years but this is my first tote. This bag has much to recommend it, a great tote for work or travel. The fabric is a nice quality water-resistant nylon (yes, I did spray water on it and it beaded up). This fabric is much more practical than regular cloth bags which get wet in the rain and don’t necessarily protect the contents. The nylon fabric can be wiped clean with a damp cloth, another advantage. The metal bumpers on the bottom of the tote save the fabric, a small detail missing on many totes and purses.

The bag itself is well designed. You have a choice of using the 11” drop length handles or the removable, adjustable cross-body strap which helps to customize the fit. The inside of the bag offer RFID protection with credit card slots to keep your information safe.

If you carry electronic devices with you, you will appreciate the cell phone pocket and another zippered compartment that can accommodate an iPad. The only recommendation I would make is to make the cell phone pocket a bit longer; my large phone does fit but would like a bit more room so that it isn’t so close to the zipper.

The baggage handle sleeve is a great addition to this tote. When the zipper is closed you have an additional pocket with a magnetic clasp. When unzipped, it allows the tote sleeve to slip over the luggage handle, one less article for you to juggle on your way to work or through the airport.

This is my favorite Baggallini so far, thanks to a practical design and size (approximately 15” W, 12” H, 5” D) and quality components.

I frequently travel for work and pleasure, and am always on the lookout for lightweight yet roomy bags as I travel by train and storage space is limited.

I've been using Vera Bradley totes for at least 20 year, but most were over-the-shoulder style. So I loved the idea that this can be worn as a messenger bag, but also includes a sewn-on loop for sliding over a suitcase handle, for which my shoulders are grateful!

The bag looks small from the outside, but you are able to accommodate enough clothes easily for an entire weekend. It includes a phone pocket, 2 zip pockets, and 2 slip pockets. The interior has a mesh overlay with a pocket to keep your valuables organized. It's also carry-on compliant, measures 18. 5 inches Wide, 12. 5 inches high, and 6. 5 inches deep with a 6. 5 inch strap drop and an additional 52. 5 inch removable, adjustable strap.

And I love that the exterior is weather-repellent, meaning if you accidentally spill on it, you can easily wipe it off and have it looking good as new. This has become my new favorite travel gear and looks and feels great!

I am a longtime Brooks wearer, so when I was offered the chance to try out Mizuno's Women's Court Tennis Shoe, I jumped at the chance. I have a lot of foot issues including severe arthritis and overpronation, so was looking for a shoe that would offer stability and comfort. (Sometimes I am able to wear shoes in a regular width, like Reebok, so I was hopeful that the Mizunos would fit).

Out of the box, the shoes looked and felt great in the hand, with a striking purple and white color theme.

Unfortunately, from the moment I put them on, it was instant discomfort. I have hallux rigidus as well as tailor's bunions on both feet, which means my bone spurs protrude quite a bit. Not only was the shoe too narrow through the toebox, but through the entire middle as well. It was uncomfortable even having them on for just a couple of minutes. There was no mention of the shoe being narrow on the box - only 8.5 (and looking on their website, it does not appear that they manufacture this model in wider widths, or I would be willing to give it another try).

Too bad, as the shoes looked and felt very promising on initial inspection.

I frequently travel long distance by train on the weekends, and was looking for an easier way to get more bang for my buck as far as packing. So when I had the opportunity to review the Solo New York rolling duffel bag, I was thrilled.

Upon first glance, the fabric used is durable, as are the zippers and wheels. There is plenty of storage in the main compartment and side compartments, and I appreciated that there is a separate shoe/laundry compartment. My only nitpick was I wish they had used a stronger material for the black vinyl that covers the bottom/ends of the bag, it feels much cheaper and less sturdy than the main fabric.

I love that the bottom of the bag is reinforced; you can fit 40L worth of stuff into this, and even when fully loaded, the bag rolls smoothly and has a very sturdy feel. The telescoping handle makes it a breeze to travel quickly and easily from point a to B, and you will look stylish doing so. And best of all is the fact this is small enough to qualify as a carry-on with most major airlines; win-win.

The boot overall was very good, and I can tell it would be a warm boot. I actually did not buy this because the calf measurement ended up quite deceiving.

I have very wide calves, about 19" and I thought THIS IS IT, I FOUND THE BOOT! But it's the 20" opening plus the removable liner (8mm x2 is approximately .62", so slightly larger than 1/2" SMALLER for the opening. Also, the 20" is not what was measured, it's slightly smaller, so I could not fit my calf in with the liner.

Well, why not take the liner out? Turns out, you NEED the liner for the proper fit for your FEET. If you take the liner out, you would need multiple layers of socks to fit the boot right AND your ankle support is basically nonexistent.

Overall, I think the boot is a good boot, good price too, not sure about durability. But I feel like the specifications are slightly deceiving as they are presented.

UPDATE: There is no way these last a year. They maybe will make it to 6 months. I'm about to hit month 5 (I bought these in may) and the inside behind my heel is completely worn down even though I'm wearing the right size. Any smaller and my toe would be constantly pressed against the steel toe portion. Definitely would no longer recommend, even at this price, you might as well get something cheaper that will last less than 6 months.

I've had steel toed boots before but this is my first pair of steel toed sneaker-type of shoe. I expected some wear but am disappointed in some of the rips I've seen (pointed out in my photo) since I haven't been as rough on them as I usually am with boots. They are far more comfortable than my boots hands down though, I can wear them all day, normally with my boots I start getting tired after about 6 hrs.

Would recommend these for the price, we'll see if they last the year.

The fit was as expected. However, I am returning this item. The bottom layer, where there is some solid fabric, is actually fairly short and is angled. The rest of the bottom layer and additional layers on top are completely see through. If you've got wider hips, it's going to be far too short unless you wear something else underneath. I didn't want to have to modify the dress or the outfit as a whole, so I did not keep it.

I had put this on for a bit before buying it, and I really only put it on to check that the cup would fit since I have a larger bust (DD+). Since it did, I continued with the purchase. I bought multiple bras along with this one (not all natori), so they had all gone through similar amounts of washer/dryer cycles, but this is the only one that feels way too small now.

I'll be donating it since I haven't worn it in about a month and I don't plan to.

my daughter is 5 and usually wears xs/s. I went with S to be safe and it was still too small on her. She wears the shirts but the sleeves fit her closer to a 3/4 sleeve and her belly will show if she raises her hands. I would choose a size up, however, my daughter is longer/ slim for her age. So, I wear a 14/16, L/XL bottoms. They go up all the way without issue, very stretchy and warm. The problem is there is no grip and since the elastic is loose, they roll. There are these garter type things to hold them in place but they are small compared to the stretch of the sock (it's a squeeze for sure and not comfortable). These would be 5star best of they had grip on the inside somewhere. I'll be trying clothing tape.

I prefer steel toe boots over shoes, but, as a woman, it's always been hard to find a snug fit that doesn't hurt or isn't too heavy. My shoes are marginally lighter. But, I prefer the boots. They have great ankle support, no squeaking on shop floor, and they feel like a perfect fit all around. I've had them for about 2 months, most of my days being 8-5 but wearing them 6-6 and yesterday I wore them for over 12 hrs (I was tired, but definitely not because of the boots).

Update: I had bought a different pair of sneakers for $125 and they were ripped to shreds on the inside and loose within 6M. I came back to these, especially for the winter, and wow, they're still holding strong.

They are definitely worn and a bit looser than before, but I can't complain. The price is good, I am replacing the insole (~$45 for a custom one) and they're solid for snow boots too. Fairly lightweight, still would 100% recommend over other brands and shoes.

This quilted crossbody purse has a very pretty print. I like the color combination of the floral design. The quality of the bag is very good. It has an adjustable shoulder strap. There is a slip pocket on one of the outer sides and a larger pocket on the other side that has a magnetic snap closure. The snap closure doesn't close on its own with just the magnetism. You need to line up the sides of the snaps and press together in order to get it to snap into place. It made me question whether or not it was actually magnetic, but it does seem to be. It's just not a strong one. This pocket has credit card slots and an ID window. There's a hidden zippered pocket behind the larger pocket with the flap. The zipper works fine, but it's a bit awkward to access. Plus that pocket is very thin so I will have to be careful as to what I put in there because my hand cannot easily fit down to the bottom. The main compartment has a zipper closure. It's fairly narrow. If I insert my wallet into it, the whole bag bulges for an unattractive look. Fortunately, I can skip the wallet and use the card slots instead. Overall, it's a nice bag.

These pants have a nice style. I like that the material is a little thicker. A lot of times I have to deal with thinner material on my khaki's which either rips easily or is a bit see through. Those aren't problems with these pants. They fit pretty well in the legs, but the waist is too big. I usually have the reverse problem. I wear a size 18 jeans, usually a curvy fit. My calves are problematic when it comes to fit because they're on the thicker side. I'm going to try these with a belt to see how that looks and if it looks okay, I will be able to wear them.

These Nine West slippers are nice. They have a good cushion. The material is soft. The construction seems to be fine. Unfortunately, these did not fit me. I wear a size 10W. I often find that size 11's will work well. I ordered the 11/12 slippers. I could not even get my foot into them. The slippers are not open like a lot of other slippers, instead they are designed like shows where you have to insert your foot into them. Consider sizing up if you have wide feet or if you're on the top end of the size.

I ordered these compression shorts for my daughter. The sizing fits well. They definitely provide compression. They're not too tight, but they are snug. The dark color isn't see through. The length is good. My daughter says they are comfortable and they allow full range of movement.

I have been wearing camisole shapers daily for the last couple of years. I buy mine from Ruby Ribbon, but I was excited to give these a try because they are much cheaper.I followed the chart for sizing. I wear a size 18, so I went with the 4XL as suggested. It fits well. There is some compression, but not as much as the level 4 Ruby Ribbon ones that I wear. There isn't as much support on top either. The RR camis have a band just below the chest area which lifts nicely. It also doesn't separate well either, creating more of a uni-boob look. For the first few hours, I didn't have any problems with this rolling up, but throughout the day, I did begin to have that issue. Overall, I do like this. It was comfortable to wear and it was definitely more supportive than wearing no-bra at all. I think I would be more likely to wear it on lounging at home days.

These pull on pants are very comfortable. They are great for hanging out at home. I don't think I would wear them in public, but that's just me. The fit is good. They're a little loose at the waist, but not enough that I'm having to pull them up all the time. The material is a little thin, but they're not see through. I do wish they had pockets!

These men's slippers are comfortable, but they're also a little weird looking. My husband has been wearing them around the house since getting them which means that he likes them. They are a better slipper for the times when he has to go outside on the sidewalk or driveway. These fit him very well and as we expected.

This Star Wars themed fleece jacket is really cute! I ordered the 2XL. The sizing is good, but it could be better. There's not a lot of extra room, so if I was wearing something thicker such as a sweater or sweatshirt, I think this would be too tight. It is fine with a thin shirt underneath. The zipper works well. The arm sleeves are not too short. There are 2 zippered pockets. It kept me warm today when I was running my errands.

I'm loving this cozy pullover Vera Bradley! I didn't think I would actually be wearing it this soon, as it's not even Thanksgiving yet and I live in Georgia, but due to Global Warming, it was in the low 30's last night. I was thankful this arrived! It's even better than I expected! I ordered the 3X size because of my previous experience with VB clothing. I'm currently an 18/20 or 2X, but when I have ordered anything from VB with long sleeves, I have found them to be too tight in the shoulders. This fits loose (but not baggy) and isn't tight at all. I even wore this over another shirt without any difficulties. It's very soft. I find myself "petting" it. I love the pockets. They are actually connected so it's a kangaroo style pocket. It kept me very warm yesterday which I greatly appreciated.

My daughter loves these shorts! They're super soft, like butter. They fit her quite well. They're not tight or snug. They are white, so she does need to be careful as to which underwear she wears. She really wants a pair in another color!

I have been very pleased with this shoe cleaning kit. It comes with brushes as well as a cleaner. There's also an eraser to help with cleaning suede shoes. I have tried everything. The cleaning spray did a good job of whitening the edges of some sneakers. It didn't completely whiten it, but it was significantly cleaner afterwards. If I had spent more time on it, it may have gotten them whiter. The suede kit did a good (not great) job. It was gentle on the shoes and didn't hurt them. It seems like there was some improvement. Overall, I would recommend this.

My daughter does a lot of hiking. These socks are comfortable for her. They're padded. They have been good at preventing blisters. They keep her feet dry. All the things that are necessary when wearing hiking boots. They seem to be well made. She likes the look of them, too.

With Gap being an affordable mall brand, I wasn't sure if I would like this or not. I am pleased to announce that it is better than expected. My daughter is usually a size Large in tops, though she often sizes down for a fitted look. I ordered this in a large. She said it's slightly snug, but that's the way she likes it. It's a long length that doesn't rise up when stretching. It's a basic wardrobe staple!

My daughter loves a good sports bra. She is very pleased with this one by Fabletics. She's a size 34D and the large size fits her very well and offers great support. The sides are longer and go past her rib cage which makes it good for wearing as a top for exercising or lounging. It has good compression and shape. It's a winner!

This breastfeeding bra either runs small or it's just not intended for women who have more up top. It's wearable, but because of the sizing, there's a lot more spillage than preferred. The material is super soft. The color is a nice neutral one.

I get into the Christmas spirit as soon as Thanksgiving is over. I try to wear holiday shirts as much as I can. This is a very cute Christmas top.  The shirt fits pretty well, but could be better. The arms are a tad snug, but not so much that I can't wear it. I am very pleased with the length of this -neither too long nor too short. This will definitely make it into my holiday apparel rotation!

During the month of December, I enjoy wearing holiday themed shirts. I liked the look of this one. It's very different from all of the other ones I own. The colors are bright. The printing is good. I found it to be a little snug in the arms. It's not so much that I wouldn't wear it though. It isn't an uncomfortable fit. What I don't like about it is the material. I never realized how picky I am about fabrics until recent years. It's similar to athletic fabrics. I have had some that I really like, but not this one. It's unnatural feeling to me. It's not breathable.

This is a nice looking button down shirt. The fit is good and as expected. The fabric is soft, but thin. It's not sheer, but it is slightly see through. It does wrinkle a little, but throwing it in the dryer on the wrinkle setting works well on it.

I am a huge fan of Vera Bradley items. This Bella Taylor wallet reminds me a lot of VB. The floral fabric print is pretty. The construction of the wallet is excellent. There are lots of pockets for organizing your cash or receipts. This is a lot prettier than using the envelope method for your cash budgeting! I'm very impressed with this and I am very interested in learning what other products they carry.

These Super Mario Brother's t-shirts are cute! They have true sizing. The quality of the shirts are very good. They're soft & comfy. I do think the grey shirt is harder to see. The pink doesn't show up well on the grey. I would prefer either a lighter grey or a darker pink. Overall, these are fun shirts and great for Mario fans.

This is an awesome Mickey Mouse ball cap. It's much nicer than I expected. Mickey is embroidered nicely. I love the little embroidered Mickey glove on the back.  I am going to have my husband wear this to our upcoming Disney trip!

This is a cute hate & glove set. I like that it's reversible. It seems to be well made. I had my 12 year old nephew try it on and it was too small on him. It stretches a little, but not enough. I think it would fit better on 8 & 9 year olds. The sizing is 8 to 16 and I don't think it would fit most 16 year olds!

The items in this maternity clothing set are wardrobe staples. You get a tank, leggings, long sleeve top and a short sleeve dress. The items are all super soft and stretchy. The fabric is slightly see through when stretched a lot. The pieces can be worn in various combinations or individually with other pieces in your closet. This is definitely a good start to your pregnancy wardrobe. The set is a little on the pricey side. It's not terrible when you break it down to 4 separate pieces. When you look at it that way, the price per item isn't that bad at all. Have you priced maternity clothes lately? If you buy anything from a specialized maternity store, $50 per item is quite reasonable.

My daughter needed some new shoes that she could wear to her college professional events. She had a black pair of flats, but thought brown ones would be a nice change. Sometimes she has multiple events in one week, so this also allows her to space them out so one pair doesn't get worn down too quickly. These are cute and comfortable. She loves that these are synthetic and not leather. She also really likes the stitching around the top. The sizing fits as expected. She is very happy with these.

I didn't read the description thoroughly before ordering, so I was expecting this to be a cotton fabric that required ironing. I was thrilled to learn that this is a knit and doesn't require as much ironing! If you take it out of the dryer and hang it up promptly, you don't need to iron it at all! The fabric is soft and very forgiving. The rocket design is fun. The buttons are securely sewn. The sizing seems to be accurate. Overall, it's a great, low maintenance shirt!

These are fun socks that remind my husband of our family trip to California where we visited Yosemite. The socks are a good thickness, neither too thick nor too thin. The sizing is good. They are comfortable. My husband really likes the scenery on them. These would make a great gift!

I don't usually have good luck with Levi's fitting me. I wear a size 18 jeans. These size 34 almost fit me perfectly. I have been losing weight lately under my doctor's guidance and I feel confident that they will be just right after a few more pounds. They are currently a little tight around my lower mid section. Although slightly tight, they are actually comfortable. The fabric is lighter weight than I expected for which I am glad. I was a little worried they would be heavy canvas ones like my husband often wears.

This is a super cute rain jacket. It's light weight so I won't get too overheated when wearing it. The floral print is lovely. I really like that it has a long length. It doesn't stop at the waist. It goes to my mid thigh in the back. It's a bit shorter in the front. It's got to be the prettiest rain jacket I have!

I live in the South and in the month of December, there are often warm enough days where I wear short sleeves. This shirt is great for those days, but it still leaves me feeling in the holiday spirit. It's light weight. The sizing is good and as expected.

In the month of December, I like wearing various holiday themed shirts. It just feels festive to do so. This Christmas Gnome shirt is cute. It's a cross between a sweatshirt and a long sleeve t-shirt. It is light weight like a t-shirt, but the cuff around the bottom and sleeves make it feel more like a sweatshirt. Either way, I like it. I'm in my 50's and I live in the South. So between menopause and mild winter weather, I don't want anything too heavy, so this is just fine for me. The fabric feels good. The decoration isn't too stiff. Overall, I like it.

This is a lovely dress. Even pregnant women deserve to wear something beautiful. I'm so glad the fashion industry has gotten rid of all the cutesy and ugly maternity outfits from years ago. The fabric of this dress is amazing! It's soft and stretchy. The dress goes through the multiple stages of pregnancy. It's flattering and universal. It can be worn casually or dressy depending on your accessories. I do think it's a bit pricey, but it's really nice!

My daughter is an outdoorsy person and was happy to get this new shirt. She likes her shirts to either be super baggy or a bit snug fitting. In my experience with Levi's, the sizing runs small. With that prior knowledge, I decided to order her regular size since a cropped shirt shouldn't be baggy. On her it is a slightly snug fit, which she likes. The design is cute and very outdoorsy.
These earrings are cute & cheery! They look just like the pictures. They're not too big. They add some sunshine to your day!

This Vera Bradley tee is pretty soft. I am usually a 2X, but I ordered this in the 3X because of some previous experience I have had with Vera Bradley clothing. It fits quite nicely, but it's not as big as I would expect a 3X to fit. It's loose, but not baggy. I do like it. It's comfortable to wear and it's well made.

These are great jeans! There must be some truth to "you get what you pay for"! These are definitely more expensive than my usual jeans, but they also feel and look better than my usual jeans. They have a nice stretch. There a little lower rise than I prefer. They are very flattering.

This coat is a pretty good one. It looks really nice when I'm wearing it. Of course it's not cold enough to wear it outside, but I am excited to have it when it does turn colder. The coat is a bit light weight. I have had other wool coats that felt heavier. It's not a bad thing, lighter is very appropriate for Georgia winters. I did order a size larger just because I don't like tight coats. It's not as loose as I had hoped, but it does fit comfortably. I just don't think I can wear a big bulky sweater or sweatshirt underneath it. Luckily I don't usually wear bulky sweaters and sweatshirts! I'm not crazy about the buttons. They feel and look a bit cheap. I love the length. It almost reaches my knees (I'm 5'6"). Overall, I am happy with this.

Earlier this year, I lost the luggage tag on my suitcase. It was one of those buckle style ones and it must have come undone in transit because when I picked my bag up at the baggage claim, it was gone. The next time I flew I had a similar Vera Bradley luggage tag. It is super durable! There's really no way that it will come off unintentionally. I wanted to order one for my daughter, so she is getting this one. Not only is it sturdy, but it's beautiful too! I wish Vera Bradley offered luggage tags in more prints!
These are not only cute slippers, they are also comfortable. The cushion is more than adequate. I did find them to be a bit snug. I have wide feet and they may not be intended for that.

These are cute jeans. They have a really nice stretch to them. Unfortunately not enough stretch for me! The pant legs were too skinny for me. I knew that could be a problem for me, but I risked it anyway. And for the record, I have thick calves. I really like the raw edges.

My daughter is in college and likes wearing beanies in the cooler weather. She also is a fan of Timberland products. She squealed when she saw this! It fits pretty well. The color looks great with her dark hair. I really think she wears beanies for fashion rather than warmth, but at least in doing so, she is keeping warmer! The hat is well made without any flaws.
This is a light weight, ribbed shirt. The sleeves go to the elbow so they cover my arm flab! The color is just like the picture. It's a comfortable shirt.

These are simple but cute boots. They have a comfortable foot bed and great traction. There's a loop on the back to help get your foot into the boot. I have a wide foot and I could fit into these boots, but it was too tight in the toe area. They would be good for the cooler fall and winter weather.

I love these socks! They are great casual socks. They're thin and perfect to wear with loafers. I like the assortment of colors/designs. As far as sizing goes, I am very happy with the way they fit. I wear a size 10W. My calves are also pretty thick. These fit nicely. They're not tight at all. I don't wear my socks all the way up, so these are just gathered around the tops of my ankles. There's adequate stretch to these. I also think they're reasonably priced enough that I am considering ordering another set in a different color/design.

This tee shirt has a cute, Peter Pan image. The image is done well and isn't stiff. The shirt size fits as expected. I like most things about this shirt. What I didn't care for was the neckline. I think a slight scoop would look better. While it's not tight, the neckline looks unnaturally placed high. I know this is a personal issue for me and others may not feel the same way, that's why I did not give it a low rating.

I ordered these pajamas for my daughter. She's in college, but loves to wear Christmas pajamas! Usually, she'll open a pair on Christmas Eve, but I did make her try them on so I could review it now. I was impressed with the material. It's 100% organic cotton. It has a nice heft to it. It's definitely a quality set of pajamas. The sizing was good. They were a little loose, but that just makes them more comfortable. I would definitely recommend these.

This is a nice quality, outdoor activity shirt. The material is light weight and well suited for adventure. The sizing is way off, but I'm not surprised. I find Levi's jeans to run small, too. I ordered the 2XL. I could get it on and still move, but it was definitely tight on me. Funny thing is, I didn't hate it! I started thinking, "if I loose some weight.....". I actually may see if my daughter wants it, though I suspect it would be a little big on her.

I ordered these jeans for my daughter. The fit was a little snug, but not bad enough that she can't wear them. They have a good stretch to them. The fabric is also very soft. It's a dark wash, which I like a lot. My daughter is neutral about that. They are really a nice pair of jeans.

I love wearing holiday shirts during December. I am usually a 2X, but I've had difficulties with some similarly styled shirts not fitting me well and being too tight. This shirt is a 3X and it fits well. It's a little loose, but not baggy. It's actually very comfy. It's kind of flowy which I like. I am excited to be able to wear this soon.

I like wearing holiday shirts around the holidays. I have gained weight since last year and feared that many of my shirts from last year would not fit. This 2X fits pretty well. The arms are a little snug, but not tight or restrictive. It should be noted that my upper arms are a bit thick and this is often a problem area for me, so it might not be a problem for others. The image printing is good. I'm picky about fabrics and this one doesn't bother me.

When I ordered these jeans, I did not realize they were maternity jeans. The short description that I read did not mention that not so little fact. So I ordered these for my daughter. Well....she doesn't need maternity clothing. The jeans seem to be fine. As someone who did wear maternity clothing 20 some years ago, I like the style of these. I really hated the large stretchy material that completely covered my belly. These have side panels that stretch as you grow so it looks nicer. I like that they don't look like typical maternity pants. I can't comment on the fit, but the quality looks to be good. If I had looked at all the pictures, I would have known right away that they were maternity jeans, but from the description, it wasn't clear.

I am a long time fan of Vera Bradley bags and purses. This one is a new design for me. I like the shape of it a lot. It seems like a lot of the bags that go on your shoulder are over sized or also a crossbody. This one is sized well for someone like me with grown children and no need to carry a ton of stuff with me. The performance twill material is durable. The interior is a new floral print. I have several performance twill items and they used a different floral print prior to this one as far as I know. There's good storage inside. The zippers are sturdy and glide well. The shoulder strap is easy to adjust. Overall, it's another good purse by Vera Bradley!
These are comfortable slippers. They have a good cushion. They're slightly narrow, but that's not really a problem. It helps the slipper to stay on better! I like the leopard print a lot!
These are cute shoes! The heel isn't too high, so it is easy enough to walk in. I like the design a lot. The quality is on par with other shoes in this price range.
The fit of this bra is good. The bra is nice looking. There's no lining, just the lace. I think I would benefit from some kind of lining. I could purchase some inserts or something like that.

This is a cute fall/Halloween shirt. I love the kitty on it!! It's a soft, comfy shirt. I ordered the 2XL and it fits really well in the body, maybe just a tad big. It's a little longer than I would like. That says a lot because I like my shirts to be on the longer side so I'm not showing skin when I bend or reach. Of course I can tuck it in if I'm feeling confident. Overall I am pleased with it.

My daughter has been wanting a pair of basic black low heels. She is thrilled with these! She says they are comfortable to wear. The fit is great. As much as she loves a gorgeous pair of tall stiletto heels, they're impractical for her on most occasions. These are much better suited for her needs. Of course, she does have a similar pair with heels almost double these which she wears for special occasions!

As a plus size woman, I have found that not all plus size shirts are created equally! Well I am here to tell you that this is a perfect fit for me! The sleeves are a good length and they are not tight or restrictive. The length is long enough that  I won't be showing any skin when bending over or reaching up. It's light weight which is important for this menopausal woman. I am very pleased with it. I just might be checking out the other colors and ordering a second one.

These Levi's Maternity jeans are comfortable. The fabric that covers the belly has a great stretch to it to accommodate the growing size. The jeans fit as expected, but it should be noted that in my opinion and experience with the brand, their sizes run small. This was accounted for at the time of ordering so the sizing was as expected. They look hip and modern compared to a lot of other maternity clothing.

This is a nice, thin sweater. I like wearing sweaters in the winter months, but I don't like heavy or bulky ones. This one is perfect for me! I love the light green color. It seems to be well made. It is a low scoop neck sweater, so I need to make sure that I'm wearing an undergarment that pairs well with it.

My daughter needed some black flats to wear. She is a college student and is an ambassador for her school. She needs to dress professionally at some of the events. These shoes are perfect for her. They have a great fit. They seem to be well made. She says they're pretty comfortable, too.
I like sleeping in night gowns like this. The leopard print fabric is cute. The fit is great and as expected. The material could be softer, but it's fine. It's a comfortable night gown!

I really don't like this blouse. The fit is okay, but that's where it ends. There are a couple of things I don't like about it. First, the product description says it's polyester. It's not. The tag on it says 100% cotton. I am a fan of cotton products, but in tops, they wrinkle easily and don't flow as well as polyester or polyester blends. Also, I don't iron very often. I don't buy clothes that require regular ironing. Secondly, I don't like the sleeves. Their length is good. They just start about a quarter down the arm. It makes it look super puffy. I felt like a pirate in this shirt! I'm a plus size woman and I don't need a lot of extra puff! I am giving it 3 stars. I don't feel like I could go lower because it is my taste in shirts is personal to me and others may like it.

As my daughter nears college graduation, she has been wanting to buy some classic and basic shoes so she's prepared for various occasions. These are great basic black pumps. The sizing is good. She wears a 9. Her feet are just a teeny bit wide. They're not wide enough for wide widths though. These fit her well.
These are cute no-show socks. They are thin and light weight. I wear a size 10W shoe and there is adequate stretch so they fit fine. I like the cute Alice in Wonderland theme!

I really didn't know that this was a sweater before ordering. I assumed it was a sweatshirt. So I was surprised to see that it is really a sweater! It's not too heavy. The length is great! It is long enough that it covers my back side when bending or stretching. My husband and I couldn't agree on whether or not the Vader image was printed or actually stitched. I really think it's stitched. This is really a great Star Wars sweater!

I ordered this black top in the 2XL size. It fits very well and as expected. My arms aren't particularly long, but the sleeves fit more like a 3/4 sleeve rather than a long sleeve on me. I do have to be careful as to what undergarment I'm wearing because of the square neckline. I know it's also available in white, but I wish it was offered in more colors, too! It's really a cute top!
These little Under Armour baby booties are absolutely adorable! The quality is very good. They will keep your baby's toes nice and warm!

This is a cute top. The size is true fit. I wear a size 18/2XL and this is a 2XL. It's not tight in the shoulders or bust. The length is good, too. It's long enough that it covers my lower back area when bending over or reaching. The sleeves are very flattering. They conceal my flabby bat wings! I'm not crazy about the material, but it's okay. It's a little stiffer than I prefer. Overall, I am satisfied with this new top.
I was surprised at how soft this sweater was! It's well made and it fits great! This will be perfect for the cooler fall weather.

This lemon purse is absolutely darling! There's no doubt as to what it is. The actual body of the purse is well made and seems durable. I do have some concerns about the chain strap. It is very light weight and I don't have a lot of confidence in it. However, should it break, the strap is an easy replacement.

My daughter and her friends are planning a trip to Disney. She wants everyone to wear mouse ears on the trip. This is a set of 2 different mouse ears. They are well made. I have not noticed any shedding of sequins. The headband fits my large head and is comfortable to wear, at least for a while! These are much more affordable than the ones you can purchase at the theme parks!

This is a great key chain! Not only is it made with beautiful Vera Bradley fabric, but it's also durable and sturdy. The metal hardware is nice and strong. The key chain can be worn on your wrist, too. I have large wrists and I can put it on my wrist and remove it, but there's not a lot of room. I am really happy with this new key chain!

What a cute pair of Minnie Mouse ears! I love the pink and iridescent look. The ears fit my large head fine, though I'm doubtful that I would be able to wear them all day. I tend to get annoyed with headbands after a while. The sequins are securely attached. I haven't noticed any shedding of them. There is a small black mark on it. I've included a picture. It's not super noticeable, but it is there.

These are nice looking men's dress shoes! I ordered them for my husband. He doesn't have to dress up very often, but I thought it would be convenient to have slip on shoes rather than tie shoes. He has a couple of pairs of tie dress shoes already. The shoes are comfortable and offer good support. The sizing fits as expected.

I love Vera Bradley! I have been a "collector" of VB purses for several years now! This is a new style to me. It has 2 different types of straps, plenty of pockets, and the whole thing zips up so you can keep your stuff from spilling out. The outside of the purse is a quilted black material. The interior is a gorgeous black & white floral print. The purse is an excellent quality as I would expect from Vera Bradley. It is a little larger than I anticipated, but if you look at the picture of it being worn on someone's shoulder, that will give you a good idea of the size.

My college aged daughter and her friends are planning a Disney trip. I ordered these cute Minnie ears for that trip. The design is very cute. There are rose gold, black, bronzy or gold and pink sequins. The headband is comfortable. I tried it on my large head and it fit fine. Though I think I would have problems after wearing it or any headband for hours. The ears seem to be securely fastened to the headband. This one does shed a bit. After having it out for a little while, there were lots of black fuzzy pieces all over my desk.

This is a very cute cardigan. I really like the scallop design around the neckline. The stripes are also nice. The sweater fits as expected. It will be great for extending the seasons of some of my summer dresses and blouses!

This is more of a packing envelope than a packing cube. It's definitely not compression. My husband used it on a recent business trip. The instructions are easy to follow. My husband was able to get all 3 of his button down shirts in it. Then when he got to his hotel, he hung them up. He did feel the need to iron them, but had his room not come with an iron/ironing board, he says he would have been okay without ironing.

I wear a size 18, but lately I've been wearing my tops in size 2XL. My upper arms are large and regular XL or 1XL shirts have been tight in the shoulders or upper arms. This 2XL is slightly snug in the arms, but not in the way that it's tight and uncomfortable. I like the deep V-neckline. It's definitely a deep V and shows cleavage. The shirt color is true to the picture. Overall, I like this shirt.

My daughter is a server at a restaurant. She quickly learned the importance of wearing special no-slip shoes on the job. She has another pair of work shoes, but she can be careless (and messy) when she's getting undressed and often misplaces one or both of her shoes. Then when she's getting ready for work, she's in a panic and gets stressed because she can't find her shoes. These shoes are a true size fit. She likes that they are slip on so she doesn't have to worry about tying them. They have a good foot bed and support. Their no-slip feature is excellent. She says they are very comfortable to wear at work, especially on long shifts.

These hiking/golf pants are a good fit. I ordered my usual size. They're ever so slightly snug in the calf area, but my calves are thick so that's not unexpected. I do like them, but they are noisy when the fabric moves. I personally wouldn't wear them to work or casual events because of the noise they make.

These are not only beautiful earrings, but they're definitely unique, too. I ordered these for my daughter. She's studying wildlife biology in college. One of her favorite classes so far was one on birds. These are realistic looking turkeys and not cartoony. The quality is good. I know she will have fun wearing them.

I ordered this shirt for my son. When it arrived, I was looking at the label to see what the fabric was and I became confused. The label said that it was only to be worn by dogs. I know that you can get a matching one for your dog, but this is definitely not a dog cut shirt. We put a people shirt on our dog once, and the belly/front side dragged and hung down a lot. Dog shirts tend to be cut in a curve so they don't hang down like that. I ordered the 2XL (human) shirt. The shirt says it's a 2XL and when I hold it up to other 2XL shirts, it seems to match. It fits my son fine. The material is like a dry-fit or athletic material. The image looks good.

I am a long time fan of Vera Bradley products. These pajamas are super cute! I wear a size 18/1XL in most clothing. I do purchase some shirts in 2XL because I have thick upper arms and I hate for tops to be tight in the arms or shoulder area. Because of my personal experience with Vera Bradley clothing sizes, I ordered this in the 3XL. The shirt fits wonderfully! It's not tight in the shoulders. The buttons don't gape. I think that's the correct size for me. The shorts, though, are too big. They do have an elastic waist band and a draws string closure, but I find that I have to retie them frequently as they loosen up as I am wearing them. I think a 2XL in the bottoms would be better, had I been able to mix and match sizes. The quality is very good. The fabric is cotton, but it's not very soft. It did soften a little after washing it, but I would prefer a softer material. They are comfortable enough for sleeping and I am super picky about what I will sleep in!

I am a size 18. I ordered this Vera Bradley zip up hoodie in the 2XL. While it does fit, there's not a lot of extra room. I was wearing a short sleeve t-shirt fitted tee when I tried it on. I don't think I could have worn anything bulkier underneath it. I wish I had ordered the 3XL. I will definitely be able to wear this, but I will have to be aware of what else I am wearing. I love the floral print with the color block. It's a good quality garment. I love seeing Vera Bradley prints on clothing!!

This is a very soft sleep shirt by Vera Bradley. I love the pretty floral design. I wear a size 18, but lately I have been getting 2XL shirts because I like them to be loose. I ordered this in the 3XL because I have found that Vera Bradley shirts can sometimes run small and I didn't want that to happen. I am pleased with the fit. It's loose and comfortable, just like I wanted it to be. It doesn't look oversized or sloppy. I have the matching pants and I have to tell you, this is a super cute lounging outfit/pajama set!

This is a cute umbrella. It also seems to be a good quality one as well. It opens smoothly & easily. It is fairly compact and easy to travel with.  It's kept me dry in the rain. I haven't been able to test how well it works in strong winds, but it if lets me down, I will definitely come back and up date my review.

I am a size 18. My shoulders and upper arms are problematic with some clothes, so I usually go with a 2XL. This 2XL is a 20-22 according to the product description. A 20/22 would normally be perfect! That wasn't the case. I could barely get the dress over my head. My husband helped me and then when I had it on, it was so tight and uncomfortable! He joked about cutting it off of me! I was able to get it off okay, but my estimate is that it's at least one size if not two sizes too small. The dress itself looks cute. The floral pattern and color is nice. The fabric is light weight, but definitely one that wrinkles easily.

I am so excited that Vera Bradley has included plus sizes in their clothing options. I remember many year ago when they kept to the standard sizes and nothing ever fit me! This pullover is adorable! I can't wait for cooler weather so I can wear it. I am probably closer to a size 2XL, but I ordered this in the 3XL. I was afraid if I didn't order up a size, I would be disappointed and it would be too tight in the shoulders and arms. I'm so glad I went up because it fits perfectly! I love the floral print. It reminds me of Florida!

The first thing that came to mind when I was trying this one was that it was easy to wear. I vaguely recall that being a clothing category back in the 1970's. It's easy to wear! It doesn't require a lot of fuss. The material is light but not see through. The dress fit as expected. The length grazed the floor when I was barefoot. (I'm 5'6"). There's a belt or sash included, but there are no belt loops of any kind, so I wasn't really sure how I was supposed to wear it. Overall, it's sort of cute. The fabric doesn't wrinkle, so it would make a nice travel dress.

These jeans didn't fit me. However, I'm not totally surprised. In my past experience with Levi Jeans, I have had to order a size up. I think they must not use vanity sizing like a lot of other companies do. I wore size 18 jeans in high school (1980's). I weigh about 60 pounds more now and I still wear size 18 jeans. So maybe I'm not really ordering a size up with Levi jeans, but rather ordering my true size. Oh well....... I could get this up and on, but I couldn't zip/button. I have decided to keep them because I am feeling optimistic with my current weight loss journey. The quality is nice. They have a good stretch to them. The length was a little long on me, but I like that. I'm 5'6" and they grazed the floor when I was trying them on barefoot.

I haven't worn my wedding ring set for years. It's not just because it doesn't fit anymore. I was also getting annoyed by my diamond getting caught on things because it extended so much. This fits nicely. It has some great sparkle to it. It also doesn't protrude out too much so I haven't had any problems with it catching on things. I've worn it non-stop for over a week and I have been very pleased with it.

This is a cute night gown. It's true size. I like the length a lot. The fabric is just okay. I like a lot of cotton/polyester blends, but this one isn't very soft. It's not scratchy or rough. It's just lacking softness.

This shirt is a lovely color. The green looks just like the pictures. The image screen print is well done. The shirt is a decent quality. My only complaint is that it runs small. I wear a size 18 or 1XL. I ordered this in a 2XL and it is too snug on me. I like it though and will keep it around in case I'm successful with my weight loss.

This is a decent quality shirt. It's not too thick or too thin. The color is beautiful. It seems to be well made, however it does run a bit small. I ordered a 2XL and it was very snug in the shoulders. I could put it on, but it wasn't comfortable. That's a shame because I really thought it was a nice looking shirt.

This is a nice looking clear bag. I like the way it looks a lot better than the typical clear bags available. The size is just right for what I would need to take with me to any event. In fact, there's probably more space than I would need, so I could easily carry my husband's wallet and or phone, too. It comes with an adjustable strap. I found it a little difficult to adjust. It wasn't as easy as some other adjustable straps, but it does work. The clips seem to attach it securely to the bag.

My 21 year old daughter thinks these are super cute shoes! They fit her well and as expected. The heel is stable and not too difficult to walk in. The straps were a little tight at first, but they've stretched enough that they're comfortable.
These are great lounge pants! They are soft and very comfy. I love the pretty floral design. The pants fit very well. It has a drawstring for a perfect fit. It even has pockets!

I don't hate it. I know that sounds like an odd way to start off, but it's true. I actually rather like it. It fits nicely. The fabric is soft and reminds me of pajamas. If the material was a little more "professional" like in texture and touch, I would probably love it. But when I put this on, it's like I"m wearing lounge wear or pajamas. That's fine, but it would be nice if it was something I could wear out and about.

I'm picky about my shirts. This one is a great one! It fits great. It's long enough that it doesn't show my backside when I reach or stretch, but it's not too long like a tunic either. The shirt itself while not super soft, it is soft and comfortable. The daisy is done well. I hate it when I get a shirt with an image that has a large stiff decal on it. This one is screen print so that's not a problem. I would definitely consider ordering another one!

I don't have to dress business casual very often, but every now and then it's necessary. I was excited to try these pants. I wear a size 18 jeans and I ordered these in the XXL. They are a little too loose in the waist and crotch area. I think I could have gotten by with the XL. There are no belt loops, so I can't easily remedy the loose waist. I like the material. It isn't going to wrinkle badly so it would be great for travel. The length was fine. I really liked how the legs look in them. Front pockets are real, but the back pockets are fake.

I normally don't wear leggings, but I couldn't resist these because they're Vera Bradley! They are a sturdy fabric with a decent amount of stretch. I wear a size 18 jeans and I ordered the XXL. My calves are pretty thick, so I was concerned about the fit, but they fit perfectly. They don't stifle movement or activity. I like the Vera Bradley print!

I am a long time Vera Bradley fan. I got my first VB tee shirt this past spring from their Star Wars collaboration line. This shirt has a good fit, though I wish it was a little more feminine in its shape. It's kind of boxy. I love the blue color. The floral design is cute. The overall quality of the tee shirt is quite nice.

My daughter is in college and likes to attend the football games. She needed a new clear bag to use on game day. She's been using stylish fanny packs lately, so she decided to go with a clear fanny pack. It seems to be a decent quality. The zippers work fine. The belt is adjustable. It meets the school's bag policy.

I'm always looking for cute tops to wear. I like the non-traditional colors of this leopard print. This shirt fits as I expected. I ordered the 2X and I currently wear a 2X or 18/20. I'm not crazy about the fabric. It's 100% polyester and definitely has an artificial feel to it. It's not scratchy or anything. I think I have been lucky to find a lot of super soft tops lately made from bamboo or viscose. This will look cute paired with black jeans.

I ordered these shorts for my 24 year old son. They either run a bit large or I should have ordered a size down. They are really big on him. He wore them to mow the lawn today and he had to stop and retie them a couple of times because they kept creeping down. The fabric is soft. The quality seems to be fine.

This is a beautiful watch. I was so excited to get it. I have large wrists and since this uses a traditional watch strap rather than a band with links, I was hopeful that it would fit me. Unfortunately, it's too tight. I can get it on my wrist and fasten it, but then it is very tight and it doesn't look good because my wrist is squeezed too much. The quality of the watch seems to be good. I will probably give it to my daughter.

This is a cute cropped denim jacket. The color is cream or ivory, not white. I ordered this for my 21 year old daughter. I selected her usual size, but it's a little snug. I should have sized up for a more comfortable fit. The quality of the jacket is good.
While this bra is called a lounge bra, it does offer a little support. The fit is as expected. It's a very comfortable bra. There is a brand logo on the front.
I followed the size guide that was in the product description. I found that to be a pretty good fit. The suit bottom is a good quality. Construction seems fine. Overall, I am satisfied with it.

As with most of the Vera Bradley items I've owned, this bag has good construction. It's well made and durable. As a travel bag, I think I would use it for additional items and not as my main luggage. There's barely enough space for a weekend's amount of clothing and toiletries. But for laptop, planner, note pad, & books, it is plenty roomy. I think it would also work well as a diaper bag. It just has that feel to it. There are plenty of pockets and storage for all kinds of stuff.

This shirt is made from a great fabric. It's soft and doesn't seem to wrinkle much. It's also light weight. The fit of the shirt is as expected. I like the scoop neck. The shirt is much longer than I expected. I had not checked out the additional product photos which show how long it is. In the first picture, the front of the shirt is tucked in so it doesn't show the full length. Overall, this is a good shirt and will be great for fall.

I ordered this Adidas lounge bra for my 21 year old daughter. She thinks it's really cute. I ordered the Large size for her without even looking at the size chart. She's a 36C. The fit is pretty good, maybe a tad small, but she is pleased with the look. Because of the deep plunge, she thinks it looks more like a swimsuit top than a bra. It's definitely not a sports bra. It gives her a lot of cleavage and if she wore it for sports, there's the worry that her girls would pop out! Plus there's just not a lot of support. But for lounging around the apartment, it's great! It's lined, but there are no cups and it does show nips. She likes this bra a lot!

These are beautiful casual dress shoes. My daughter has been wearing them with sundresses and is very pleased with how cute they look. The foot bed is pretty comfortable. They're stable and easy to walk in. The raffia material is a little scratchy but not unbearable. The sizing fits as expected.

This mini pouch wallet is made well and is an excellent quality. It's what I would expect from the Vera Bradley name. The floral print is delicate and pretty. This wallet would be great for a college student or for travel. It doesn't have a lot of space for cards, but it can contain the basics. I used it on a recent vacation and it held my drivers license and 2 bank cards. That's really all I needed. There's a sturdy clip on this so you can attach to a larger bag if needed.

This shirt has a good fit. It's cute. The length is good - I dislike shirts that are too short and show my skin when I reach over and this does not. I'm not in love with the fabric. It's okay and I will wear it. It's just not very soft. It doesn't seem to wrinkle, so that's good.

As a plus size woman, it's always exciting when I order clothing online and it actually fits! This fits nicely and as I had hoped. The shirt is a little low cut and it requires that I arrange my bra a little bit so it doesn't show. It's a cute, flowy top. The criss cross design adds a little fun to the look.

I like wearing dresses, but my thighs chafe which can be painful. These are a good solution. They're thin so they're not adding a lot of extra bulk. They're also light weight, so they're okay to wear in the summer when I am more likely to wear a dress. I followed the size chart and they fit great! I do want to mention that they did not arrive in any kind of poly bag or anything. Instead the label was stuck to the actual item bag, so the contents were visible. Plus, the bag they come in has a zipper style closure that would have been easy for someone to open.

It makes me happy when I can order a pair of shoes online and have them fit! I have wide feet and most of the time, I'm unlucky. These fit well. It probably helps that they're open on the sides and have adjustable straps. They are comfortable to wear. The soles are cushioned a bit, but they have minimal arch support. They have more support than what basic flip flops have, but not a lot. I probably wouldn't wear these hiking but for kayaking or walking on the beach they would be fine.

I wear Croc flip flops all the time. I have several pairs. I used a 5 gallon bucket. I started by adding about a gallon or so of warm water. Then I started thinking about water displacement and decided to stop until I knew how much room I had left AFTER my shoes were in the bucket. I was able to get at least 5 pairs of my flip flops into the bucket plus a pair of my son's athletic slides. Then I added more water. I probably ended up closer to 3 gallons of water, maybe a little more. I only used 2 tablets. I put the lid on the bucket to keep the shoes submerged. The next morning, I removed the shoes and rinsed them in the sink. The remaining water was gross! I really couldn't see much difference in my shoes, but they did smell better!  I do like that these are plastic free. I do think it could add up, depending on how often you clean your shoes. I should have used at least 3 tablets which is half of what I got. I was only able to fit about half of my flip flops in the bucket at a time.

I used to wear blazers all the time, back in the 1990's. I was excited to try them again. This is a nice quality blazer. It is lined and has pockets. The overall fit is good. However, the arms are a little snug on me. I have thick arms which can be problematic, so it wasn't a complete surprise. If I tone my arms a bit, the problem may be resolved.

These sunglasses are quite stylish. The oversize frames are fun! The glasses arrived flat which concerned me at first since they arrived in a poly bag, but they were fine. They don't feel cheap. It's nice to have new shades!
My son has been wanting a watch that he can wear swimming. This one works fine in the pool! The face is pretty big and easy to read. It works well and looks sporty!

I am loving this crossbody purse by JW PEI. It's a great, smaller bag which is all I need these days. The flap on the front uses magnets to stay closed. The bag comes with a storage bag to keep it clean and dust free. I am very impressed with this bag!
These Sperry slip on shoes are super cute! The sizing fits as expected. They seem to be made well. I am expecting them to get dirty quickly, but they are washing machine friendly!
These are gorgeous heels! Not only are they beautiful, but they are comfortable (for heels!). The fit is pretty good. Since the heel is wide, they're pretty easy to walk in.
I ordered this shirt for my 24 year old nerdy son. He found it very "punny". The shirt is a good quality. It's fits as expected. The graphics are printed well.

I love this swimsuit cover up! It's so simple! There are sleeves, but they are not traditional sleeves. The fabric is connected in just a small piece. There is no belt or sash. . It's basically a sheer, light weight open front poncho. I love that there's no production involved in putting it on, yet it provides coverage when you're wearing your swimsuit. This has got to be one size fits all! Or at least one size fits several!

My son almost always wears a white undershirt underneath whatever he's wearing. These shirts are comfortable. They're not too thick so they work well under his polo shirts. The fit is as expected. They seem like quality shirts.

These are pretty shoes. They are sturdy for being heels. I wear a size 10 wide in women's and sometimes I can get by in 11's. Unfortunately the foot bed was too narrow for me. I could wear them, but I don't want to be that person with the sides of my feet hanging off the shoe! I am not totally surprised. I knew it was a gamble. Even though they didn't fit my wide feet, they were comfortable to wear.
This is a nice looking skirt. The length is great. It's a good fit. I don't love the fabric. It's okay, but I would prefer something a little softer. It does seem to be flowy and have good movement.
These slip on shoes were  pretty snug at first. However, they do stretch a little and now they fit perfectly. They are comfortable to wear. There's adequate support. I am pleased with them so far.

I ordered this modern looking denim shirt for my 21 year old daughter. I wasn't sure if she would like it, but she does. She is a fan of cropped tops already, so this was a fun way to incorporate denim tops into her life. The sizing fits as expected. She's gotten several compliments from it.

This is a pretty necklace. The moonstone is more of a milky/clear color than bluish as I expected. It takes on the color of whatever it's up against. The chain is adjustable for different lengths. It has a standard lobster claw clasp.
These are pretty moonstone earrings. The setting is very nice. The stones are not really that blue at all as I was expecting. They're milky/clear stone that takes on the color of its surroundings.

I love this robe! I took it with me this past weekend when I went to visit my sister. I used it as a swimsuit cover up to her backyard pool and as a robe in the morning before I got dressed. It's light weight and very comfortable. There are even pockets!! I ordered the 2XL/3XL. I probably could have gotten away with the previous size, but this definitely worked. I didn't even mention how cute it is! I am very pleased with it.
This is a cute, basic skirt. The fit is good and as expected. It's comfortable to wear. It could be both casual and dressy depending on your shoes and top.
My son loves this brand of underwear. He says these are very comfortable. He likes the style. The material is slightly cooling.

I love these black tees! They are great! The fabric is slightly stretchy and very comfortable. They fit as expected. The scoop neck is flattering. It's not too deep of a scoop. I like that this comes with 2. I tend to wear black tees a lot, so it's great having multiple ones.

This is a cute, casual top. I ordered it in the 2XL. It fits pretty well, though the little buttons/snaps gape a little, which implies that it's a little snug. Though it doesn't feel snug or tight at all. I like the ribbing in the fabric. The shirt is a good length with not being too short nor too long. It's a nice variation of the basic black tee.

These basic v-neck tee shirts are a wardrobe staple! They are soft and comfortable. The fit is perfect. I like that they are a little long so when I reach or bend over I am not showing skin. I am very pleased with these and will probably order more!

I like the length of this dress on me. I'm 5'6" and it goes to the top of my foot. The fabric is light weight and very wrinkly. I'm not one who irons, so this fabric is not for me! The cut of the dress is cute, but I found the neck and chest area to be a little snug and not flattering in the way it looked in the upper arm/chest area.

These are nice looking pants. I was pleasantly surprised with how well they fit. I wear a size 18 jeans. I ordered these in the 2XL. They fit perfectly! I was a little unsure which side was the front. The tag is on the side and there is a small zipper on one side. The other side has a single crease down the middle of the legs. I went with the zipper in the back because of the crease. It looked right when I have them on. I just thought the zipper in the back was weird. I've had zippers in the front and on the sides, but never in the back. The pants are very flattering looking. I really like the fabric.

My daughter will be graduating from college next spring. She wants to decorate her cap, but wanted a spare just in case she messed up. This one is a good quality and comparable if not better than the one she can get through her school. It's also pretty affordable in case she needs another one!

This is a cute swimsuit. It fits as expected. I like the sarong skirt a lot. There's plenty of support where support is needed. The color is gorgeous! It's what I would call a "hot tub" suit or something I would only wear in private or with a few close friends/family. I wouldn't feel comfortable wearing any kind of bikini in public at my age! But I can't fault the swimsuit for that!

My daughter is working at a camp this summer. The camp staff needs to know what time it is and they aren't allowed to have their phones with them. She also didn't want to take her Apple Watch in case something happened to it. She just finished her first week and she says she really likes this watch. First, she really likes the pink color. It was very easy to set the time. She's gone kayaking in it without any problems. It also survived a week in the outdoors, which is a good testament to the quality. She said it does seem to get bumped easily and change the time. She said she's going to start wearing it so the face is facing the other way. Overall, she is very pleased with it.

I am very happy with these shirts. They are soft and comfortable. They are a great fit and fit as expected. I like that the length is long enough in the back (and front) that I'm not showing skin when I reach up or bend over.

My son just graduated from college. He ordered his cap & gown from the school sanctioned vendor. It was over $100. There were some nice touches that were for his school such as gold piping and school crest on the chest. My daughter will be graduating from college next year. Her best friend just graduated from the same school and their cap & gown was plain black. There were no special touches that made it stand out. So as long as that holds true, she is going to use this set instead of ordering the expensive one from the school. This one seems to be a good quality. It doesn't look or feel cheap. It's definitely an affordable option. It comes with a 2022 & a 2023 charm for the tassel.

This skirt is very soft. I like the style with the slits on the sides. I ordered this in the XXL, but I think I could have gotten away with the XL. I wear a size 18 jeans. They are loose on me, but not to the point of falling down. This will be great for summer!

I love this case! It's perfect! It is very well made. I haven't used it on an actual trip yet, but I did try it out and test all the zippers, pockets, etc. There's a surprising amount of room. I am hopeful that it will fit under the seat on the airplane. Just from eyeballing it, it seems like it will. Though of course, foot space will be limited. It rolls very nicely. The telescoping handle is probably the easiest one I've ever used. It pulls up without any hitching or stopping. I like the floral interior. I do have a few Vera Bradley luggage pieces and they all have had issues with the wheels. There's a cover on them that tends to pop off easily when using it. I don't know if it will happen with this one, but it has happened on 3 other similar pieces of mine.

This black, flowy blouse is better than I expected. When I first saw it in person, I wasn't really impressed. It sat on my dresser for a few days before I even tried it on. When I did try it on, I noticed it was just slightly tight going over my head, so I expected it to be tight on me, but it really wasn't. I love the way the sleeves look and feel! They are very flowy! This will look super cute with a long maxi skirt! I only wish it was a tad longer. I fear that if I raise my arms up, it will show some skin.

This is a pretty bar necklace. It has a good clasp that I found easy to use. Some necklaces have difficult to use clasps and every now and then I have to ask my husband for help. This one was no trouble to put on and take off by myself. I would prefer if the chain was just a little bit longer, but it's okay. The quality seems to be nice.

These Saucony shoes are a size 11.5. In some brands, that size works for my husband. These were a little snug on him. He says that they're not too tight, just a little snug. They may stretch a bit over time. They have good tread. There is adequate arch support. They look nice.

These men's Saucony shoes are supportive and comfortable. They fit as expected. My husband wears a size 11.5 usually, but these are a size 12. They are a little large, but there's no problems with that. Good arch support. Excellent traction. He likes that these are mostly black with no bright colors adorning them.

These shoes are great for kayaking. My husband is very happy to have these. They fit as expected. They are very comfortable. The foot bed is adequately cushioned and supportive. The lace lock - bungee system is easy to use and stays in place well. The bottoms have very good traction.

I have been wearing Saucony shoes for a few years now. They're one of the few shoe brands that I can order without trying on first. I can count on their shoes being true fit. This pair is no exception. I have wide feet and it's hard to find shoes that fit period! Let alone being able to order them online. These are running shoes and I am not a runner. I do find them to be less cushiony than I am used to. Maybe it's because they are running shoes. They are still comfortable to wear. I like the black and silver colors.

This 2 piece tankini swimsuit fits great! I followed the recommendations for sizing and I am very pleased with how it fits and looks. It's actually nice enough to wear in public! It's very flattering and comfortable to wear.

These Vera Bradley pouches are great for travel! I hate it when my travel bag gets full of loose stuff. Keeping items in pouches gives me the organization that I need. I love the little clear bag! It's always helpful when you can see what's inside without opening. The bags are in different sizes and each one looks different, yet they all coordinate and look good together. The quality is very good and what I have learned to expect from Vera Bradley. This would make a great gift!

I am a plus size middle aged woman. I currently wear a size 18 jeans, but 2XL tops. I say currently because I'm trying to lose weight now, but we'll see......I ordered this in a size 20. Not only does it fit well, but I was surprised by how cute it looks on me! Of course it doesn't change the fact that I am overweight, but it is kind of flattering. I would actually wear this in public! That there says a lot. There are a lot of swimsuits that I would only wear to our backyard hot tub. The cups were a good size - not too large or small. I am very pleased with this.

I have wide feet. I discovered several years ago that Saucony shoes have a great selection of wide sizes! I've been wearing them ever since! My shoe size is a 10.5 Wide, but not all 10.5 wides fit the same. Saucony is the only brand I can order online without trying them on and know that they will fit. These are just ever so slightly snug across the top of my foot. I do feel confident that they will stretch a little. The toe area is just fine. These shoes offer good support. They are very comfortable. I like the grey and raspberry color combo.

My daughter needed some new dressy sandals. I saw these and ordered them for her. The size is good and they fit as expected. The shoes are well made. She wore them to her brother's college graduation which involved a lot of walking on our part. She said they were comfortable to wear and didn't annoy her. Plus, they look cute!

These men's pajama pants are thin & light weight. That could be good or bad. If you're looking for warmth, keep looking. The material is not very soft. The fit is fine. My husband wears pajama pants in the mornings when he comes downstairs for his coffee. For his purpose, it's adequate. He doesn't love them, but he says they're okay.

This is not my first clear bag of this size. However, I noticed that my previous one had developed a cloudy appearance over time and did not look good any more. I needed a new clear bag. I used it yesterday at my son's college graduation. The size was more than big enough for the items I needed to take. I had a small wallet, my phone, a few face masks, and my elderly father's insulin & blood sugar reader in it. There was a little more space available had I needed it. The outer zippered pocket was big enough to hold my phone, but I found that my phone would kind of stick to the plastic surface in it, so I kept it in the large section. The straps were easy to adjust. I wore it as a crossbody bag. The zippers glided easily. Overall, I am satisfied with it.

My son's wallet had seen better days.  I ordered this as a replacement. It's very nice looking. It has a good feel to it. It doesn't feel cheap at all. It has enough space for his ID and cards. It arrived in a small gift box.

This plain tee shirt is very high quality. It's not thin or light weight. The fit is as expected. I ordered it for my son who likes to wear white tees under his polo shirts. He does think it might be too heavy to wear under his shirts in the hotter months. It does have the CK logo on the chest.

This Shrek themed baby outfit is pretty cute. The set includes a hat, onesie and pants. The material is soft and doesn't irritate the baby's skin. The sizing seems to be good. It would make a nice baby gift!

My daughter and I were unfamiliar with shirt jackets or shackets. She was very intrigued with the idea. The style is definitely like a shirt, but the material is heavier like a jacket. The fit is good. She's 5'7" and wears a size medium/large. It's slightly over sized, but not baggy. She likes it a lot!

When deciding on what size to order, my daughter went with XL. She is usually a medium/large, but she really likes her clothes to be baggy. These are baggy on her, but not in a bad way. They actually look cute on her. She did have to adjust the straps a lot for a good fit. She is working at a camp this summer and she plans to wear these once a week at camp. The length is appropriate for the camp environment.

My 20 year old daughter is 5'7". These are just a tad long on her, but not too much that she can't wear them. I ordered her usual size and they're a little snug. Fortunately, they have some good stretch to them, otherwise she wouldn't be able to fit in them. They are very flattering on her. She is happy with them.

This purse is cute. It's divided into 3 compartments. In the center, there is a zippered pocket and a slip pocket. Prior to ordering this, I was unfamiliar with Tom Clovers. I'm still pretty clueless. I tried looking online, but I didn't find anything helpful. The bag has no markings that indicate that it's a Tom Clovers product. The interior lining says beibooboo all over, whatever that means. I just found that to be very odd.

I wear casual Clarks all the time. I wear a size 10 Wide, but I find that with Clarks, I need to go with 11W. These are not wide, but I was hoping there would be wiggle room since they're slippers and not shoes. Unfortunately, they did not fit me. The foot bed is too narrow for me. Even with the Velcro, it didn't work. They are super cute though. And they are well made as far as I can tell. I'm going to pass them along to my sister. I know she will be thrilled with them!! They are perfect for taking the dogs out in the early morning!

This is a cute little purse. It's a crossbody style. The strap is easy to adjust. I was a little confused with the metal chain. Until I looked at the product description again, I thought it was just an alternative handle, but from the pictures, it's purely decorative. I like the color. I would call it a rose pink. There's a slip pocket on the exterior front of the bag which easily fits a cell phone. The bag has a zippered closure and the zipper works well. It doesn't stick.

I am a plus size mom. I currently wear an 18/20. I'm a 42DD. This bikini top does fit. I wouldn't call it full coverage. Or at least I'm not fully covered. That's okay. My husband likes it! I wouldn't wear this in public, but it's fine for the hot tub. I have had difficulties getting it to feel comfortable around the neck. When I loosen it, "the girls" aren't up as much. When I tighten it, it hurts the back of my neck. I suppose it could be the style. Overall, it;s okay.

These slippers are beautiful! I was so excited to get them. I wear several different Clark shoes, so I was already familiar with the brand. These slippers are super cute! Unfortunately they didn't fit my wide feet! I wear a 10W. I can wear 11's in a lot of shoes, but with my other Clarks, I wear 11W. These weren't available in wide for me, so I went with just an 11. The foot bed or insole is just too narrow for me. I was hoping since the slippers have the adjustable Velcro, it would be okay, but it wasn't.

I followed the sizing guidelines and went with the 4XL size. I would say it fits pretty well. It's comfortable but not very supportive. It would be perfect for lounging or sleeping. The straps aren't adjustable which if they were, you would be able to lift a little. I did have some issues with the pads getting messed up. There is a large access point where I was able to straighten them.
This Batman romper & hat set is great for summer! Sizing is good and as expected. The fabric is soft and comfortable. It seems to be made well. There are no obvious defects.

My first reaction to these shoes was that they looked a bit odd. But after trying them off, who cares! They are the most comfortable shoes ever! Then when I learned about all the recycling and sustainability efforts, I  was even more in love with these shoes. I wear a 10 wide in women's shoes. I ordered the 11's. They're a tad long in the foot, but the width is perfect. Often when I purchase 10's, they're too tight in the width. I am very impressed with these shoes.
This Tigger themed outfit is really cute. It is a set of shortalls, shirt, and bucket hat. The material is soft and comfortable. The sizing seems true size. This will be perfect for summer playtime.
