I love how versatile this crossbody bag is by Chums. It's easy to switch positions on the straps. Once in place the straps are secure. The zippers glide easily. It is a small bag but there's enough room to carry important essentials.

I was surprised with how comfortable these sandals are! I wear a size 10 Wide. I often order a size up if there is not a wide option. Usually about half the time, the 11's will work. These 11's work just fine! They are very comfortable. There's plenty of arch support. The straps are easy to adjust. These will be perfect with a long flowy maxi skirt!

This is a good shirt by Columbia. I like that it looks like a regular shirt and not like a lot of those sun-protective shirts. The shirt doesn't have any stretch to it. I wear a size 18/1X and if there was good stretch to it, I would probably be able to wear it, but unfortunately it doesn't fit. The brand name is on the sleeve. On the lower front is "omni shade" to indicate that it's specifically a sun protective garment.

This baby set is so sweet! It is all princess themed. It includes pajamas, headband, blanket, and burp cloth. The pieces are all soft. Construction is good. This would make a great baby gift, but please be aware that it comes in a clear poly bag. There are no tags on any of the items like you would get from a purchase at the store in person.

These are nice hiking shoes. These are my 4th pair of Eddie Bauer hiking footwear. Two pairs fit perfectly, and two do not. These are one of the ones that don't fit. They're all Eddie Bauer and they're all the same size. Just goes to show how different shoes can fit from shoe to shoe. I wear a 10 Wide shoe. I've ordered these in size 11. This pair and the other one that didn't fit feel too tight across the toes. From examining these, they are nice shoes. They have great traction. The insole is comfortable and supportive. They're super cute!

I recently had success with another pair of Trish Lucia chunky heel mules, so I was excited to give these a try. I normally wear a size 10W. The band on the other pair was large enough to accommodate my foot. In fact, I even commented that they may not work for narrower feet. The band on these is snug, but I thought they were fitting. But that was until I noticed my heel was hanging off the back. These are pointed and thus they are more narrow. My foot was stopped at least an inch if not more from the toe which caused my heel to hang off by that much. Oh  well...... they are cute. They seem sturdy and well made.

I am 5'6" and wear a size 18. I ordered this shirt in the 2XL. It wasn't as oversized as I expected, but it's definitely a loose fit. However, the arms are way too short! I'm average height and have average arm length. My upper arms are fat, but that wasn't where the fit was off. I would estimate the sleeves to be at least 2 inches too short. It was enough that it was noticeable and uncomfortable which is such a shame because I really liked the shirt. The fabric is super soft. It's not stiff like some flannel plaid shirts. I was looking forward to wearing it.

This Columbia shirt has really interesting fabric. It's light weight and it has a sheen to it. It's soft and slick. The sheen/sparkle reflects sunlight which helps keep you from getting too warm. It's a true to size fit. There are thumb holes on the sleeve cuffs. The color is a light pinkish orange.

This is a cute outfit by Disney. The screen printing is good. The fabric is soft. There are 3 pieces in this set - a bucket hat, short overalls and a t-shirt. I did find a lot of loose threads on the pieces, pictures included. If I was ordering this as a gift, I would feel compelled to get that all cleaned up first. Also, if you are going to be gifting this, be aware that it comes in a clear poly bag with no tags attached.

These slip on boots are easy to put on. I ordered the size 12 for my husband. He usually wears an 11.5 but I often size up for him to be on the safe side. It is a loose fit, but he says he will be able to wear his thicker socks with it and that should solve that problem. The quality seems to be good. Excellent traction. They look like they will be very easy to clean on the bottoms because the traction is large and chunky without little nooks and crannies.
These wool shoes are surprisingly comfy. It's like walking on clouds! Or how I would imagine it to be. I wear a women's size 10W shoe. I ordered this in the 11 and they fit quite nicely.

These hiking boots are great looking. I love the lavender trim! Unfortunately for me, these do not fit. I wear a women's 10 Wide. I will often try 11's and have success. I have other pairs of Eddie Bauer hiking boots (low ankle) that are 11's and fit wonderfully. (Roseberg & Thielsen styles are the ones that fit well in case you're interested). My toes felt squished in these. I could technically wear them, but with my little toes rubbing against the sides, I would probably wind up with a blister. Plus there's no way I could go on an actual hike with the way they feel. Aside from the fit, they are nicely made.

This Star Wars baby layette is absolutely darling! I love that they're designing Star Wars themed stuff for girls and not just boys! This is a 4 piece set that includes pajamas, head band, blanket and a burp cloth that is worn around the neck, sort of like a bib. The fabric is soft and the images are silk screened well. This would make a wonderful baby gift!

I wear a size 10 Wide in women's shoes. I ordered these in an 11. Often if I size up, the width issue is solved. But because of the style of these, I really expected them not to fit since there are no laces that you can loosen up. Surprise! It was a great fit! They are not snug or tight at all. That makes me wonder if they would not fit someone with a narrow foot. They're cute and stylish. They give the look of boots but you don't have to deal with the calves! I am very pleased with them.

The design of this Vera Bradley coin purse set is unique. You have the ID sized wallet which seems to be similar to their other ID wallet items, but it comes with a round zippered coin purse and a coordinating fabric. In the wallet part there are spots for a couple of cards and plenty of room for bills. The wrist strap is easy to remove. You can also remove either of the items and just use one if you prefer. The quality is good and as expected from the Vera Bradley brand.
This Star Wars 3-piece outfit is so cute! The set includes overalls, t-shirt, and a bucket hat. It is perfect for any Star Wars fan!

These Eddie Bauer hiking boots are comfortable enough to wear all day. They have great support as well as good cushion. I ordered these for my husband who wears a size 11 and 1/2. I ordered these in 12s since there are no half sizes. The fit is good and there's enough room for him to wear thick hiking socks. These are much more affordable than some of the other options out there!

This Vera Bradley morning shells tote bag is perfect for summer. It's made from recycled cotton. The tote bag is a good size. There are some slip pockets and pen pockets inside. The tote bag is sturdy and durable just as I would expect from Vera Bradley products. The handle is long enough to comfortably rest on my shoulder. It's just a nice tote bag.

These braided strap slip on sandals are very modern looking. They will be perfect for sandal season! I wear a size 10 Wide, so I took a gamble at ordering these in an 11. A lot of shoes will fit me in an 11, but sadly these did not. It's not a total surprise and I definitely can't blame the shoes for it! It's something I have learned to accept over the years. They seem to be well made. There's not a lot if any support, but there is a little padding.

I ordered this robe for my 20 year old daughter. The size fits as expected. I'm plus size and it's not a one size fits all, so it didn't fit me. It fits my daughter just fine. The material is a soft fleece. The robe has pockets and a hood. The pattern is a fun and colorful one. It's a great robe that's soft & comfy!

I am a long time Vera Bradley customer. My mom used to get new Vera bags and purses at least once a year if not more. I would get one every once in a while, but since my mom's passing several years ago, I have gone full Vera Bradley. It makes me feel connected to her. This bucket bag is a pretty new style as far as I know. I like the size and style. The stripes are nice, but I like the floral interior print better. The canvas material is durable and easy to clean. There are 2 slip pockets and 1 zippered pocket inside. The quality is good. As nice as it is, it's probably one of my least favorite bags. It's almost too plain and simple for me. However, it will probably appeal to those who think the florals and prints are too much!

What a cute outfit! This has 4 pieces - the skirt, leggings, tee shirt and body suit for mix and match attire. The pieces are well made with no noticeable flaws. Items are tag free. Would make a great baby gift!

This Harry Potter short overall set is so cute!! It's a great quality outfit. The 3 piece ensemble is perfect for warmer weather. The sizing appears to be accurate. The items are tag free. The items come in a poly bag and they do not have any of those tags that are attached with plastic. If you are gifting this, it would look nicer if you removed it from the poly bag.

What an adorable little bag!! This is a mini-sized Utility backpack by Vera Bradley. It's one of the solid print ones that has a cute coordinating floral print inside. The bag has adjustable straps. There is a zippered pouch on the front of the bag and a zippered pocket inside. This would be great for a teen/young adult who doesn't have a lot to tote around with them. I could also see it working for a mom with child/children on short outings when you don't need the full diaper bag. You could easily fit a couple of diapers, a travel size wipe container and some snacks.

*Updated 9/22: My husband has had these for about 6 months. He has worn them less than once a week. He's a computer guy and would wear these on weekends when doing projects around the house or just as regular pants. Yesterday he noticed what he thought was the sound of Velcro through out the day. He thought maybe there were Velcro pockets and didn't think much about it. Then in the evening, he heard the sound again, but this time he realized that the pants were ripping. The rip was down the side, but not on the seams. It was about a half an inch away from the seam. It's really a shame because he really liked these pants. I have higher expectations from the Levis Brand.

Original review: These pants are rugged and durable. They seem like they will offer some protection from scratches. I ordered these for my husband. I thought they would be good for weekend projects around the house. They are a little snug in the waist. He wears a 34/34 pant size, so that's what I ordered for him. There's no stretch in the waist band at all. He's hoping they will stretch over time. He usually wears Dockers pants and the 34/34 is usually a perfect fit.

I wear a size 10 Wide in women's shoes. Sometimes I can wear a regular (non-Wide) size 11 shoe. I am excited to say that the 11's in this hiking shoe by Eddie Bauer fit nicely! They are very comfortable. There is a good arch support. My toes don't feel crushed. The laces are not pulled tightly. If they were, the shoes probably wouldn't fit very well. Because they are not tight, there's not a lot of excess lace. I can't double tie them if desired. They have excellent traction. I like the grey color with a little pop of pink/coral!

This beach tote by Vera Bradley has a very unique style. It doesn't scream "I'm a beach bag". It's like a grown up version of a beach bag. It has handles as well as a removable shoulder strap. There are 3 slip pockets on the outside of the bag - one on the front and then one on each end. The interior has a drawstring closure that keeps everything inside from spilling out. It feels pretty durable. It looks gorgeous! This is the bag you need for your summer trips to the pool!

What awful shoes! I thought they would be cute and fun to wear this summer. And they probably would be if it wasn't for the shoddy construction. The sparkly jewels are glued onto the shoes. The shoes arrived in a plastic bag. They were attached to one another with an elastic string as well as one of those shoe hanging pieces that you see at the store for shoes that don't come in boxes. Well, the shoes touch one another. The glue from the sparkly jewels caused the shoes to stick together. They weren't stuck to one another enough that they became one. They easily separated. I don't even recall it being a problem at all. But when I looked closer to inspect them, the jewels on one shoe were missing in an 1 inch area and stuck in a mound on the other shoe. I've included pictures. It's April, and the weather isn't even hot yet, so I would not expect something like this. Very disappointing! As for fit, they didn't fit me, but I was expecting that. I have a wide foot and the band was a little too snug on me. They did seem to be supportive enough. My daughter would have claimed them if they hadn't been stuck together. Instead they're going in the trash! They're not even acceptable for donating!

My 20 year old daughter has seen similar "flowy" shorts on TikTok. She asked me to find some for her. She absolutely loves these! They are super soft and comfy. The rose color is beautiful. They are a great fit on her. I ordered her usual size and it was just fine. She wants more of these in different colors!

This is a cute rain poncho. It's larger than I expected. I thought it would fold up into a small pouch the size of your fist, but it's much larger than that. It's a thin and light rain coat. The pouch is attached and connected to the jacket. There were no instructions on how to fold it back up into the pocket. I figured it out, but it wasn't a pretty job! It will be great for traveling!
